Just over a year after the insurrection, Republicans are ramping up their attacks on the bipartisan January 6th commission.

_Now, public opinion for the commission is PLUMMETING!_ | **_As a good Democrat who is still outraged by the attack on our Capitol, we need to hear from you RIGHT NOW:_**

[**Team: DO YOU APPROVE OF THE JANUARY 6TH COMMISSION?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/jan6_commission_approval_poll/?source=VPP_20220201_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=1206%2E878179%2ERSgR6D) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/jan6_commission_approval_poll/?source=VPP_20220201_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=1206%2E878179%2ERSgR6D) | [YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/jan6_commission_approval_poll/?source=VPP_20220201_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=1206%2E878179%2ERSgR6D)

* * *
**TEAM, THIS POLL WILL CLOSE IN 90 MINUTES — YOUR RESPONSE IS DUE IMMEDIATELY UPON OPENING THIS EMAIL.**
Team, Republicans know that the January 6th commission is hard at work to uncover the truth of that dark day...

BUT AS WE SPEAK, Republicans are spending HUGE sums of money attacking the commission in an attempt to shut down the investigation and let traitorous Republicans off the hook – _WE CAN’T LET THAT HAPPEN!_

We’re terrified to think that Republicans could get away with their crimes against our country **_— but with public opinion for the commission wavering, we need to hear from our TOP supporters now!_**
[**Team: DO YOU APPROVE OF THE JANUARY 6TH COMMISSION?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/jan6_commission_approval_poll/?source=VPP_20220201_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=12&akid=1206%2E878179%2ERSgR6D) | [YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/jan6_commission_approval_poll/?source=VPP_20220201_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=13&akid=1206%2E878179%2ERSgR6D)

_VPP_

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1206%2E878179%2ERSgR6D). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1206%2E878179%2ERSgR6D).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1206%2E878179%2ERSgR6D) to request fewer emails. subject: 20 Hit Pieces in 9 Hours
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
The Fake News Media is coming after our campaign, Peter. I Won't Back Down! | | | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=5aeae58d23&e=fe4b890356)
---
| | Peter --

**In the last 9 hours, my name has been in the headlines of 20 liberal media outlets.**

Why? Because I believe in the right to life and _**I won't back down.**_
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=e494286a27&e=fe4b890356)
---
| [COMBAT LIBERAL LIES](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=ffd63fc34a&e=fe4b890356 "COMBAT LIBERAL LIES")
---
| _**I am proudly pro-life.**_ My mother was adopted, and I believe that every unborn baby deserves an opportunity at life, regardless of the circumstances of their conception.

Last week, during an interview with April Moss, I told her my position and how we restore a culture of life that supports pregnant moms, encourages adoption and stands up for those who can't stand up for themselves.

__**The left has had a field day**__ \- distorting my words, making disgusting accusations and leveling cheap attacks on all pro-life Americans.

**Folks, I won't be bullied into backing down from my stance on life.**

Fake News Media outlets, Democrat politicians and left-wing special interest groups from across the nation have l**aunched a full-on assault against our grassroots campaign.**

It's not just because I believe in the right to life - but because I won't flip-flop and backpedal like the crowd of politicians they're used to in D.C. and Lansing.

_The last few years have shown us how far the liberal media is willing to go to protect their narratives and silence conservative voices._

_**It's time to fight back.**_

[**_Can you make a donation to our campaign tonight and help us combat liberal lies?_**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=35b8b64512&e=fe4b890356)

---
|
---
| **God Bless Michigan,

name: Tax the Rich!
subject: Tell Congress: Make the rich pay their fair share!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | The ultra-rich and wealthy corporations have rigged the tax system for their own benefit and at the expense of hard-working Americans.
Some billionaires pay NO income taxes, while folks like us can’t use the same work-arounds and loopholes.
**Join Melanie D’Arrigo in demanding an equitable tax system that bridges the massive wealth inequality gap.**
[**Sign and send the petition: Congress must ensure the rich and corporations pay their fair share!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlYAl02bjDvkWw-bt61mximrPJghK7tbNB2GgOJ5CdiZXDkp3tEEaRxiq5EbsPqzJd8fCe5nnwq9rtaJIzVJo3LFsEKRUyzv3cGu5TGGunu7bqFMyTI4Xu8Cebo9pY1gKdgvGGg_ol2R8ypi53XA3Tuzif19OaKePMoby2r6zD2-VqqXghSI5bGN0GhihN5XqNf5KBL-WHSHWtRG4ImCqcFZQNSCGkbWwS_EKJdQ18YzREXgg2R8xLyDQdZDOe2LRZ7Ptz_hC_fBr6cLJXFakkKAf08VTVIRlsMD5HFArJC8D7JFriG3c4rY3Dz9xbOaTmCWAH83NZw12cprdM7Hl13tr44svX1top_b1_iYd2rr0MXmi2R524jKRWP3NS-Ng7Iu8QTpiNQq8QzEbcH0ThFC_aH9077CbWD-KZsEW0K5Ki-SIiUKm1FE7Lw7puGEF-gr-iaX2cfeI-n6PjAC9EFau1gwlwbGFu22Ffchi-H3RQeGq70GTuApCgdz3U3td23f28w0raBkQLB_pCwNUlPJDYHDCJHsnHqS63KJHSw_-vOLiNvkLCQ9eyNzjDTEX2zx4n-z6vXrgpgHC5Fe09X/3j8/J4uJ5I7qRF-it37EJlV54Q/h0/AcfjoqN4o6WdQU1gEvSOgms6lL4YjlQi1-BCRBvZH7U)
Billionaires have actually increased their total wealth by more than 70% during the pandemic, while working Americans have struggled to pay the rent and put food on the table.
The wealthiest Americans avoid paying about $163 billion each year – that’s a huge sum that could be paying for major new investments to help families afford healthcare, childcare, housing and to fight climate change.
Our deeply flawed tax code has allowed the wealthiest Americans to pay only a fraction of the billions they make year after year.
**We need a tax system that addresses deep wealth inequalities and puts us on a path towards economic justice.**
****[**Take action today and sign the petition: Tell Congress to ensure the rich and wealthy corporations pay what they owe in taxes now!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlYAl02bjDvkWw-bt61mximrPJghK7tbNB2GgOJ5CdiZXDkp3tEEaRxiq5EbsPqzJd8fCe5nnwq9rtaJIzVJo3LFsEKRUyzv3cGu5TGGunu7bqFMyTI4Xu8Cebo9pY1gKdgvGGg_ol2R8ypi53XA3Tuzif19OaKePMoby2r6zD2-VqqXghSI5bGN0GhihN5XqNf5KBL-WHSHWtRG4ImCqcFZQNSCGkbWwS_EKJdQ18YzREXgg2R8xLyDQdZDOe2LRZ7Ptz_hC_fBr6cLJXFakkKAf08VTVIRlsMD5HFArJC8D7JFriG3c4rY3Dz9xbOaTmCWAH83NZw12cprdM7Hl13tr44svX1top_b1_iYd2rr7SBmvJS6U6FpaB1uwq84BtKxB2PaRlPqMHj32tREBYzlR_MyAHE8YQiROgBVY71iUcKlShkWTZxa0oBEwLxujjTf_NgsQECQmFUckXi-fq32705jyBTWo7LKkweNl-Wc8Gji0t46S2cdubkkNX6cSuKJoGy79OcH4iAV6wyBUINzHAS1J6NDUYcHVESmVQ6z7-WB_S9WMJuK9VICzU6KbA56zZkRIW77XtSxz7pFQM7/3j8/J4uJ5I7qRF-it37EJlV54Q/h1/y-KmMVlYQ6JGCVKEPyIPO9OW_SLAIxmtYSi4Ihr3rgc)
Thanks for standing up.
– Melanie D’Arrigo for Congress

clean_body: | | | The ultra-rich and wealthy corporations have rigged the tax system for their own benefit and at the expense of hard-working Americans. Some billionaires pay NO income taxes, while folks like us can’t use the same work-arounds and loopholes. Join Melanie D’Arrigo in demanding an equitable tax system that bridges the massive wealth inequality gap. Billionaires have actually increased their total wealth by more than 70% during the pandemic, while working Americans have struggled to pay the rent and put food on the table. The wealthiest Americans avoid paying about $163 billion each year – that’s a huge sum that could be paying for major new investments to help families afford healthcare, childcare, housing and to fight climate change. Our deeply flawed tax code has allowed the wealthiest Americans to pay only a fraction of the billions they make year after year. We need a tax system that addresses deep wealth inequalities and puts us on a path towards economic justice. **** Thanks for standing up. – Melanie D’Arrigo for Congress | Get campaign T-shirts at is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. If you’d rather contribute by check, feel free to make the check out to the following address: Friends of Melanie Darrigo P.O. Box 312 Port Washington, NY 11050 Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo | | Sent via . body:

---
| | Dear Friend,

The Oregon Republican Party will soon be deciding whether they want to open the May Republican primary to nonaffiliated voters. _I believe the ORP delegates should vote in favor of doing so._

Keep in mind that many NAVs are former Republicans who we need to welcome back to our coalition. Many of them have also been automatically registered as NAVs simply because of the motor voter law.

If we can’t win more NAVs, we will lose this race and give up our best opportunity to send a Republican to the governor’s office in years. If you agree with my vision for a more inclusive Republican Party, will you chip in $10, $15, $25, or whatever you can afford to our issues-based campaign?

---
| [Donate Today!](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=4056f0aff9&e=7e91be8cad "Donate Today!")
---
| We have an incredible opportunity to make the GOP a big-tent party once again by opening the Republican primary this May. In doing so, we can make the GOP a WINNING party once again, too!

Sincerely,

Jessica Gomez
Republican for Governor

| | Folks, Today is the first day of Black History Month, and I’m asking you to join me in celebrating the profound impact Black Americans have made on our nation’s history. From the Civil Rights leaders who challenged our nation to live up to its ideals, to the community leaders, entertainers, and trailblazers that have uplifted the Black community and shaped this great nation. As we celebrate the amazing contributions Black Americans have made throughout history, we must also acknowledge the systemic discrimination that the Black community continues to face. The fight for social and economic justice is far from over, and it’s our duty to carry the torch and continue pushing this nation towards progress. This month and every month of the year, I’m standing in solidarity with the Black community and I’m committed to doing the work to create an equitable and just future for all Nevadans. In solidarity, Steve Sisolak

subject: Hershel Walker needs YOUR help right now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Black America's PAC Action Fund
body:
-
| | | _You're receiving this email because you support Black conservatives like John James, Tim Scott, and Wesley Hunt. If you're giving up on these patriots, then please[click here](https://www.bampac.org/unsubscribe?e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022eu0101&n=1) to stop receiving emails._

---
| Dear Peter, Football legend and Black Conservative Hershel Walker is going to flip control of the Senate over to the Republicans in November! He’s already got a **HUGE** lead in the Republican primary, and he’s already edging out his Democrat opponent, left-wing darling Raphael Warnock, according to recent polling data. Hershel’s not afraid of Warnock, a Democrat who barely squeaked out a victory against an unpopular Republican. But now that he’s going up against a **HUGELY** popular Hershel, he’s got another thing coming: _“They want to talk about Senator Warnock and whatever he did to get into office. But now, he’s going to have to face me...and it’s not going to be as easy as he thought it was going to be.”_
– Hershel Walker Hershel needs YOUR help right now, Peter. **[Won’t you chip in at least $20 to help Black America’s PAC Action fund propel Hershel to victory?](https://www.bampac.org/bafdonate?info=2022EU0101&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022eu0101&n=3)** Hershel’s candidacy and solid conservative credentials fly in the face of the liberal lie that all Republicans are racist! **[So please, say you’ll help us help Hershel be sending $20 by our 1st quarter deadline.](https://www.bampac.org/bafdonate?info=2022EU0101&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022eu0101&n=4)** Let’s get Hershel across the end zone!
---
| [](https://www.bampac.org/bafdonate?info=2022EU0101&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022eu0101&n=5)
---
_With gratitude,_ |
---
**Alvin Williams**
President & CEO
BAMPAC, BAMPAC Action Fund

body:
Hey, we haven’t heard from you. Are you letting your 2 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zm4mpgptkbr5p2jfjl1ivkdqkpdrfefsvb8lkmo8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctie9or7c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq7d1heirr7d1hm9qj0tbi66qbcd1jm1rr3cdkmerj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onh64qrcoplcepm1c5mm1qebctgethjbctjmoojbcbh61p3atr0e1jm0sj663hn0puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4cr665qbad77m9rmcd70m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)

| |
---
| | | Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 2 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zugk218feqm5rcccuu891ohs70hrs7vuopbjfjo8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctie9or7c9h2bs "RENEW MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections is the toughest battle we've seen yet. This sets the stage for what's to come for Republicans in 2024. If we fail to win back a Republican Majority in Congress, we will never take back the White House.

Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team, **[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2022 Republican Membership.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5lin4kmfk52c0cjojtlntv60gepf90a9ed6vcdo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctie9or7c9h2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2022 Republican Membership.")**

---

You've fought with us for two consecutive years, and we need you to stick back our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't win this fight without you. **[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zu3gjb85pllhqko60h7d7u3vm58l0vh0g2cno348_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctie9or7c9h2bs)**

---

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2022 Membership Services
Date: Wed, Jan 14, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: **We hate to see you go.**
**[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zr84cs5e7dgjb40lp3mmmdveqh01bldpo6a4eiro_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctie9or7c9h2bs "%%Email__c%%")**
**ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen, **but we have bad news for you.**

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zg6gkttqhopqt0gpfjmj5nhl2cccoomate3vlspo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctie9or7c9h2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT")**.

**[Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zt4jthuudjtk67b0jfj9heck176puue2qqel6pag_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctie9or7c9h2bs "Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?")**

---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2oq1lqvjemklatfqodabdmrcstsdufpsdastckg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctie9or7c9h2bs)
---

We're approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we've seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We're already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zod3a6drkoh42jlbj5bfc6f7fpjkc0c8tgotp0eo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctie9or7c9h2bs "11:59 PM")** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zt5ivqsohctfruljj72beut0b32e67fcpb3s3aag_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctie9or7c9h2bs)**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

body:
Hey, we haven’t heard from you. Are you letting your 2 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrbk53o23hc6n40i2ga5b3m55c9dimus28s3pfeg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ulj72tdnm6om4s5ncprr4p366pgm0s3kcjie4s3hcgpm5dpgctj6eopjmaq64tpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlcapmac3nc5j72cljckrr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1cpjm9p73cpjm49fg)

| | | Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 2 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?

---

The 2022 Midterm Elections is the toughest battle we've seen yet. This sets the stage for what's to come for Republicans in 2024. If we fail to win back a Republican Majority in Congress, we will never take back the White House.

Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team, **[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2022 Republican Membership.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvrstessjqdgts1ddkggvr21ugoslb5rlnkno9p0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctie9or6cth2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2022 Republican Membership.")**

---

You've fought with us for two consecutive years, and we need you to stick back our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't win this fight without you. **[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztf7lnvr2kfhp1ge4kp4chipjndpjs8ctnhqhpa8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctie9or6cth2bs)**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2022 Membership Services
Date: Wed, Jan 14, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: **We hate to see you go.**
**[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk6rs522udhe7dljlqsv9tjt5meh5mqukafkl98g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctie9or6cth2bs "%%Email__c%%")**
**ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen, **but we have bad news for you.**

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhnptdhhgtghljgk5ahf82ahgetpva0odnonjpt0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctie9or6cth2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT")**.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We're already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

name: Ann Coulter
subject: How to stop the intolerant left
body:
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the Un
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn5ut9c46q3g2n0102igofieeoa11thl9mtg4d60_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf9p70c8q74p1i69hb7cpkc5rr0splcur6cd9gs5p38c5meeom2t1km1im6odlc1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8pmcdj76dj3fcllcopb1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdgmco70cph6ap724no)
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. Here's one thing you can do about it that can really make a difference.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0ma8g688ecnq2f7lgr5sfvq7o0bdsksgekp7avg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3g6coj5cjh2bs) Fellow Conservative, **College campuses have gone absolutely insane.** A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the University of California at Berkeley, the so-called “birthplace of the free speech movement.” As you may have heard, my speech was abruptly canceled because leftist thugs decided to riot and the administration wouldn’t stick up for free speech. Unfortunately, I’m not the only one to suffer threats and intimidation on campus. Far from it. [ **Fight the intolerant left on campus** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp86n2j0clbsc1aq6g9ki8h2o7lcii77bhp7te8o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3g6coj5cjh2bs) As I point out in _Resistance is Futile: How the Trump-Hating Left Lost Its Collective Mind_ , ever since Donald Trump’s arrival in politics, **liberals have lost their minds.** But there’s no padded room to keep them contained! Instead, **these violent, masked lunatics have taken over college campuses, where young Americans are turned into automaton leftists just like themselves.** Young conservatives on college campuses across our nation are losing their right to free speech – and even the right to walk down the street without getting sucker punched – because of how intolerant the liberals have become. [**But lest you think I’ve given up hope, faithful conservative, there’s a group I trust that fights back against this onslaught and exposes leftist bias, abuse, and indoctrination on college campuses for all the world to see:_Campus Reform_.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z64hk5kuiovsa2imc6i312kakk9rgu2ppmv4an68_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3g6coj5cjh2bs) **Campus Reform, a project of the Leadership Institute, is the single most powerful force for campus free speech in America today.** By sticking up for conservative students and giving them the tools necessary to defend themselves and their principles, Campus Reform provides an absolutely essential public service. **Bottom line – Campus Reform uncovers the liberal schemes that the mainstream media wants to keep hidden... and they shut down the liberals’ indoctrination on campus after campus.** [**To continue their vital work, Campus Reform counts on the generous support of conservatives just like you – yes, you! – which is why I urge you to partner with them today by making a generous gift of $25, $35, $50, $100, or more right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zck11fki8k09msuhfppvencinhlq1e49tg503eb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3g6coj5cjh2bs) And to sweeten the pot – when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book, _Resistance is Futile_. Saving young conservatives AND getting a free book? What a deal! [ **Get my book here** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3nl43bru7rcqevgq6di8nqhps5jv29jm6ejquno_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3g6coj5cjh2bs) Campus police at the College of DuPage in Illinois told conservative students they’d **“lock them up” for handing out copies of the U.S. Constitution.** Yes, that dangerous document that the created the greatest country ever known to man. A teaching assistant at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln harassed the student president of a conservative group for recruiting students. With a gesture from her middle finger, she shrieked profanities at the conservative student and called her a “neo-fascist” and “Nazi.” Charming. At Purdue University in Indiana, a staffer called conservatives “vile, racist idiots” and **threatened to rape pro-life students.** (And you wonder why liberals prefer violence to debate.) In all three cases, LI’s Campus Reform exposed the truth. Armed with investigative reports from their student correspondents on campus, Campus Reform got word out to their nationwide audience of concerned conservatives. And they brought it to news outlets like Fox News, Newsmax, the Blaze, and numerous talk radio shows. Ultimately, Campus Reform’s exposure of the truth got _results_. In these cases and many others, **Campus Reform’s quick and powerful action forced universities to change their anti-conservative policies, discipline leftist student groups, and suspend or fire radical professors.** I believe an angel gets its wings every time a leftist professor is fired for their outrageous and unapologetic abuses against conservatives. But Campus Reform’s fight to make the left see the light and feel the heat won’t be won overnight. **To fight the forces of the intolerant left, stand up for free speech, and protect conservative students who want to simply share their beliefs without getting a black eye, Campus Reform is counting on your help.** [**Please make a generous investment of $25, $35, $50, or more today to support the Leadership Institute’s Campus Reform, stand up to liberal indoctrination, and ensure conservative students don’t lose their freedoms on college campuses.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1f2q8h124icdielv2qnk5l55k294m47ujsh4v48_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3g6coj5cjh2bs) Friend, let’s make ‘em pay. [**Please help Campus Reform right away so they can empower conservative students and strike back at the lunatic liberals.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z93s4ou0bf3vfr5gpd466rn4nsurbfjo0f1t5cto_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3g6coj5cjh2bs) Thank you. In liberty, Ann Coulter **P.S. Remember, when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book,_Resistance is Futile_.** It’s just one more way I can thank you for joining this crucial cause. Because **if we lose the kids, we lose this country.** [**Please donate right away.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo3tnbov4eu3hs18rtumk7sr5uicnq24pd1rp9ag_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3g6coj5cjh2bs) Thank you.** [ **Yes, I'll join Campus Reform in the fight against leftist tyranny** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlk71je8j8tdk285ojud0ek18mc0cklqrnpnnc0g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3g6coj5cjh2bs)
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zk5fot2q0p4ticf6tto71lc8a1u1e3g8nhte5au0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcr9plur9le067v9cqpded1b0eo5h9srr72b28v0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1cpge0pj2clie49fg)

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Excuse me for asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5af49spjn5jac94e2dj9pqvuh8o4ia8mfkfbhag_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrjac9ks8r3dcdme9gr2tphclh33clgm9on8slm6coj6ppks1q6edljmlq3appgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6dj3cppjcgrrcob665ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5j61o35c1i6eoh5u)
You’ve already done so much.

| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkoeinnpi258q45rbtncl3n30g68s5h773t8kmmo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3g6ao34cth2bs)
---

Folks,

I’m a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in January made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting. I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in January, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my January fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can’t happen.

**I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start February off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.
| | [RUSH $25](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z33rnlefdl0q8d8usnd5cj720ip4jaoqso0sv1i8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3g6ao34cth2bs)
---
| [RUSH $50](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn3io1g00tkg6npgkjefjtusms7gv251a3s0di60_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3g6ao34cth2bs)
---
| [RUSH $100](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl5ocn3mveh8klvs9v0a6ipdeosfh80uu3dck5e0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3g6ao34cth2bs)
---
| [RUSH $250](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z34lqktn14478j2g00aos56e709i7kboo1vus6cg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3g6ao34cth2bs)
---
| [RUSH $500](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1epo11998mnu8ffobq6ris3qaijblsl4odh9qr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3g6ao34cth2bs)
---

I appreciate your understanding, and I hope you’ll help me catch up.

Thank you,

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z23erve6ndqllndkjn3hfn68pbve6p9rmsfj56gg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3g6ao34cth2bs)

name: Kathy Barnette
subject: The Left silences the opposition…and I predicted it.
body:
---

| Dear Reader, As a former Vice President of a major investment bank, I feel it's my duty to warn you about what's coming on March 17th. **[With this new banking rule...](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13609%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C89S66qSPWI9DZw%2f3TnrAg&sysid=1)** Banks across the country are already preparing. I suggest you do the same... Because there's not much time left. Stephen Roach, former chief economist at Morgan Stanley, warns: "Already stressed by the impact of the Covid-19 pandemic, U.S. living standards are about to be squeezed as never before. A crash in the dollar could well be in the offing. It's going to fall very, very sharply" Yeah, I know... For decades we've heard rumors of a dollar crash... But what's happening behind the scenes now is stunning. This new banking rule will change everything. I've never seen anything like it. If you have money in the bank... **[Click here to see what's happening to our banking system and how to prepare.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13600%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zj7ddinmNyPHuVSHasNAXQ&sysid=1)** Teeka Editor, _Palm Beach Research Group_
---

Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to express my gratitude to everyone who has offered their support since the launch of our campaign for Congress. Because of an outpouring of support from this team, we were able to hit the first end-of-month goal of our congressional campaign.

2022 will be a critical year for determining the future of our country, and it's great to see people fired up about the upcoming midterm elections. We can't afford to let national Republicans win the House majority and undo all of the progress we've made.

I'm tremendously thankful to have your support, and I know that together we can keep RI-02 and our House majority blue.

Thank you,

Seth

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41341554/328381905/-1653583832?refcode=ste_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGQ0N2I2Yy0zMDg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PU9FDx8nbS6fLKqVWrBxsr_PGI3_UqvP0PAiS7AwpzE=)

| | Happy Black History Month, folks. While February is a time to celebrate and honor Black leaders and activists who have built and shaped our country from the ground up, this month also serves as a reminder of our commitment to uplifting Black voices and fighting for justice and equality. Let me be clear: Michigan history is Black history and American history is Black history. In Congress, I’m fighting to rectify the systemic racism ingrained in our institutions. This means addressing housing and healthcare inequalities, eliminating voter suppression policies that disproportionately affect Black voters, combating environmental racism, and so much more. I hope you will join me in celebrating Black History Month by taking action. One way I do my part is by supporting Black-owned businesses whenever I can. Last week, I visited a few in Madison Heights – Big Bo’s Grill and the 24th Cheesecakerie – which I now consider two of my new favorites! _Photographed with Quinn Wright from Madison Heights City Council and Chef Bo._ We still have so much work to right the wrongs of our history, but we can never stop fighting for the promise of equality on which our nation was founded. Thank you, Haley
---

subject: BURT JONES CALLS FOR INVESTIGATION INTO GWINNETT COUNTY SCHOOL BOARD REGARDING CRITICAL RACE THEORY
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BURT JONES FOR GEORGIA, INC
body:

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 2, 2022
BURT JONES CALLS FOR INVESTIGATION INTO GWINNETT COUNTY SCHOOL BOARD CHAIR REGARDING CRITICAL RACE THEORY
JACKSON, Ga. - In case you missed it, State Senator and conservative candidate for Lieutenant Governor of Georgia Burt Jones [sent a letter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019RVDFVw0FJHYUkWufp8sCNf26dyM3FlN0-PFn4YPpI_zLQsetQ9i3P0zarOuC4tv4WFGYhlMs4n-pbUh7unNM6xh5xdz4zmr0FAGzrDKe4i80_uOh-mpr6jngYkhgJE63mUenIr18PX16nAeIvj28fu5cvqPS6lNiscGcZ2isVx_j4v8ANAvXyEA4K0W8aVYZC_v36sXmLI=&c=H05ulR0J7geAxtEVnP7Yo_goDOqvmwNmxxhribcOnRdlmMdNZtsZ5A==&ch=oKBnF0tlf2qLfTYbsnsZaf-4C_OI-3nnk59vXpvXeTz5JnKx2THz4Q==) to the Georgia State Board of Education requesting an investigation into the Chair of the Gwinnett County Board of Education's recently unearthed, divisive videos. Additionally, new evidence shows that the School District's curriculum may already include the teaching of Critical Race Theory. Gwinnett County is the largest school district in the state of Georgia, with a more than $2 billion annual budget.
To read the full letter, see below or click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019RVDFVw0FJHYUkWufp8sCNf26dyM3FlN0-PFn4YPpI_zLQsetQ9i3P0zarOuC4tvM1RTc3f2DvuzCMx3UGP04fWVJZoQ1yF_FRRdsdRIIkpH2-kEsPA0os5tpMGVkaouxN8uOpDlfQvBaIBIaUcyiO7hMXw3GIUT5TM5_DXecUOIrqIHp5GXCx6_ZlSM63T7pMCb4HEwGMYqC5NBrDypqJhEPhZORVst_OnsXnE56J4=&c=H05ulR0J7geAxtEVnP7Yo_goDOqvmwNmxxhribcOnRdlmMdNZtsZ5A==&ch=oKBnF0tlf2qLfTYbsnsZaf-4C_OI-3nnk59vXpvXeTz5JnKx2THz4Q==).
---
| |
---
| January 31, 2022
Jason Downey Chair, Georgia Board of Education Georgia Department of Education 205 Jesse Hill Jr. Drive SE Atlanta, GA 30334

Dear Chairman Downey,
Over the past few years, Georgia has made significant improvements within our K-12 education system across the state. These gains have been predicated on cultivating and maintaining a learning environment and curriculum standards that set our students up for future success, regardless of race, background, color or creed. Unfortunately, it has come to my attention that the recently elected chair of the Gwinnett County Board of Education, Dr. Tarece Johnson, has made a number of inflammatory, divisive, and highly controversial remarks on various social media platforms, which I would like to bring to the attention of the Georgia Board of Education.
In a number of videos posted online, Dr. Johnson has stated that "we live in a society that glorifies whiteness,"i that white people are "socialized racists,"i that the "time has come where we end anti-Black capitalism,"ii and, in a message to "#WhiteAllies,"iii that their children "will grow up and they will perpetuate the racist systems that [Dr. Johnson's] children have to live in"iii in "this racist America."iii Unfortunately, these represent just a few examples of the many hurtful and egregious remarks from Dr. Johnson that only serve to further divide our country and our classrooms.
In addition, a new report has come out revealing that the Gwinnett County School District has instituted a teaching of Critical Race Theory within the county's curriculum. The syllabus for the AP Language and AP Research Combination class reads in part: "Students will bridge the skills from AP Language to AP Research, analyzing the value of using different lenses in social criticism (Critical Race Theory, Feminist, Marxist, Psychoanalytic) to aid their analysis across issues, and the class will discuss how these perspectives apply to the different methods used by research fields."iv The syllabus appears to have been since removed from the district's websitev--but the notion that the largest school district in our state would be surreptitiously injecting such divisive curriculum into our children's classrooms--and then attempting to cover it up--is both egregious and completely unacceptable. That role that Dr. Johnson and the Gwinnett County School District Board played--if any--in the implementation of this curriculum deserves immediate attention.
Now more than ever, our education system needs welcoming role models who can provide guidance and assurance to students of all backgrounds, and Dr. Johnson's actions severely undermine that mission and further divide our students and schools at a time when we need to unite and come together. For this reason, I am asking the Georgia Board of Education to launch a full investigation into Dr. Johnson's statements, implemented policies, and administrative actions--and whether they violate any of the code of conduct policies or other statutes on a county or statewide level. I respectfully ask the Board to evaluate all potential options within its authority to address these situations regarding Dr. Johnson's actions as Chair of the Gwinnett County Board of Education.
The parents, students, teachers, and taxpayers of Gwinnett County deserve to have a full accounting and transparency in this situation, and I am confident that our State Board of Education will afford them that.
I look forward to your prompt response and attention on this matter.
Sincerely, Senator Burt Jones
--------------------------
CC: The Honorable Richard Woods, State School Superintendent The Honorable Brian Kemp, Governor

Friends, February has begun, and once again, I owe this team a huge thank-you: not only did we raise a historic amount of money leading up to our January 15 campaign finance deadline, but we also reached our $50,000 goal for online donations in January before the month ended. **Each and every month, this grassroots movement never ceases to amaze me.** Thank you so, so much — Aruna and I are deeply grateful. Now that we’re in the heat of election season, things are moving faster and the countdown to the June 28 primary election is on. We may have raised more than any other Democratic candidate in this race for governor so far, but we can’t let up now. We know this is going to be an expensive and competitive race — and we are up to the task. Let’s keep up the amazing work and continue to build this people-powered movement for a brighter, better Maryland over these critical next few months. body:
I'm John James, and I’m running for Congress here in Michigan, and I need you as my Co-Pilot. I swore an oath to support and

**IT’S OFFICIAL JOHN JAMES IS RUNNING FOR CONGRESS!** [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zka530jmkfj0qc9166nga107fvh19fgo4qng90k8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3i60pb5cth2bs) **[Co-Pilot, GET YOUR ‘LAUNCH DAY DIGITAL DONOR BADGE’ >>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbrn0luu34gnlvguqag20nl8fdnbqtd32ep66kq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3i60pb5cth2bs)** | |
---
It’s time to suit up, Co-Pilot.

**I'm John James, and I’m running for Congress here in Michigan, and I need you as my Co-Pilot.**

I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution, and now we’re facing one of its greatest threats in our lifetime.
_**Faith. Family. Service. The American Dream.**_
These core tenants have always guided the American way of life, **and each one of them is at risk with our current leadership in government:**
❌ The DOJ weaponized against concerned parents for opposing critical race theory.
❌ Washington serving their own interests while abandoning our servicemen and women.
❌ Inflation and out-of-control spending are making the American Dream just that, a distant dream.
**Co-Pilot, I gave this speech at CPAC 2020 about my own family’s journey through the American Dream:**
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc9f22e1s5m8v8n8q74ak7fr5m1gdu4mt0hof4go_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3i60pb5cth2bs)
**We’re rapidly approaching an America where this won’t be true anymore, where the American Dream will be nothing more than a myth, and _where the only people who prosper are wealthy elites._**

We are at what President Reagan called _‘A Time for Choosing,’_ and we as a nation must choose which path we wish to follow.

**_I choose exceptionalism over entitlement... _**

**_I choose achievement over apathy..._**

**_I choose freedom over socialism..._**

**I refuse to let the American Dream die with our generationーI know the stakes are high, but I put my oath to protect our Republic above all else.**
**_
Now, I’m asking you to send me to Congress to do just that by investing a ‘Day 1 Donation’ towards my fight—[are you ready to fly?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6fh5cvmt5gjkvhvc176orbr9m7q4ss2g5v26n08_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3i60pb5cth2bs)
_**
[**TIME TO FLY!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc2uvrmsicju3nkl5g6tdqb5csqtm7gp91kh5ujg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3i60pb5cth2bs)
Thank you,
John James

| St. Louis, MO - Former Missouri governor and Navy SEAL Eric Greitens penned an [opinion article in the ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015bH_Nh3Un7_aPeokOVqY3s1lZ4LFxLlqgZ3FvBCckNV8NTQDM-RgsjZ6VYTxeW1h4-JLDxB_qk9Y2bu4sKL3-KEOB70-iFWe2wa1S2RcukoBK5iQgWJ_PvFFebhTem12SSMn9wGEIawoQCweka7ms-Vb8t8GvAoYXzjOEuj0Gg4h0-US1qiW5796yxVLcpj97xT1DTRMlzk0RuZOlA-Sk4HPTvEBPa_wlmXNA2pPDs0DZXnPuzNG-57vz6ZaWDZx&c=Ef4ipWWIFbDjmeGXFU86KP1tAj16qdsicBO5hSeyIlvToSIg_B3G-w==&ch=R7jZcH7CKGrcIIjYJtxovbUqzxrewrdIvLWjjMOzi4X_-yh1xEmENw==)[Washington Times](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015bH_Nh3Un7_aPeokOVqY3s1lZ4LFxLlqgZ3FvBCckNV8NTQDM-RgsjZ6VYTxeW1h4-JLDxB_qk9Y2bu4sKL3-KEOB70-iFWe2wa1S2RcukoBK5iQgWJ_PvFFebhTem12SSMn9wGEIawoQCweka7ms-Vb8t8GvAoYXzjOEuj0Gg4h0-US1qiW5796yxVLcpj97xT1DTRMlzk0RuZOlA-Sk4HPTvEBPa_wlmXNA2pPDs0DZXnPuzNG-57vz6ZaWDZx&c=Ef4ipWWIFbDjmeGXFU86KP1tAj16qdsicBO5hSeyIlvToSIg_B3G-w==&ch=R7jZcH7CKGrcIIjYJtxovbUqzxrewrdIvLWjjMOzi4X_-yh1xEmENw==) condemning the prejudiced political prosecution by out-of-control Soros-funded prosecutors like Letitia James in New York and Kim Gardner in Missouri. Governor Greitens writes: "There is nothing more dangerous in America than a corrupt, politically motivated prosecutor. Soros-funded prosecutors like Letitia James and Kim Gardner should not only be disbarred; they should also be in prison."
Eric Trump also tweeted Greitens' opinion article as Letitia James has continued the witch-hunt against President Donald J. Trump and his allies.

Targeting Trump: Nothing more dangerous than politically motivated prosecutors Washington Times By Eric Greitens Life. Liberty. The Pursuit of Happiness. The founding of America was rooted in a few, core principles. Chief among these, were due process and equal protection under the law. As Thomas Paine brilliantly wrote in Common Sense in 1776, "in America the law is king. For as in absolute governments the King is law, so in free countries the law ought to be king." Now, at this moment in American history, the law is not king. The government routinely fails in its solemn and sacred duty to ensure the unalienable rights of every American--regardless of race, religion, or--as it would be in America today--political persuasion. Today, Letitia James, the Soros-funded radical left New York Attorney General, is weaponizing the criminal justice system as an instrument of political attack on President Donald J. Trump. Since the 2016 election, the rule of law in America has been shredded by radical liberals who have systematically and illegally targeted innocent people in pursuit of political aims. In the last decade, liberal billionaire George Soros has poured tens of millions into unilaterally usurping the power of the people, installing corrupt and vindictive prosecutors across the country. As the last four years have proven, in the eyes of these hateful and crooked prosecutors, there is no target beyond their wicked reach: Before President Trump was even inaugurated, an evil effort to frame U.S. Army Lieutenant General Michael Flynn was underway. A distinguished judge and an honorable man, Justice Brett Kavanaugh was viciously targeted after President Trump named him as his pick for the Supreme Court. As an America First governor in Missouri, I was attacked by Kim Gardner, a Soros-funded prosecutor that committed countless crimes in her corrupt crusade to take me down. Though perhaps most disgustingly, President Donald J. Trump-- a President supported by at least 75 million Americans, if not more-- has been the victim of never-ending partisan plots. In 2022, the American people are under no illusions: these political prosecutors will lie, fabricate the evidence and testimony they need, and destroy exculpatory evidence. They will use the threat of prosecution to induce false testimony from innocent Americans. They will use the soulless and stupid mainstream media to destroy the lives of honorable people. By the grace of God, the truth always comes to light. ####

name: NextGen Pennsylvania
subject: RSVP: Text your friends with our PA Friendbank!
body:
| |
| Text your friends and family with us at our "Text That Jawn" friendbank!
---
| [Sign up](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41348181/328404208/-1038332728?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmMyYjJjYS0zODg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gojdeFh-HSGhEOQ92WH1yWq84jnFbR217fa9QrhHg1c=&emci=0b11cb18-c882-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=0bc2b2ca-3884-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
**We all get by with a little help from our friends, right?******
That’s why NextGen Pennsylvania is holding our "Text That Jawn" friendbank on February 8! Join this weekly event where we’ll be texting our friends and family from our personal phones and making sure they’re ready for the upcoming 2022 midterm elections!
**[RSVP: Sign up for our “Text That Jawn” friendbank and make sure your friends are in the know about the upcoming elections and our future events!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41348182/328404211/1455345328?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmMyYjJjYS0zODg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gojdeFh-HSGhEOQ92WH1yWq84jnFbR217fa9QrhHg1c=&emci=0b11cb18-c882-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=0bc2b2ca-3884-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6787172)**
Can't make it to this friendbank? Not a problem — we’ll be holding another “Text That Jawn” in two weeks on February 22! Sign up for the night that works best for you.
**When we organize, we can make the greatest impact on those closest to us.** By texting our friends and family, we’re making sure our community is mobilized, organized, and educated. We know that change starts at the local level, and this is how we build a Pennsylvania that reflects all of us.
Friends make sure friends are civically engaged.
**Sign up for any of our friendbanks and get ready to mobilize your friends and family for the upcoming elections!**

name: John James
subject: Time to suit up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Congress, Inc
body:
I'm John James, and I’m running for Congress here in Michigan, and I need you as my Co-Pilot. I swore an oath to support and d
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zokh2h4g47kdsirgd38h3q2h4cnffjl58m72vflg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3i62o34c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr7eorim2r7adtim9rbcddietgj2pr4cupned9gcdo6ad3ieoqe6tjn66r30t1nmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhb6p30epi6cd34mdi6fc5lclp2bs)
**IT’S OFFICIAL JOHN JAMES IS RUNNING FOR CONGRESS!** [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zj0k51390lpqfsmfgobf2a1j8qfefvabng4m4vh0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3i62o34c3h2bs) **[Co-Pilot, GET YOUR ‘LAUNCH DAY DIGITAL DONOR BADGE’ >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztgptd6st1cr994g3tcksdg0c582bl9bo5kt0v50_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3i62o34c3h2bs)** | |
---
It’s time to suit up, Co-Pilot.

**I'm John James, and I’m running for Congress here in Michigan, and I need you as my Co-Pilot.**

I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution, and now we’re facing one of its greatest threats in our lifetime.
_**Faith. Family. Service. The American Dream.**_
These core tenants have always guided the American way of life, **and each one of them is at risk with our current leadership in government:**
❌ The DOJ weaponized against concerned parents for opposing critical race theory.
❌ Washington serving their own interests while abandoning our servicemen and women.
❌ Inflation and out-of-control spending are making the American Dream just that, a distant dream.
**Co-Pilot, I gave this speech at CPAC 2020 about my own family’s journey through the American Dream:**
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2za214aomt9lakhssvr9g9rccn2qik3brlfhabhi0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3i62o34c3h2bs)
**We’re rapidly approaching an America where this won’t be true anymore, where the American Dream will be nothing more than a myth, and _where the only people who prosper are wealthy elites._**

We are at what President Reagan called _‘A Time for Choosing,’_ and we as a nation must choose which path we wish to follow.

**_I choose exceptionalism over entitlement... _**

**_I choose achievement over apathy..._**

**_I choose freedom over socialism..._**

**I refuse to let the American Dream die with our generationーI know the stakes are high, but I put my oath to protect our Republic above all else.**
**_
Now, I’m asking you to send me to Congress to do just that by investing a ‘Day 1 Donation’ towards my fight—[are you ready to fly?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z143jhrb2thul1vkjdd7rc4u1otn318rapbpnrpo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3i62o34c3h2bs)
_**
[**TIME TO FLY!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7tkrgscmos1e8abqs3eq7ovj7orn5pc4qvtg67o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3i62o34c3h2bs)
Thank you,
John James

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Ron DeSantis doesn’t care, but I do
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
That’s why I’m determined to defeat him in November – and I need you on our team. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41348928/328406555/-1348520159?refcode=20220202_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmMwNTI3ZS0zOTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVJvihZp6M_TtRaeEqQmtL-xWsdwTY9GPg3wZrJwdwo=)
---

Folks, you know that the mantra driving my work has always been _putting people over politics_. But as I watch Gov. DeSantis, I can’t help but feel that he does exactly the opposite.

I’m sick and tired of watching Ron DeSantis play political games with Florida, and, quite frankly, Floridians are tired of it too. **That’s why his approval rating has dropped and poll after poll shows me neck and neck with Gov. DeSantis — or outright BEATING him.**
[Help keep up the momentum
Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41348929/328406556/-1348520159?refcode=20220202_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmMwNTI3ZS0zOTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVJvihZp6M_TtRaeEqQmtL-xWsdwTY9GPg3wZrJwdwo=)
---
On issue after issue, it’s clear that Ron DeSantis is more concerned with inflaming culture wars and impressing his far-right billionaire donors than he is with fighting for Florida.
* Instead of prioritizing public health, he uses COVID to score points with his right-wing supporters by making common sense, life-saving measures seem like tyranny.

* Instead of protecting voting rights, he signed legislation to make it easier for GOP politicians to pick whose votes should count.

* Instead of putting families and teachers first, he’s sowing division and politicizing our education system.

**Ron DeSantis doesn’t care about building a Florida for All -- but I do. That’s why I’m determined to defeat him in November.**

**[I can’t do it alone, team. So please, if you’re able, will you donate now to help build the movement that will deny Gov. DeSantis a second term?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41348930/328406557/-1348520159?refcode=20220202_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmMwNTI3ZS0zOTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVJvihZp6M_TtRaeEqQmtL-xWsdwTY9GPg3wZrJwdwo=)**

Together, I know we can get it done.

\-- Charlie

clean_body: That’s why I’m determined to defeat him in November – and I need you on our team. | | | | = Folks, you know that the mantra driving my work has always been putting people over politics. But as I watch Gov. DeSantis, I can’t help but feel that he does exactly the opposite. I’m sick and tired of watching Ron DeSantis play political games with Florida, and, quite frankly, Floridians are tired of it too. That’s why his approval rating has dropped and poll after poll shows me neck and neck with Gov. DeSantis — or outright BEATING him. = On issue after issue, it’s clear that Ron DeSantis is more concerned with inflaming culture wars and impressing his far-right billionaire donors than he is with fighting for Florida. Instead of prioritizing public health, he uses COVID to score points with his right-wing supporters by making common sense, life-saving measures seem like tyranny. Instead of protecting voting rights, he signed legislation to make it easier for GOP politicians to pick whose votes should count. Instead of putting families and teachers first, he’s sowing division and politicizing our education system. Ron DeSantis doesn’t care about building a Florida for All -- but I do. That’s why I’m determined to defeat him in November. =** Together, I know we can get it done. \-- Charlie = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: A major step for our campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41350650/328411845/-900430888?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220202ty_gv_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTZjM2ExZC0zYjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Hi75GALg626BK02JtOECVyQPR5yHNbRfRDW6fkO1Og=)
---
Team, January was a huge month for our campaign: **not only did we surpass our monthly fundraising goal (mil gracias!), but we also collected over 2,000 nomination petitions to get me on the primary election ballot.** Yesterday, I traveled to Santa Fe to deliver those petition signatures and officially file my campaign for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District — and it was all thanks to volunteers and supporters like you. Organizers, campaign staff, and countless members of NM-02 all came together over the last month to deliver this achievement because they believe in our race. Now, we’re taking the next major step to replace far-right Rep. Yvette Herrell, flip this key House district blue, and give our communities the representation they truly deserve in Washington. Thank you again for each and every thing you’ve done to support our people-powered campaign for Congress. I can’t wait to see what we achieve together as we head toward the pre-primary convention and primary! Saludos, Gabe PS — One of the best ways you can sustain our campaign is by making a recurring donation to fuel us through Election Day. [**Will you sign up to make a monthly contribution of $5 or $10 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41350651/328411846/-900430888?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220202ty_gv_full_xx_l1&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTZjM2ExZC0zYjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Hi75GALg626BK02JtOECVyQPR5yHNbRfRDW6fkO1Og=) | | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. name: Charlie Gearing
subject: Thank you as we head into the home stretch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
body:
Peter -

I wanted to take a moment to say thank you. Monday was our first fundraising deadline of the year and I appreciate you bearing with all the emails, calls, and texts while we pushed towards our goal!

I’m proud to report that because of your support we were able to meet our end of month goal!

The outpouring of support we have seen from across the 114th District has been humbling and I just want you to know how thankful Rachael and I are for your support.Your continued support throughout this campaign has meant the world to us.

We’re building a strong coalition of grassroots supporters who believe in a better future for our families, children, and communities here in Texas. Thank you for being in this fight with us.

Let’s go win!

- Charlie

Charlie Gearing is a born and raised North Texan running for Texas House District 114 in East Dallas. He believes we need to fight for the things that matter to Texas families – investing in our teachers and students, creating good-paying jobs, expanding Medicaid, holding ERCOT accountable, restoring voting rights, and rolling back dangerous abortion restrictions.

Donate Now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]Learn more at gearingfortexas.com [https://www.gearingfortexas.com/?]
Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas

We’re building a strong coalition of grassroots supporters who believe in a better future for our families, children, and communities here in Texas. Thank you for being in this fight with us. Let’s go win! - Charlie Charlie Gearing is a born and raised North Texan running for Texas House District 114 in East Dallas. He believes we need to fight for the things that matter to Texas families – investing in our teachers and students, creating good-paying jobs, expanding Medicaid, holding ERCOT accountable, restoring voting rights, and rolling back dangerous abortion restrictions. name: Derek Marshall
subject: ANNOUNCING: Major Endorsements

body:
Peter,
**Did you hear? I'm happy to share some news with you: last month, I received the endorsement of BOTH of the last two Democrats to run for this seat in Congress. **
Marge Doyle and Chris Bubser are amazing women who blazed a trail for Democrats to run in the newly created 23rd district in California. **Between Marge’s race in 2016 and Chris’s race in 2020, Democrats jumped up 6 points in the share of the vote.** Looking at the data, I feel confident that we have a better shot than ever at winning this race and earning another seat for Democrats in the House.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41353174/328423249/622451175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGU4NTcyZS00MTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDUJ_cvhG1TaOAraBIiqTw7fhIl4x9uCsX4JlY3LEfk=)
**Marge and Chris share my vision for the High Desert:** one where jobs are plentiful, we conserve our precious natural resources, modernize our infrastructure, and invest in local businesses. Like me, they are incredibly committed to working toward a better future for all in California’s 23rd district.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41353175/328423252/622451175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGU4NTcyZS00MTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDUJ_cvhG1TaOAraBIiqTw7fhIl4x9uCsX4JlY3LEfk=)
**Both understand the importance of flipping this district from red to blue** and investing in the community-led organizing infrastructure that will take this race to victory.**I’m incredibly proud to have received their vote of confidence as we enter the new year on a strong footing.** This is a turning point for us in this race, one where more and more organizations and endorsers will join this campaign and voice their support for our insurgent mission to flip Califprnia’s 23rd.
**[That’s why I’m personally asking you today to chip in and invest in my campaign. We need bold, unapologetically progressive leaders in Congress. But to get there, I need your help. Will you support with a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41353176/328423253/622451175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGU4NTcyZS00MTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDUJ_cvhG1TaOAraBIiqTw7fhIl4x9uCsX4JlY3LEfk=)**

name: Gary Black
subject: What we stand for
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/a7972f39d316cf09/b5fdebbd513396e5c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — At his last press conference, Joe Biden asked folks to “name one thing Republicans stand for.”**

---
I can name plenty of things. We stand for the security of our nation, the security of our elections, the security of our economy, and the security of our homes. We stand for American energy independence, for enforcing the law and Backing the Blue, and for secure borders — but no amnesty. And we stand for American leadership around the world. **I’m the only Republican running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia who’s out there talking about these issues every single day — and I’m the only one with the trusted experience to get the job done once I’m in the Senate.** [**I hope you’ll stand with us here and now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/a7972f39d316cf09/0fa0f15bed19266fc3d6b838967d376c/37793)

_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.

name: Letitia James
subject: This Black History Month:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41353625/328425228/-39856258?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODFkOTJlMC00MTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=24BtE_ZxNJFh8QeTUHFXprDXN1qiBIDt_3UIs4fsXHI=)
---
Peter,

The work I do as your attorney general has never been about me or politics. It's about serving others – serving _you_ and everyday New Yorkers who need an advocate.
For decades, powerful special interests like Big Pharma and the gun lobby have held far too much power. As a result, prescription drug prices have skyrocketed, corruption has run rampant, and the gun violence epidemic continues to rage across our state. And more often than not, communities of color bear the brunt of these harms.
**I decided to run for attorney general in a state that had never before seen a woman of color elected to a statewide office – because I knew the totality of my life experience makes me uniquely equipped to finally hold these powerful and corrupt forces accountable.**
It is my passion, determination and experience that has fueled my fervent fight for voting rights in a time when voter suppression bills continue to sweep across the country. It has guided my fight to uphold reproductive freedom as it is slowly being stifled in states nationwide.
And it has guided my decision to run for re-election for attorney general – because I’m not finished fighting until the rights of all New Yorkers, including the Black communities who are often disproportionately affected by these harmful policies, are defended.
**Supporters like you made it possible for me to become the first Black woman to serve as your attorney general. Now, as we begin Black History Month, I'm counting on you to make history again and help me become the first to win re-election.**
[**Together, we’ve made incredible progress in our battle against inequality and injustice, but there’s still so much more work to be done. Please, Peter, will you chip in $15 or more today to help me continue to fight for you and your loved ones for another four years?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41353626/328425229/-39856258?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk317-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODFkOTJlMC00MTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=24BtE_ZxNJFh8QeTUHFXprDXN1qiBIDt_3UIs4fsXHI=)
I'm so grateful to have you on our team. Thank you so much.

Letitia
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41353627/328425230/-39856258?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk317-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODFkOTJlMC00MTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=24BtE_ZxNJFh8QeTUHFXprDXN1qiBIDt_3UIs4fsXHI=)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: We need to win this battle on the campuses
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvp3i6875ujeqemv22e8665aauf0s8o1omcs64no_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3i6eor7c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onme5om4sjieapb0s31mtg69ob7csqj5cbkcqrmcsj66ip38phkmcoe8d9lc1imfduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb2mdi60tj7cooj5ddhcuobapbi4no)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4ojbj2dba9g1t5pv64hi4d39771j65162upmggg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3i6eor7c9h2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjnfpoavn1kjld9m4qbuubbsoaqhk8istnfdddmo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3i6eor7c9h2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze8psh0sqbirebvoc4og8gh4jm1oi11kup32fksg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3i6eor7c9h2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgkc8es2lmafhfk2snglqe4ddh4r3ntv2qkideeg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3i6eor7c9h2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zllj4lc5ctd7ttmt493dmpgu86qdids7csmf6eqg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3i6eor7c9h2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5jq44qfcl4qtt679bj30l1q98ct90q48ltkhlco_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3i6eor7c9h2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Hey friends,

I don't know about you, but I'm not concerned about the shadow -- I just want to see this groundhog everyone keeps talking about today!

But first, I wanted to take some time out from hounding my groundhog friend to say thank you all for your support. **Over this past month, we were able to kick off the new year with the strong start we wanted!**

It's important to show our appreciation to _you_ , our grassroots supporters. It's because of you that this campaign is able to keep going -- just like the groundhog when I try to get close.

Before I dash off to go on a wild groundhog chase, let me say thank you one more time for ALL for the support you're giving my mom as she runs for Congress. Your support means the world to us, and as the Official Campaign Mascot, I say _thanks_.

**I appreciate you all, fur-real!**

– Max Roe (Campaign Mascot)

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: You’re Invited: Speaker Pelosi Grassroots Volunteer Update: Celebrating Black History Month with Congresswoman Lauren Underwood, Thurs. 2/3 at 5 PM PT / 8 PM ET
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Hi Friends,

As we begin Black History Month, we celebrate Black leaders and activists who have built and shaped our country and recommit to fighting for liberty, justice and equality for all. Every day this month my @TeamPelosi Twitter will spotlight my colleagues in the Congressional Black Caucus (CBC) — the conscience of the Congress.

On Thursday our Team Pelosi Weekly Grassroots Volunteer Update will celebrate Black History Month with a special conversation featuring an outstanding and effective CBC member - Congresswoman Lauren Underwood (IL-14). Congresswoman Underwood is a registered nurse and health care policy expert who co-founded the Black Maternal Health Caucus and has worked tirelessly to strengthen health care.

Zoom: Celebrating Black History Month with Congresswoman Lauren Underwood (IL-14)
Date: Thursday, Feb 3rd at 5 pm PT / 8 pm ET
Register: https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/1016437740912/WN_5TVbg_VSSSKjchZ7wWOtCQ

Thank you all for what you are doing every day to protect our Democratic House Majority – including by your support of the reelection campaigns of amazing members like Congressman Lauren Underwood, the youngest African American woman ever elected to Congress, who was one of our original majority-makers in 2018!

Your engagement – then and now – makes all the difference, so we thank you for being part of our winning team for 2022!

I hope you’ll join us virtually on Thursday. https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/1016437740912/WN_5TVbg_VSSSKjchZ7wWOtCQ

Warmest regards,
NANCY

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.

As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.

We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.

Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25] SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]

Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/7e48b773-4484-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/53a281d7-4784-ec11-94f6-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2EyODFkNy00Nzg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PVU9m3L0iz8vc9OG90nA1KIozYVhs-UfMZTFry0q9zI=&id=117907000 .

name: Val Demings (personal)
subject: Why I'm running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41355343/328434184/-74008005?refcode=20220201_SAP_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Nzc3ZjhiOC00ODg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OUaH1mX6BXV0LaZ3C93xJsycZXno8e02lurQk7Ka070=) I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare. So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate. Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger. So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader that understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win. So, I decided to run. And now, I'm two points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups. It's critical we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida. My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you split a donation between my campaign and Serve America PAC today? Here's the best link to contribute: [**http://secure.actblue.com/donate/Val-Serve**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41355344/328434185/-74008005?refcode=20220201_SAP_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Nzc3ZjhiOC00ODg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OUaH1mX6BXV0LaZ3C93xJsycZXno8e02lurQk7Ka070=) All the best, Val Demings
