clean_body: I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more | | | = I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare. So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate. Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was destined for something bigger. So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader that understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win. So, I decided to run. And now, I'm two points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups. It's critical we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida. My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you split a donation between my campaign and Serve America PAC today? Here's the best link to contribute: = All the best, Val Demings = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

As a leader for reproductive justice, Tina has a long history of fighting back against rollbacks on abortion access and reproductive health care.

One of her defining moments during her time as Speaker is when she passed the **Reproductive Health Equity Act** in 2017.

This law is now the **_strongest_** reproductive health care access law in the ENTIRE country.

In Oregon:
* **There is access to safe and affordable abortion care.**
* **Health insurance plans must cover a full range of contraceptive and preventive care, including people with private health insurance plans.**
* **Insurance must cover medical care up to 60 days postpartum (regardless of the insurance plan!)**
* **Services must be provided regardless of a person's actual or perceived race, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, age or disability.**
* **Medical assistance and access to abortion services are provided for all individuals regardless of immigration status.**

With national threats to restrict abortion access looming, this law makes sure that comprehensive reproductive health care is protected in Oregon – **_no matter what happens at the U.S. Supreme Court._**

However, the fight does not end there. As Governor, Tina will continue the work to make sure that reproductive health care is protected for _all_ people.

**[Donate now to support the most pro-choice candidate for Governor and help send Tina Kotek to Salem where she'll fight to protect reproductive rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41355701/328436221/-2010496638?refcode=em22_220202_reproendorse&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODIwODQ5MC00OTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UIfT4OAnR2UYQtq6MtdoofbBOcNCsArGOF3a-uw4iU4=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41355702/328436222/-2010496638?refcode=em22_220202_reproendorse&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODIwODQ5MC00OTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UIfT4OAnR2UYQtq6MtdoofbBOcNCsArGOF3a-uw4iU4=)
Thank you for joining us in this fight. Together we will see change, not only in Oregon, but across the country.

– Team Tina

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Quitters 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
It’s not often that reading the news makes you smile, but I’ll admit that this put a grin on my face:
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3eyzb--fgxr-4qqlpo2&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3eyzb-1w6pu-4qqlpo9/)
---

It’s not often that reading the news makes you smile, but I’ll admit that this put a grin on my face:

---

**House Dems Beg Members Not To Quit In The Face of Fierce GOP Midterm Challenge**
Washington Times, 1/25/22

---

It looks like we’re making an impact! The Democrats know that we’re starting a Red Wave of historic proportions, and while many of the Democrats have already tossed in the towel, not all of them have gotten the message.

**It’s clear that Americans are fed up with the radical, broken leadership offered by the Democrats.** Our victories in November in Virginia and other states should have been the wake-up call to get their heads out of the sand, but Joe Biden and his Democrat allies in Congress have just stuck their heads in deeper.

It’s obvious now that they aren’t listening to Americans.

**[But, we can make them listen by delivering HUGE wins in the upcoming elections. To do that, I need you to make a quick donation to help us push our America First candidates to victory all across the country.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3eyzb-1w6pv-4qqlpo0/ "But, we can make them listen by delivering HUGE wins in the upcoming elections. To do that, I need you to make a quick donation to help us push our America First candidates to victory all across the country.")**

The 2022 midterm elections will be here before we know it, and it is more important than ever that we outraise the radical Democrats. That’s why getting your contribution in as soon as possible is so important.

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3eyzb-1w6pw-4qqlpo1/)
---
| | [CHIP IN TO GROW THE RED WAVE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3eyzb-1w6px-4qqlpo2/)
---

When we say that we’re tired of empty grocery shelves and high gas prices, we’re told that those aren’t real problems or that the way to solve them is to hand Democrats even more power.

When we say that we want fair and secure elections with policies like Voter ID, we’re shouted down as racists, despite the fact that Americans across the board support Voter ID.

When we say that we’re DONE with closures, shut-downs and mandates, we’re told that we aren’t compassionate enough and that breaking the economy and violating people’s freedoms is necessary for public health.

---
| | [CHIP IN TO GROW THE RED WAVE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3eyzb-1w6py-4qqlpo3/)
---

**With a track record like this, it’s no wonder that Americans are turning their backs on the Democrats in droves and supporting GOP candidates who offer a better vision for America. **

Some Democrats are now waking up to the fact that they’ve earned the ire of the American people, but instead of shifting course and listening to them, they’re opting to call it quits and retire.

I’m committed to rolling with this Red Wave all the way to November, where I know we can deliver a historic victory for the American people. But our movement relies on people like you to keep us going.

**[I’m asking personally for you to chip in to help us turn the tide for America and deliver this Red Wave.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3eyzb-1w6pz-4qqlpo4/ "I’m asking personally for you to chip in to help us turn the tide for America and deliver this Red Wave.")**

Let’s kick the Democrats out of power and take our country back.

Never Give An Inch,

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3eyzb-1w6q0-4qqlpo1/)
---
Mike Pompeo
---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION** to **29910**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3eyzb-1w6q1-4qqlpo2/ "PompeoEmailFooter")
---

**A Personal Note from Mike Pompeo**

With the Freedom Fund, I am supporting candidates across America who will defend the freedoms and values that make America great. From Iowa to Texas to California, I’m supporting principled conservatives who we can count on to keep their promises and deliver results. But our efforts will only be successful if we have the financial resources necessary to counter the big bucks flowing into the Democrat campaigns.

**[If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist nightmare, then I need YOU to step up right away with an emergency donation to our Freedom Fund.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3eyzb-1w6q2-4qqlpo3/ "If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist nightmare, then I need YOU to step up right away with an emergency donation to our Freedom Fund.")**

name: Demings, Val
subject: Do you have a minute, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'm doing some reflecting
| | |
---
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.
So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger.
So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups.

It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.
My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41356514/328439821/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2340-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTM3NGI0My00YTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vPWXlLVY42AeqEAkanWpbBe_pFaNx8joMC4B00sLTSo=)**
All the best,

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41356515/328439822/1804727444?refcode=jtk2340-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTM3NGI0My00YTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vPWXlLVY42AeqEAkanWpbBe_pFaNx8joMC4B00sLTSo=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41356516/328439823/1804727444?refcode=jtk2340-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTM3NGI0My00YTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vPWXlLVY42AeqEAkanWpbBe_pFaNx8joMC4B00sLTSo=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41356517/328439824/-460395862?refcode=jtk2340-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTM3NGI0My00YTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vPWXlLVY42AeqEAkanWpbBe_pFaNx8joMC4B00sLTSo=&emci=19968fc3-fd82-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=25374b43-4a84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. clean_body: I'm doing some reflecting | | | I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare. So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate. Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was destined for something bigger. So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win. So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups. It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida. My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: = All the best, Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you’re reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team. By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41356580/328440108/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWE2ZGRmNS00YTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dbwAHFqQqrIFaeJE-kmt-SiVyrqgIHPS-sR84kLPias=&emci=269f4035-f082-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=d1a6ddf5-4a84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
I want to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude for all the ways you support my campaign.
When I first made the decision to run for Congress, I knew I wanted to run a campaign based on grassroots efforts and I am proud to say that thanks to your support, that vision has been realized.
As you know, this is the most competitive seat in Arizona and one of the most competitive across the country, which is why deadlines like last night's are so very important. It's up to us to build the resources needed to keep this seat in Democratic hands.
**So, friend:_thank you._ **I’m so grateful to count you as a member of my team.
With you in this fight,
Kirsten
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: We won! Thank you. We still need you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
Here's how you can help now | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4c933bc30b5b/we-won-thank-you-we-still-need-you?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

We won the Republican Party Caucus Straw Poll yesterday in a big way. According to the MNGOP website, we tripled our next closest opponent and won nearly every county and BPOU across Minnesota! [Now we need your help!](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=51ea26bfed&e=33b11688c1)

Every-day Minnesotans are the heroes, and they will be heroes again in November. People from all walks of life stepped into the arena and came out in droves to support our movement. I'm humbled by the support our campaign received. We've raised the _most_ money from small dollar donors, have created a grassroots movement that's _never_ been seen before and now we are _galvanizing_ conservatives and independents as the endorsement gets closer. YOU DID THIS. YOU BUILT THIS MOVEMENT!

But we still have a favor to ask: will you help us add rocket fuel to this movement? We need to continue to build our war-chest to defeat Tim Walz and restore sanity to Minnesota! It is now clear that we are the campaign that can win. Will you join us and [contribute $15, $25, $55, or more](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=f4be51b063&e=33b11688c1)?

On top of winning the gubernatorial straw poll, we've solidified a slate of delegates who will propel us to the endorsement and beyond! Our path for the nomination will not be easy, but we have a plan and an expert team to do it. We take nothing for granted! We've raised over $1.3 in small dollar donations (roughly $60 on average) --- but Tim Walz still has nearly $4 Million to work with this year! Will you match our average donation and[ give $60](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=c057f88eb6&e=33b11688c1)?

Peter --- winning this straw poll was a huge milestone in this journey to defeat Tim Walz! But it's not over and [we need you now](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=01f30dbff0&e=33b11688c1). Let's unify and focus our energy on healing Minnesota from the failed policies of the past!

**Full results:**
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=6a63f8cd02&e=33b11688c1)
---
| We will continue to focus on safe streets, students instead of broken institutions, making decisions based on science (NOT political science), and secure elections. For the first time in a long time, Minnesotans have hope in the political process.

Let's now turn our attention to beating Tim Walz and winning back Minnesota with a message of hope!

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota
---
| | | | | | | [](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=838b7568c4&e=33b11688c1)
---
| | [](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=3fb067d020&e=33b11688c1)
---
| | [](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=2f44228a4d&e=33b11688c1)
---
| | [](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=4403a1a0ed&e=33b11688c1)
---
| | [](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=e5eefadc53&e=33b11688c1)

|

PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR. SCOTT JENSEN FOR GOVERNOR._

Dr Scott Jensen for GovernorP. O. Box 1348Minnetonka, MN 55345-1348
[Add us to your address book](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=222c95b6af)

I know we email a lot to ask for your support, but today I simply
wanted to reach out to say THANK YOU.

Because of supporters like you,
our online fundraising surged in the month of January. I don’t take
asking for your support lightly, especially in the Biden economy, and
I’m humbled by the trust you’ve placed in our team to get the job done.
It’s an honor to have you on Team Marshall. Let’s keep up the fight
and bring a RED WAVE to America in November!

Kansans sent me to the U.S. Senate to

But I can't keep up the fight without

I'm not

hope you'll chip in below. Taking back the Senate in 2022 depends on
patriots like you standing with us.

-Senator Roger Marshall

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Happy Black History Month, Peter!

This month is about celebrating the contributions Black Americans have made to our country that have enriched our culture, advanced our medicine, innovated new technology, strengthened our nation and its freedoms, and so much more.

Black trailblazers and activists have led the social movements that changed our country forever - the civil rights movements, labor movement, women's rights movement, the fight for LBGTQ+ equality, and the reproductive justice movement.

We've made important strides in the past years. Last year, we saw Vice President Kamala Harris sworn in as our first Black, first South Asian, and first woman Vice President, and now, I'm hopeful that we will soon see a Black woman on the highest court in the land.

Black History Month is not just about the past - it's about acknowledging the work we have ahead to address the severe inequities in our country and work toward rooting out systemic racism in all of our institutions. This work must continue every single day, not just during Black History Month.

Together, we can stop voter suppression, fix our criminal justice system, ensure access to high-quality health care, and fight for reproductive justice. [**This Black History Month, I urge you to join me in recommitting to the fight for racial justice by adding your name >> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/r_zCOrXe22RK08_2VGmarvP5dhv9WioNE0zuFwi-rmU=/mbxOkVdJTyd5e--NyCgG1s4XZZNofZoiNm_kqIO3ZpI=?ms=em22_220202_BHM_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em22_220202_BHM_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em22_220202_BHM_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220202_BHM_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek Kilmer

clean_body: Happy Black History Month, Peter! This month is about celebrating the contributions Black Americans have made to our country that have enriched our culture, advanced our medicine, innovated new technology, strengthened our nation and its freedoms, and so much more. Black trailblazers and activists have led the social movements that changed our country forever - the civil rights movements, labor movement, women's rights movement, the fight for LBGTQ+ equality, and the reproductive justice movement. We've made important strides in the past years. Last year, we saw Vice President Kamala Harris sworn in as our first Black, first South Asian, and first woman Vice President, and now, I'm hopeful that we will soon see a Black woman on the highest court in the land. Black History Month is not just about the past - it's about acknowledging the work we have ahead to address the severe inequities in our country and work toward rooting out systemic racism in all of our institutions. This work must continue every single day, not just during Black History Month. Together, we can stop voter suppression, fix our criminal justice system, ensure access to high-quality health care, and fight for reproductive justice. ={{ContactData}} It's an honor to represent you, Derek Kilmer = | = ---|--- Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. subject: He needs our support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bo Hines for Congress_**
body:
Peter --

Joe Biden just declared you an enemy of the state.

The cognitively impaired Biden shouted lines his handlers prepared for him that any American opposed to a scheme guaranteeing permanent Democrat regime rule through massive fraud was a domestic terrorist.

**Communist Democrats want to seize control of elections and put Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer in charge of voting.**

Radical leftists end goal is America transformed into a one-party socialist state.

Conservatives must fight back and elect an America First majority this November.

Firing Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer is the only way to stop this madness.

**That's why I endorsed Bo Hines for Congress in North Carolina.**

Bo is a 100% pro-Life, 100% pro-Second Amendment, 100% pro-Trump champion for the America First movement.

**[Will you join me in supporting Bo Hines for Congress by chipping in an emergency contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59583774:W3Kw37HNM:m:1:2365227053:13B46DA2EA81BCB73CED37B1F7359074:r)?** **[SUPPORT BO HINES
CHIP IN $17.76 TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59583774:W3Kw37HNM:m:1:2365227053:13B46DA2EA81BCB73CED37B1F7359074:r)** Joe Biden wasn't fooling when he smeared you and me as domestic enemies.

The Biden regime already targeted concerned moms and dads that protested school abusing their kids with mask mandates and brainwashing their children with critical race theory as domestic terrorists.

**Nancy Pelosi's goon squad on the January 6 witch hunt committee seized my electronic communications and could leak them to CNN at any moment.**

Communist Democrats like Adam Schiff teamed with RINO sellouts like Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger to throw Trump supporters in jail just because they called out the dirty tricks in the 2020 election

I'm fighting back tooth and nail.

But I need America First reinforcement in Congress who will never back down one inch when essential liberties like our ability to speak freely and Second Amendment rights are on the line.

**[That's why I'm asking you to join me in supporting Bo Hines for Congress by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, or $100 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59583774:W3Kw37HNM:m:1:2365227053:13B46DA2EA81BCB73CED37B1F7359074:r).**

Bo Hines stood up to cancel culture fought the woke mob on college campuses.

When Democrats, their allies in Silicon Valley, and the fake news media rigged the 2020 election Bo Hines called out the fraud.

Bo Hines is not afraid to take on the tough fights.

**And Bo knows fighting for the America First, pro-Trump agenda means always going on offense.**

Right now, the stakes could not be higher.

Communist Democrats threatened an unprecedented assault on the integrity of our elections.

The Biden regime declared that anyone who exposes this un-American power grab is a domestic enemy.

Big Tech censored me, and the D.C. swamp is trying to invent ways to throw me in jail for one reason.

_I'm leading the fight to elect America Frist conservatives like Bo Hines to Congress so a new majority can_ :
---
*** **IMPEACH** Joe Biden for allowing an invasion on our southern border; *** **BUILD** Donald Trump's border wall and stop illegal immigration once and for all; *** **FIRE** Dr. Fauci for lying about the origins of the China virus and lying to Congress about funding gain of function research in Communist China; *** **DEFUND** Planned Parenthood; and *** **STOP** all unconstitutional gun control.
If you agree, America First conservatives must stop socialism and save America; then I need your help to elect Bo Hines to Congress right away.

**[To achieve that goal, I hope I can count on you to chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even the legal maximum of $2,900 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59583774:W3Kw37HNM:m:1:2365227053:13B46DA2EA81BCB73CED37B1F7359074:r).**

Joe Biden and the Communist Democrat grow more desperate every day.

Polls show Biden's approval rating sinking to 33% and a red wave building across America.

Now Joe Biden, his handlers, the Jihad Squad, and the rest of the Communist Democrats are threatening Americans that oppose a massive voter fraud power grab as domestic terrorists.

**I will never compromise or surrender in the fight to keep our elections free and fair.**

But I need help to stop the radical left.

That's because Democrats can always lean on the Big Tech censors and fake news media liars to bail them out.

That's why I endorsed 100% pro-Life, 100% pro-Second Amendment, and 100% pro-Trump Bo Hines for Congress in North Carolina.

That's ok.

I have a more powerful ally.

**You.**

**[And I hope I can count on your to join me in supporting Bo Hines for Congress so America First Patriots can fire Nancy Pelosi next November and take our country back](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59583774:W3Kw37HNM:m:1:2365227053:13B46DA2EA81BCB73CED37B1F7359074:r).**

**[SUPPORT BO HINES
CHIP IN $17.76 TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59583774:W3Kw37HNM:m:1:2365227053:13B46DA2EA81BCB73CED37B1F7359074:r)**

Sincerely, Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene

But the threat against our democracy is far from gone. Despite Trump's dangerous conspiracy theories, election lies and his potential implication in the Jan. 6 insurrection, nearly the ENTIRE Republican Party is _still_ consolidating around and defending him.
**If you want an example of the GOP's 100% defense of Trump, look no further than Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA).** First, he defended Trump's dangerous attempts to use the Department of Justice to overturn the results of the election. Then, weeks later, he stood on stage with Trump at a massive Des Moines MAGA rally and accepted the impeached president's endorsement. That's why Democrat Abby Finkenauer – the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue – is running to defeat Grassley!
**[But Abby is up against the Senate GOP's $32 million war chest, which is why she needs your help to fight back against the party of Trump and WIN. clean_body: | | | Peter – we've got good news: The Supreme Court has refused Trump’s request to block the release of White House records pertaining to the Jan. 6 attack on our Capitol! Now, the House Committee investigating the insurrection has begun to receive access to some key documents that will help reveal what was happening in the Trump White House while rioters stormed the Capitol. But the threat against our democracy is far from gone. Despite Trump's dangerous conspiracy theories, election lies and his potential implication in the Jan. 6 insurrection, nearly the ENTIRE Republican Party is still consolidating around and defending him. If you want an example of the GOP's 100% defense of Trump, look no further than Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA). First, he defended Trump's dangerous attempts to use the Department of Justice to overturn the results of the election. Then, weeks later, he stood on stage with Trump at a massive Des Moines MAGA rally and accepted the impeached president's endorsement. That's why Democrat Abby Finkenauer – the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue – is running to defeat Grassley! = Trump's rally with Sen. With that type of political power, who knows what Trump would do. To protect our democracy, we must defend our Democratic majority – and that starts with defeating vulnerable incumbents like Sen. name: =?utf-8?Q?Ozzie=20Gonzalez?=
subject: How to Help Joe Kent Win
body:
Dear Fellow Patriot,

As the campaign manager for Joe Kent, I am constantly surrounded by hundreds of supporters who are giving their time, talent, and treasure to help us win.

And as each day brings us closer to Election Day, our need for your help grows. Please consider supporting our campaign in the following ways, even if you don’t live in the district:

- Host a fundraiser. If you can gather a crowd of fellow America First patriots who can donate and are willing to host an event, please reply to this email and let me know. We may be able to have Joe attend your event either virtually or in person to speak with and take questions from your guests. We can even setup a special page on our website for your event. Email events@joekentforcongress.com.

- Join the host committee of an existing fundraiser to help sell tickets. We currently have fundraising events slated for NYC, DC, Dallas, Houston, Miami, Naples, Indianapolis, Phoenix, Los Angeles, Charlotte, Atlanta, Portland, and, of course, all over our district in southwest Washington State. If you’re able to help out with events in these cities, please email events@joekentforcongress.com.

- Volunteers. We are looking for people to make calls, go door to door, staff our headquarters, and help us run our events in the district. Let us know what you’re capable of at https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=0813a09af0&e=00856e661d.

- Apply for a job as a field organizer. Starting in late March, we will expand our field program by hiring organizers who will help lead our volunteers in making direct contact with voters. If you are able to work from late March through the August primary, please fill out the application here: https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=006bb16efb&e=00856e661d.

- Put a sign in your yard (if you live in a district). Please send an email to signs@joekentforcongress.com if you have some property and want a sign delivered.

- Make a direct contribution. Running against a Never Trump RINO with millions of dollars in corporate PAC money isn’t cheap. We needs funds to pay for signs, direct mail, digital, TV and radio ads, and field staff. Please donate today at https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=d43ab769fb&e=00856e661d.

Thank you for all your help. We couldn’t do this without you.

Ozzie Gonzalez
Campaign Manager
Joe Kent for Congress

==============================================

Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com from this list:
https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=4a7c82fdc2&e=00856e661d&c=fd7000f605

Joe Biden's approval rating has hit a new low and I don't see that ever really improving. | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Joe Biden's one year in office have brought: Rising Inflation Botched Afghanistan Withdrawal Labor Shortages Border Crisis * Unconstitutional Mandates Friend, I am running for Congress because I believe that Texas's 8th Congressional District deserves a strong conservative voice in Washington that will go to work for them every single day. You can't count on Joe Biden, but you can sure count on me. name: Groundhog Day Alert (via Team West)
subject: We’re looking for our shadow. Here’s our prediction:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
We wrote a poem. | Friend, It’s Groundhog Day, and we have a prediction:
Let us describe our campaign’s premonition.
While temperatures rise and extremists divide,
there’s one man who still fights to stand by our side.
His name is Matt West, he’ll never rest,
What’s next for Oregon? You’d like to know?
Will it be Spring? Winter? Maybe more snow?
We can’t say for sure what the weather will be,
But there’s one thing that we can guarantee.
**If you sign this pledge to vote in November**
Matt West will win; he’s a strong contender! **[Every vote matters in Oregon and across the nation this year, so today, we’re counting on 1,000 supporters to stand with us and take this pledge to vote in November>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41358020/328447152/-1953684492?refcode=ea.3a2c51f2-5184-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.3a2c51f2-5184-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTJjNTFmMi01MTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pWfMTmb88RDlaKRg1E6SemJazrtL515qgg7FU_JdSTA=&emci=ff159990-4184-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=3a2c51f2-5184-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=5643049)** _**[TAKE THE PLEDGE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41358022/328447153/-1953684492?refcode=ea.3a2c51f2-5184-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.3a2c51f2-5184-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTJjNTFmMi01MTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pWfMTmb88RDlaKRg1E6SemJazrtL515qgg7FU_JdSTA=&emci=ff159990-4184-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=3a2c51f2-5184-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=5643049)**_ Thanks for your support, Team West

name: Donna Imam
subject: Not every campaign can say this, but we can.
body:
Not every campaign can say this about contributions, but we can. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41358046/328447289/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWRkYWIxYS01Mjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BIav9KT8W974PRnILHWdVRx7vOgn_CAjP8kfr4MVvuk=)
Friend — We’re one month away from the primary election. Our Democratic primary race will most certainly decide representation for Austin due to gerrymandering. **For the first time in decades, the bluest city in Texas has the opportunity to send a __new representative__ to Congress that will champion and deliver solutions for working families.** **Every single dollar that we have gotten so far for this race came from individuals. Not corporate PACs. Not interest groups.** That’s an important distinction, because it makes our campaign accountable to our community, to Austin, and to small donors across this country hoping for a brighter future. **[Will you join thousands of unique donors to our campaign and make your first $5 contribution today? It could be your dollar that pushes us over the edge to a win!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41358047/328447290/-780221392?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220202_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWRkYWIxYS01Mjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BIav9KT8W974PRnILHWdVRx7vOgn_CAjP8kfr4MVvuk=)** Campaigns are expensive. To be able to raise hundreds of thousands of dollars solely from individuals is not an easy feat. That’s why, I know we have a strong campaign! At a moment when the Texas GOP is restricting our most basic right — to be able to vote — our campaign in Austin is more important than ever. **Not only do we have the chance to send an additional Democrat to Congress in this brand new seat but we also have the ability to help win critical statewide races in Texas.** In 2020, our campaign led all of Texas in voter turnout — that’s how we win Texas and we must do it again in 2022. _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately._ | [$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41358049/328447292/-780221392?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=pl_20220202_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWRkYWIxYS01Mjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BIav9KT8W974PRnILHWdVRx7vOgn_CAjP8kfr4MVvuk=) | [$20 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41358051/328447294/-780221392?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=pl_20220202_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWRkYWIxYS01Mjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BIav9KT8W974PRnILHWdVRx7vOgn_CAjP8kfr4MVvuk=)

clean_body: Not every campaign can say this about contributions, but we can. | = Friend — We’re one month away from the primary election. Our Democratic primary race will most certainly decide representation for Austin due to gerrymandering. For the first time in decades, the bluest city in Texas has the opportunity to send a new representative to Congress that will champion and deliver solutions for working families. Every single dollar that we have gotten so far for this race came from individuals. Not corporate PACs. Not interest groups. That’s an important distinction, because it makes our campaign accountable to our community, to Austin, and to small donors across this country hoping for a brighter future. = Campaigns are expensive. To be able to raise hundreds of thousands of dollars solely from individuals is not an easy feat. That’s why, I know we have a strong campaign! At a moment when the Texas GOP is restricting our most basic right — to be able to vote — our campaign in Austin is more important than ever. Not only do we have the chance to send an additional Democrat to Congress in this brand new seat but we also have the ability to help win critical statewide races in Texas. In 2020, our campaign led all of Texas in voter turnout — that’s how we win Texas and we must do it again in 2022. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately. | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = = With much gratitude, – Donna | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for US Congress in Austin, Texas. | | Peter, I’m so overwhelmed with gratitude for our grassroots team right now, and I want to be the first to share some exciting news: Not only did we _surpass_ our fundraising goal for January, but during the 4th Quarter of 2021 we outraised the entire combined GOP field in NC-14. Our campaign has now officially raised more than $1 million from 30,000 grassroots donations. Seriously, Peter, I’m blown away and deeply grateful. It’s never been clearer that folks are ready to send real leadership to Washington. Madison Cawthorn’s plan for an extremist takeover does not represent who we are in WNC, and our fundraising numbers prove that – right now, thanks to you, our campaign has more cash-on-hand than Cawthorn. This matters because Cawthorn is now hinting that he may re-file to run in our district – if he is deemed eligible to hold office after his current legal battles. We’ve been saying this since the beginning – grassroots organizing and fundraising is how we’re going to win this race. It’s helped me win in the past, and it will help us win now. I’m so proud of the work we’re doing together to lead with love, hope, and empathy. And we need to kick it into gear if we want to keep our momentum. clean_body: | = | | Peter, I’m so overwhelmed with gratitude for our grassroots team right now, and I want to be the first to share some exciting news: Not only did we surpass our fundraising goal for January, but during the 4th Quarter of 2021 we outraised the entire combined GOP field in NC-14. Our campaign has now officially raised more than $1 million from 30,000 grassroots donations. Seriously, Peter, I’m blown away and deeply grateful. It’s never been clearer that folks are ready to send real leadership to Washington. Madison Cawthorn’s plan for an extremist takeover does not represent who we are in WNC, and our fundraising numbers prove that – right now, thanks to you, our campaign has more cash-on-hand than Cawthorn. This matters because Cawthorn is now hinting that he may re-file to run in our district – if he is deemed eligible to hold office after his current legal battles. We’ve been saying this since the beginning – grassroots organizing and fundraising is how we’re going to win this race. It’s helped me win in the past, and it will help us win now. I’m so proud of the work we’re doing together to lead with love, hope, and empathy. And we need to kick it into gear if we want to keep our momentum. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = I refuse to take a dime from corporate PACs because I plan on representing the people, not special interests. That’s why every hard-earned dollar you donate is so critical to this campaign. Thank you so much for being a part of this team. With you, we’re going to win this election and work together to pave a new path forward for Western North Carolina. – Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: John James
subject: I need you as my Co-Pilot…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Congress, Inc
body:
I'm John James, and I’m running for Congress here in Michigan, and I need you as my Co-Pilot. I swore an oath to support a
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8t1u6ptqmcpd4s5idgv2971bnk1jrdagbqoo6jo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrr2ttlmmrm6splmhibct3mm3ie2t3665jj2o7363h31ddhm8om7cjkmprrbclnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhb6p37maq6cdj2mdj3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5j61oj1c3j6coh5u)
**IT’S OFFICIAL JOHN JAMES IS RUNNING FOR CONGRESS!** [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztelil1sje4dns9cn6nvcqn6sol4jjn5366ko5v8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3h62o76cph2bs) **[Co-Pilot, GET YOUR ‘LAUNCH DAY DIGITAL DONOR BADGE’ >>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl76sfl0dgkl15li7d0hcsonit4ma13l6d38co8o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3h62o76cph2bs)** | |
---
It’s time to suit up, Co-Pilot.

**I'm John James, and I’m running for Congress here in Michigan, and I need you as my Co-Pilot.**

I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution, and now we’re facing one of its greatest threats in our lifetime.
_**Faith. Family. Service. The American Dream.**_
These core tenants have always guided the American way of life, **and each one of them is at risk with our current leadership in government:**
❌ The DOJ weaponized against concerned parents for opposing critical race theory.
❌ Washington serving their own interests while abandoning our servicemen and women.
❌ Inflation and out-of-control spending are making the American Dream just that, a distant dream.
**Co-Pilot, I gave this speech at CPAC 2020 about my own family’s journey through the American Dream:**
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhs6eg87d27umr2lob43pj9c1kjkpmepb29tdv60_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3h62o76cph2bs)
**We’re rapidly approaching an America where this won’t be true anymore, where the American Dream will be nothing more than a myth, and _where the only people who prosper are wealthy elites._**

We are at what President Reagan called _‘A Time for Choosing,’_ and we as a nation must choose which path we wish to follow.

**_I choose exceptionalism over entitlement... _**

**_I choose achievement over apathy..._**

**_I choose freedom over socialism..._**

**I refuse to let the American Dream die with our generationーI know the stakes are high, but I put my oath to protect our Republic above all else.**
**_
Now, I’m asking you to send me to Congress to do just that by investing a ‘Day 1 Donation’ towards my fight—[are you ready to fly?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5nojvkga7nvhvimfshgnadt98lbetbtbapsv428_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3h62o76cph2bs)
_**
[**TIME TO FLY!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgahpphamh3igdvc7h0ofoq2bm0lh9nb8qvkkm48_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3h62o76cph2bs)
Thank you,
John James
---

Friend,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxdkMFO6zAQRb_G3blKJmmSLrIAalQkKIgCglU0tofGwnYixwXxvh6nKm-BNBrJ53qu5o5uoazLghamhQxSZZAX-QryJck1VVSVssxR1_malZnDA6KKZvBoKcSlGtyib3EFlaplAZQjrrJCNrJRpVxjhXUlARe27WMcJ1ZcMLhONZE6Blp-GR9IzyaJRULHewqT6sly41Vigyc-DsZHPiEPrLg-RtdNwzEoYsUm0CeDakYK3Yjm4BMcB2vP1JE2R5cYOTQznFR6nELmWdVtxeP-aituOyG6_UV3vxP84f5m99Q9ipcEfq0HH8nHNOiV5a_PsnZ3zeV2n-TOW6OT8Af2Rqekmw-x6d92ehFaPX4Za81U1emCh3mX093Szta8f7esvmQApymA04lA6gaxbHDF143g_4IXswRXqcfvkf7_O1sszwGB1Zsf9p2QFQ)
That's right – NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia – 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can – and will – happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

**[Today we're asking you to consider a gift of $3 or more to our campaign to strike while the iron is hot and flip this Senate seat RED.](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxdkM1OwzAQhJ_GvblK7DQ_hxwKNQIJtaggEKfIsbeJwXYix6UqT8-mKhyQViv5W89qZ3TNsiLjsDA1SxhWwlKerli6hLaCHPKszVKpi7QiWeJkJ6WKZvDSQohLNbhFX4NuWc6zpJJlW_IDFCgq5eGQF2mRrpJqYes-xnEifE3YHdYE6hhgeTI-gJ6XIIsgHe0hTKoHS41XyAYPdByMj3SSNBB-d4yumYZjUED4JsAXYfmMlHSjNJ1HOA7WXqkDbY4OGThpZjgpfFxMpkne3Iv98-29eGyEaJ7XzW4r6NPuYfvS7MUrgt_Vg4_gIwq9spR3_PVt--G6Txw33hqNg3-wNxqdbj7Fpn_f6kWo9Xgy1popLzDBbr7lkhvebM3hXJPihjB2UTF2iYi1upQSI1zRqhT0O3gxj9gt9nge4e_fdcXyapCRYvMDw7eQYQ)**

clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Friend, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right – NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia – 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can – and will – happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Stop forced COVID vax on campus
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhbui9qn9g1ih33nom75ec0g6he9kvn62e1p5fu0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp69p1kcsqjfd1jm5pjasdn64pb4t1ke1r7csj163i39ptim5q3ad9kmpim4cdn6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhb6p37mar6cc9imdhmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5j61oj3cdj66oh5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z97fo9ghecelprmkv15pe4d1oc0101ct1o8g44p8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3h66or6cdh2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg6l1n3u3mbqotkbloaq2nfjniqkdgqd2i5d9agg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3h66or6cdh2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq2b63tlhusfcjuaqdj2fnnulq3g9jiesvc9v1c8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3h66or6cdh2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgas5vib5kt8h7u6ppqg33p1tfdfpfik7kkn99q0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3h66or6cdh2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcg8gldc0e9t8hkho6ck1c9oedmtpbp74vhsgc9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3h66or6cdh2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs08ajt02jb83paline3bp9sb1eestre2d8bi3c0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3h66or6cdh2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: Our second-best month yet!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41359639/328454788/-1229619614?refcode=fl_email_na_20220202thankyou_ae_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzEwZjdlYi01ODg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEso8w9czsf8gaekN60xzpnkVAd_7eaXDDJMCIouMgg=)

Friend, I had to reach out and say THANK YOU! Thanks to this grassroots team, we not only reached our fundraising goal for January: _we had our second-best month since we launched this campaign last October!_ **I’m also thrilled to announce that last quarter’s fundraising numbers are in, and we officially raised more than any other Democratic candidate in this race, with 70% of our contributions coming from right here in PA!** It just goes to show that the energy behind our movement to flip PA-01 blue is growing. We’re kicking 2022 off strong, and that’s exactly what we need as we start preparing for the May primary election. Soon, we’ll have to collect nomination petition signatures from registered Democrats across the district in order to get my name on the ballot, and then we have to get the word out and build enough support to win so I can take on Fitzpatrick in the fall. With people like you by my side, I’m ready to kick this campaign into high-gear and take this critical House seat back from the GOP in November. Thanks again for fueling the work we do, and let’s keep it up! Ashley PS — One of the best ways you can support our campaign is by making a recurring donation to sustain us through Election Day. **[Will you sign up to make a monthly contribution of $5 or $10 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41359640/328454789/-1229619614?refcode=fl_email_na_20220202thankyou_ae_full_xx_l1&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzEwZjdlYi01ODg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEso8w9czsf8gaekN60xzpnkVAd_7eaXDDJMCIouMgg=)**
---
| Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them.

clean_body: | = Friend, I had to reach out and say THANK YOU! Thanks to this grassroots team, we not only reached our fundraising goal for January: we had our second-best month since we launched this campaign last October! I’m also thrilled to announce that last quarter’s fundraising numbers are in, and we officially raised more than any other Democratic candidate in this race, with 70% of our contributions coming from right here in PA! It just goes to show that the energy behind our movement to flip PA-01 blue is growing. We’re kicking 2022 off strong, and that’s exactly what we need as we start preparing for the May primary election. Soon, we’ll have to collect nomination petition signatures from registered Democrats across the district in order to get my name on the ballot, and then we have to get the word out and build enough support to win so I can take on Fitzpatrick in the fall. With people like you by my side, I’m ready to kick this campaign into high-gear and take this critical House seat back from the GOP in November. Thanks again for fueling the work we do, and let’s keep it up! Ashley PS — One of the best ways you can support our campaign is by making a recurring donation to sustain us through Election Day. = | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: urgent news:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#
Peter, I had to reach out:
**FIRST:** My potential opponent, Herschel Walker (R) just announced that he's raised nearly **$10 MILLION to defeat me** and retake the Senate for Mitch McConnell.
**THEN:** A new poll just came out that **shows me one point down** – in the race experts say could decide Senate control.
**NOW:** Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to climate justice and more – is on the line in this race. But if we fail to fight back now, we could risk handing this seat and our critical Senate majority right back to Mitch McConnell.
**That's why we set a goal to raise $50,000 by midnight tonight to fight back against GOP spending, pull ahead, and win this race. But time is running out, and we're still falling short.**
**[Please, Peter, I'm counting on you: Will you rush $20 or more right now to split between Patty Murray and my campaign so we can win in Georgia and defend our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41360180/328457855/-413977902?refcode=pm_em_220202_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjBlOWQ3Ni01YTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4yhY5oWPYw9WKP9Aii_XEdqYBe8CBq6lzn-428pRMrA=)**
Thank you, Peter. Our movement for change wouldn't be possible without your support.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock
** **

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41360183/328457858/-413977902?refcode=pm_em_220202_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjBlOWQ3Ni01YTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4yhY5oWPYw9WKP9Aii_XEdqYBe8CBq6lzn-428pRMrA=)****

clean_body: Peter, I had to reach out: FIRST: My potential opponent, Herschel Walker (R) just announced that he's raised nearly $10 MILLION to defeat me and retake the Senate for Mitch McConnell. THEN: A new poll just came out that shows me one point down – in the race experts say could decide Senate control. NOW: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to climate justice and more – is on the line in this race. But if we fail to fight back now, we could risk handing this seat and our critical Senate majority right back to Mitch McConnell. That's why we set a goal to raise $50,000 by midnight tonight to fight back against GOP spending, pull ahead, and win this race. But time is running out, and we're still falling short. = Thank you, Peter. Our movement for change wouldn't be possible without your support. – Rev. Raphael Warnock **= As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Friends of Dr. Bob
subject: Here's what Dr. Bob has been saying at Town Halls
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
, A topic Dr. Bob brings up a lot in his town halls – the balance between liberty and civic virtue. What is civic virtue and why is it important? **Here's a snippet from Dr. Bob's town hall speeches about the importance of Civic Virtue** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41360582/328459598/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmY5NDAyMy01Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gFlvdSEjZsrGLiSdgeEGyQVHRqqLo8ex55I6TEumzgs=) _**Dr. Bob is hitting the campaign trail hard, visiting communities across the Northern Lower Peninsula this week in a town hall tour. A central theme of his talks is the importance of civic virtue, an often forgotten principle on which our Constitution's framers founded our Republic.**_ [HELP US ELECT DR BOB](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41360583/328459599/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmY5NDAyMy01Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gFlvdSEjZsrGLiSdgeEGyQVHRqqLo8ex55I6TEumzgs=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41360584/328459600/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmY5NDAyMy01Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gFlvdSEjZsrGLiSdgeEGyQVHRqqLo8ex55I6TEumzgs=) [DONATE FOR INTEGRITY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41360585/328459601/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmY5NDAyMy01Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gFlvdSEjZsrGLiSdgeEGyQVHRqqLo8ex55I6TEumzgs=) When John F. Kennedy said, "Ask not what your country can do for you, but what you can do for your country," he was telling us we have a duty to the country, service, and the well-being of our fellow citizens. Our founders designed our Constitution and the American republic with liberty **and** civic virtue in mind. Protecting and advocating for both are essential to upholding democracy. **[Civic virtue](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41360586/328459602/-1475508956?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmY5NDAyMy01Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gFlvdSEjZsrGLiSdgeEGyQVHRqqLo8ex55I6TEumzgs=&emci=e54bef3c-5284-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=92f94023-5b84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=15167427)** describes the character of a good participant in a system of government —the personal qualities associated with the effective functioning of the civil and political order or the preservation of its values and principles. In the pursuit of liberties, too many politicians lose the principles of civic virtue - justice, wisdom, courage, and temperance – and push special-interest policies without the common good of the Nation in mind. **It's time to unelect those politicians, and replace them with leaders like Dr. Bob.**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41360587/328459603/-1488711019?fbclid=IwAR0IOsKRXSNxb6FiZdjNOkBwU_8vNDUx6lUNiMUMVr84R7em2uAJE6GI204&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmY5NDAyMy01Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gFlvdSEjZsrGLiSdgeEGyQVHRqqLo8ex55I6TEumzgs=&emci=e54bef3c-5284-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=92f94023-5b84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=15167427) | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41360588/328459604/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmY5NDAyMy01Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gFlvdSEjZsrGLiSdgeEGyQVHRqqLo8ex55I6TEumzgs=)
_**Dr. Bob believes without civic virtue, our democracy, as our Founders described it, is threatened. Here's a snippet from his speeches this week:**_

**How close are we coming to losing our Democracy?**

**National surveys and polls should frighten all of us**.

* One in three Americans says they believe violence against the government can at times be justified.
* Forty percent of politically active members say the other party is evil, 60% say they are a threat.
* Just hearing the words of 'another civil war' is a sign of failure.
* Some of our retired military leaders are worried that the 'next coup' will come from within and are sharing profoundly disturbing concerns about the stability of civility

**What happened? Something is wrong. We are not each other's enemies. **

We are all Americans wishing for better jobs, a more robust economy, and a better life for our families.
* So, let us stop it. Let us work together, not separately.
* Let us agree on the goals and then civilly debate, finding the right policies and programs to make it a reality.
* That is what Senators and Representatives should do.
* That is why we elected them.
* Let us show the Nation and the world how Democracy works.

**I believe it is Time to End Angry Opposition**

It seems all too common in Congress today to be angry. To be opposed to whatever the other party believes even if we advocated for it previously. Angry opposition needs to be replaced with calm goal-directed collaboration and cooperation.

We need to return winning an election by persuading the voters that you are the better candidate with the better policies based on facts, not fiction.

**The survival of our Democracy will depend on:**
* Ending political polarization and party tribalism.
* Eliminating conflict over who belongs as a member of a political community, especially by race, income, or educational status.
* Decreasing economic inequality.
* Reducing excessive executive power.

We must work hard to maintain and nurture the freedoms that Democracy gives us. It isn't a gift but a precious resource that demands our attention."
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41360589/328459605/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmY5NDAyMy01Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gFlvdSEjZsrGLiSdgeEGyQVHRqqLo8ex55I6TEumzgs=)
|
---
Dr. Bob believes it is vital voters understand his fundamental principles, which direct his decision-making. His bedrock of principles – Wisdom, Justice, Courage, Kindness, Democratic freedom, and Equality under the law – has been shared by most great states persons throughout history.

"I won't match their achievements," said Dr. Bob. "But I will be honored to try."
[HELP US ELECT A REAL LEADER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41360590/328459606/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmY5NDAyMy01Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gFlvdSEjZsrGLiSdgeEGyQVHRqqLo8ex55I6TEumzgs=)

name: Gwen Moore
subject: What Black History Month means to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
Today, my Sisters and Brothers, at the dawn of the 2022 Black History Month, I feel a strong calling to share something very personal with you. Raising my children as a single, Black woman was anything but easy. "Hard" doesn't scratch the surface. Yes, I relied on food stamps to feed my babies. Yes, I don't know what I would have done had it not been for Medical Assistance when it came to their healthcare. But at the same time, yes, I do know that a single Black woman can rise up, run for elected office to address the inequality and unjust systems in our nation, and that same Black woman, me – Gwendolynne Moore, can even be elected to the United States House of Representatives. My children are all grown up now, and I couldn't be prouder of them. Black History Month isn't just some "month" that we mark on our calendars; it's a month (and every day for me personally) to reflect on the perseverance, determination, and never-ending mission of the United States of America: we are ALL equal before the law. Looking into my children's eyes, I am thankful they did not have to go through what I did. While at the same time, I am energized to fight for them and their children to fulfill the dream of this grand democratic American experiment and guarantee equality for all. While we reflect upon the progress of Black Americans, we must do better in the days, weeks, and months to come. We owe it to our children and the UNITED States of America. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41360664/328460093/-1250824159?refcode=020222&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzBhNTI0OC01Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IrA_mx2gokrtXbaHnyaPG5r4Kc18rP4HSn4XKa7HMhw=)

This weekend, when former President Trump announced he would consider pardoning January 6th rioters if elected back to office, I was reminded of how important it is that we elect leaders who will defend our democracy and stand up for what’s right.

| Team,

First, I want to thank everyone who helped us reach our goal of 1,000 online contributions in the first month of the election year. We can’t build a winning campaign without supporters like you on our team, and I couldn’t be more grateful.

This weekend, when former President Trump announced he would consider pardoning January 6th rioters if elected back to office, I was reminded of how important it is that we elect leaders who will defend our democracy and stand up for what’s right.

[I firmly believe that those who sought to overthrow our democracy on January 6th must be held accountable, but so far Nancy Mace refuses to denounce Trump’s remarks. I need 5,000 supporters to demand Mace’s outspoken opposition to Trump’s plan:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41360722/328460322/702181211?refcode=AA_EM_SV_3MO_220202_1_1&refcode2=&contactdata=cu%2FC%2BcAcbOjr4M7Wke3HOdR757rNeekZ8LipupzMefkQV4TDQln%2BvpC7h6JcilvG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2U1MzE1Yy01Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8oJjjWztBcuN61qDYJHCsO5Kb6gPbrkU8zf0eB75YTs=&emci=d985b838-5b84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=a7e5315c-5b84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6125529)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6786%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=%2bxgpyBaVnWXVTlYpVfYG7A&sysid=1)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up--that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69871%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wDjDGQoCYWvjVq90kolS4g&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69872%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Kv8FJs847CVPZWVtrZPx%2bg&sysid=1)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69873%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ywLuwHhxcAPHSNTrGQwing&sysid=1) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69874%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C74axbIXvpaoNAgAoxKhPA&sysid=1) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

| _Copyright(C) 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6786%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=%2bxgpyBaVnWXVTlYpVfYG7A&sysid=1)_

|
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6786%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=%2bxgpyBaVnWXVTlYpVfYG7A&sysid=1)
