name: Cheryl Stephens (via NanWhaley.com)
subject: Today is filing day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
This afternoon, we officially join the ballot.

Today’s a big day for us, team. **This afternoon, we’re making it official and filing to officially join the ballot for Ohio.**
I couldn’t be more proud to stand with Nan at this historic moment. For too long, corruption has run rampant in Ohio. Now, we have the chance to change that.
**[Please – chip in $5 right now and help elect a governor who will build a stronger, better Ohio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41361602/328464070/407763255?refcode=nw_em_220202_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTM0NDc2Zi01Zjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zfgf0w6zbTStZH_XAiCPWiZACKuYty3m5oguNtex7_k=)**
It couldn’t be more clear that Mike DeWine and his special interest friends have only their own interests at heart, and in the process they’ve pushed people to the sidelines in favor of power.
**But we can change that.** I worked hard in Akron, Cleveland, and Canton to fight for Ohio families, and I watched as Nan made life better in Dayton. I know firsthand that when people come together, we can accomplish anything – from creating good-paying jobs for Ohioans, to investing in local infrastructure all over Ohio, to strengthening our schools.
To do that, we have to win this race – and that starts today, when we file our petitions with the Ohio Secretary of State.
**[Before we make it official this afternoon, can we count on your support to help send _two_ strong forward thinking Ohio mayors to Columbus this fall? Every single dollar will make a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41361603/328464071/407763255?refcode=nw_em_220202_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTM0NDc2Zi01Zjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zfgf0w6zbTStZH_XAiCPWiZACKuYty3m5oguNtex7_k=)**
We’re so grateful to be fighting with you.
Thank you,
Cheryl Stephens

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41361604/328464072/407763255?refcode=nw_em_220202_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTM0NDc2Zi01Zjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zfgf0w6zbTStZH_XAiCPWiZACKuYty3m5oguNtex7_k=)****

name: John Fetterman
subject: Six more weeks of…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
None of this would be possible without you.
#
Derek,
Today the world’s most famous groundhog and Pennsylvania hero, Punxsutawney Phil, predicted six more weeks of winter. 😩 No matter to me (I'm just gonna keep wearing shorts), but I figured you could use some good news.
So I wanted to reach out personally after our very first monthly deadline of 2022 to say this: **Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU!!!** 🙏
Because of every single grassroots donor who chipped in last month, we were able to reach our *first* goal of our big election year.
Building early momentum for any campaign is important, Derek — but what I'm most proud of is that we're running this thing the right way. I mean it when I say this is real, people-powered stuff.
**TL;DR: This team is the absolute best — and none of this would be possible without you, Derek.**
Thank you again,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. To celebrate today, here's a photo of Gisele and me (kind of) at the 2020 Groundhog Day celebration.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42848?refcode=ema20220202-4424&t=1&akid=4424%2E434096%2EcKOZ6K)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42848?refcode=em20220202-4424&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4424%2E434096%2EcKOZ6K)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220202-4424-footer&t=3&refcode2=4424_434096_cKOZ6K&akid=4424%2E434096%2EcKOZ6K)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=4&akid=4424%2E434096%2EcKOZ6K)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=4424%2E434096%2EcKOZ6K)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Grassroots fundraising works.

OMG Peter!

Jessica Mason’s election is just __**four weeks**__ away, and we have some exciting news for you.

Jessica 2021 fundraising numbers are finalized and she has proven that small dollar, grassroots donations are a critical tool. Here’s what Jessica was able to accomplish without taking ANY corporate PAC money: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41361898/328465690/1615796118?refcode=220202_FR_jmfundraising_IMG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlMDdmZjkzLTYxODQtZWMxMS05NGY2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qi-lwXdrh6QevUesgk4ZSdrDPDkcuDfSAWREOKgzhNU=) Those $5 and $10 donations are what help candidates like Jessica win. She is a working-class veteran with a fraction of the wealth of other candidates in this race. Jessica doesn’t have thousands of dollars of personal savings to dump into her campaign; she has put in the work and raised money $10, $20, and $50 at a time. Jessica isn’t in this race to climb a political totem pole. She is a daughter of Dallas, and she is here to represent the district she grew up in.

When we support and uplift progressive low-income candidates, policies better reflect the needs of the community.

**Jessica’s election is less than four weeks away.**

She has the momentum to win, but she needs you to help her get across the finish line.

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Looking for 25,000 people to say they support Mark’s bill banning members of Congress from buying and selling stocks.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Members of Congress should not be buying and selling stocks while in office.
#

Friends —
Members of Congress should not be buying and selling stocks while in office.
If you agree with that simple, commonsense idea, we are looking for 25,000 people to say they support the legislation introduced by Mark Kelly and Jon Ossoff last month.
Add your name before Congress considers the bill:
[**Sign Mark Kelly’s petition — say you support his legislation banning elected officials from buying and selling stocks while serving in Congress.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/stocks-petition?source=em220202-1-subs&t=1&akid=2054%2E6688874%2EtMfd_U)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/stocks-petition?source=em220202-1-subs&t=2&akid=2054%2E6688874%2EtMfd_U)**
In the Senate, Mark has seen firsthand how the information that elected leaders receive can influence policy, the economy, and entire industries.
If we want these leaders to work for the people — and not their stock portfolios — then we need to end corrupt insider trading in Congress.
This bill has support from Democrats, Independents, and Republicans all across America.
They just need to hear us in Washington.
That’s why we’re looking for a HUGE number of people to say it’s time to get it done.
Add your name if you agree:
[**Sign Mark Kelly’s petition — say you support his legislation banning elected officials from buying and selling stocks while serving in Congress.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/stocks-petition?source=em220202-1-subs&t=3&akid=2054%2E6688874%2EtMfd_U)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/stocks-petition?source=em220202-1-subs&t=4&akid=2054%2E6688874%2EtMfd_U)**
Thank you for making your voice heard.
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=2054%2E6688874%2EtMfd_U).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Study: Whitmer's Lockdowns Didn't Work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
According to researchers at Johns Hopkins University, Gretchen Whitmer’s lockdowns had little to no impact on Covid deaths. | | | |
---
| | | _Washington Times, January 31, 2022_
### Lockdowns had little or no impact on COVID-19 deaths, new study shows
---
|
---
| Peter:

I had planned to write to you today about the state of our education system in Michigan, but a blockbuster new study was just released that I feel must be addressed.

According to [researchers at Johns Hopkins University](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=5487dbbb34&e=0636b97700), Gretchen Whitmer’s lockdowns had little to no impact on Covid deaths.

[_The Washington Times_](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=4d8795d3f4&e=0636b97700) reports that researchers wrote, “We find no evidence that lockdowns, school closures, border closures, and limiting gatherings have had a noticeable effect on COVID-19 mortality.”

**Think about that.**

Governor Whitmer shut down our economy putting thousands out of work for what?

According to the study, the lockdown had devastating effects.

“They have contributed to reducing economic activity, raising unemployment, reducing schooling, causing political unrest, contributing to domestic violence, and undermining liberal democracy.”

This isn’t from some random Facebook commenter. This is from respected researchers at one of the most prestigious hospitals in the world.

**They further concluded that limited gatherings actually INCREASED COVID-19 mortality**.

This is from the report: “Lockdowns have limited peoples’ access to safe (outdoor) places such as beaches, parks, and zoos, or included outdoor mask mandates or strict outdoor gathering restrictions, pushing people to meet at less safe (indoor) places. Indeed, we do find some evidence that limiting gatherings was counterproductive and increased COVID-19 mortality.”

Peter, as I’ve been saying for that past two years, Whitmer has no clue what she’s doing.

She’s [illegally imposed reckless policies](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=f95e9df565&e=0636b97700) that have destroyed lives.

She [caused untold deaths by forcing nursing homes to accept COVID-19 patients](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=88839c58ae&e=0636b97700), then **covered up deaths** by [underreporting them by 42%](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=a919aeb4f9&e=0636b97700).

And, she’s shown herself to be the ultimate hypocrite by [violating her own lockdown and masking orders](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=64df5cdae6&e=0636b97700).

It’s clearly time for Whitmer to go.

If you’re as fed up as I am, join me. Together we can Dump Whitmer and Fix Michigan.

I’ve put all my chips in the middle of the table. I’m all in. Are you?

We can rebuild our economy, restore the lost jobs, and restore our state to greatness.

_But I need your help to do this._

**Please consider making a generous donation today. $5, $50, $500.** Any amount helps to get us the resources we need to win this race and Fix Michigan.

The momentum is building. The case against Whitmer is clear.

Make a donation today, then volunteer to help.

Thank you.

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor
---
| [DONATE TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE TODAY](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=344e0567ec&e=0636b97700 "DONATE TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE TODAY")

---

name: Maggie Toulouse Oliver
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie, Robert Lara Treasurer
body:
The birthday card from you was incredible.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41362378/328469192/1946438321?refcode=EM_C_220202MTOBdayTY_H_TEAM_30DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2ZkMzliMy02Mjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Det5qpLgfk6dGmaqhNdiele3s3d49dXDwZZ_DOexDRI=&emci=31397c17-4880-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=f7fd39b3-6284-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=3583156)
Team,

Thank you so much for my birthday card. I feel so blessed to be fighting for voting rights here in New Mexico, and receiving the card meant the world to me.

I want you to know that I have your back. Now more than ever, I am committed to moving our state forward – and it’s vitally important that we make sure our elections are accessible to all New Mexicans. Here’s what we’re doing in my office:
* Increasing transparency rules for financial disclosure and campaign finance reporting.
* Modernizing the online campaign finance system.
* Helping craft and pass good-government legislation like same-day voter registration, automated voter registration, and the state’s newly-formed Ethics Commission.

Thank you for being there. Your support is everything to me.
Let’s do this,

Maggie
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy!**_ _**______[FIND OUT MORE!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41362379/328469193/1946438321?refcode=EM_C_220202MTOBdayTY_H_TEAM_30DO_5_NG_N_BIO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2ZkMzliMy02Mjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Det5qpLgfk6dGmaqhNdiele3s3d49dXDwZZ_DOexDRI=&emci=31397c17-4880-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=f7fd39b3-6284-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=3583156)**_

The cost of child care is too high. For families across Wisconsin, costs are rising above the price of in-state college tuition. But just last week, Senator Ron Johnson told a journalist that parents “decide to have families,” and that tackling child care costs is not his problem.

Deb strongly disagrees. Children are our future – their care and education _matter_. We think Ron Johnson is wrong. Child care should be affordable and accessible. As a mom of three, Deb understands just how critical affordable and accessible child care is to working parents across Wisconsin. Parents should never have to decide between making rent and caring for their children.

Not to mention, Deb knows the success of our economy depends on our families succeeding. As we face labor shortages, parents need affordable child care to get back to work and get our economy back on track.

When we have stronger families, we have a stronger Wisconsin. **Do you agree? Should child care across Wisconsin be affordable and accessible for everyone?**
****[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41362687/328471722/495862226?refcode=ea.2936b7bd-6384-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.2936b7bd-6384-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTM2YjdiZC02Mzg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jZucC4OC2e76Y3BWnWj_DNtRjd-y3ANV14i65BRfQis=&emci=cc1f2143-6184-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=2936b7bd-6384-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=5944225)****

Subject: Why I went to Cicero, IL at 4am this morning Team, Workers fighting in solidarity are my superheroes. Both of my parents are in unions, my dad is a Teamster, and my mom is SEIU Local 73. **So when I heard that Amazon workers in Cicero, IL were walking out at 4am today to fight for their right to unionize,**[**I knew I had to be there in solidarity.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhlkzDVz-IUuFiAvYTVo2U-kjMZw1cEJcrBjL1n0B_57PxWkfyWGZwDRLwDMOyeJgUPhnrW9lypPsxqL3RNCTUzqX0H1S3JEuAY2m9-TYmcY_vkj8dSGEBMaTgFgkDUlcLECAZcGGHmdNFQ7O5p9U0h-HPP1NmvaJE3Dg985GzxN5WtnC1tcLjNE5Xjuuutz_Sqls7f-TvhXq_YX8tWQOvABEM9qxyHyGlmK7xBDQRqtQwForLMcM_2qbom5qOdn1VvROtrdxq9QXvqlqsLzfWKYcyhRry8ko8fI_D_36d_wh7Gw2hlV2u0-jLFoEKDme_-Ti6u76OJIH38DuTn2yJ88/3j8/4oTwwEzSTf-NU5fQHyN17w/h4/IS8-O2II4YfOukAdg5rLk_N69uzZZlvEwiJQyQiIOR4)**** For me the question was not why go, it was why would anyone seeking to represent working class voters in Congress ever consider staying home. Fellow American,

I wanted to reach out to you today and give you an update on my campaign for Governor of Texas.

We have received an outpouring of support and thank you for helping us reach 15,000 donations to our campaign. But we cannot slow down - the current Governor is FAILING the people of Texas.

name: Dan Kildee
subject: thank you so much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Wow — thank you.

I am blown away by supporters like you who stepped up in a big way during our critical fundraising push last month.

We’re now running in a competitive “toss-up” race that will determine control of Congress this year.

Because of redistricting, this is the toughest election I’ve faced — and I’m going to need every bit of support I can get. National Republicans are already running ads against me and that is only going to escalate as we get closer to Election Day.

**We’re ready for this race — but your help is what drives our campaign’s momentum.**

In Congress, I am focused on strengthening domestic supply chains to help lower costs for families. I helped write and pass the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law to rebuild Michigan’s roads, repair bridges, replace lead pipes and expand high-speed broadband internet. And I’m leading the fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs and ensure affordable and clean drinking water for all, free from PFAS chemicals and lead.

**As I set out to introduce myself to 150,000+ new voters in the new Eighth Congressional District, your support is critical to ensuring we can communicate my record to them and win.**

Thanks for all you do,

Dan

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jahmal=20Cole?=
subject: Lesson from Khammur
body:
I though I was teaching my daughter about democracy. Really, she was teaching me. | | |
#### FEBRUARY NEWSLETTER
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b9b816b5bd47/lesson-from-khammur?e=339f142c50)
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
### A Note from Jahmal
I can’t think of a better way to kick off Black History Month than with a post about my eleven year old daughter, Khammur. We spent this past weekend in the field pretty much campaigning. We went to a meeting organized by 10 pastors in South Shore. Even though one of their assistants turned on a tv in another room for my daughter to watch cartoons, she still took notes on the questions around women’s equal pay.

We also stood out in front of Jewel Osco and collected signatures to get on the ballot, stopped by Powells Bookstore in Hyde Park, Dat Donuts in Chatham and then we went swimming--which is what Khammur had suggested we do in the first place. All I kept thinking about was how cold the water would be, how she’d forgotten her swim suit, how I was nervous about her swimming in 5ft of water, etc. but once we got in the pool, it was a lot of fun. She’s a great swimmer. She can swim in multiple styles and we literally had a blast playing patty cake games and talking.

After we got out of the pool Kammy gave me a speech about everything in the campaign and told me “I think you’re doing a great job. You’re confident and no matter what you keep on going.” The way she pointed at me with a hand gesture meant everything. Here I was thinking I was teaching her something special about participating in democracy and the whole time she was teaching me something way more important. How to both perservere and be present. Yours in service,

Jahmal Cole

subject: Thank You

body:
Mark Holland is running for US Senate because Kansas and America deserve a strong, courageous leader who leads with faith, speaks the truth, and is willing to stand up to extremists across the political spectrum. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/62b451c0-6584-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/e3291609-6784-ec11-94f6-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzI5MTYwOS02Nzg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kzOx6sDLQMPqfBK9lUaSkxnx-GI84CPz9rIBLWJd_sk=&id=103697760)

| I want to thank you.

When we launched this campaign only a few months ago, I asked you to share my vision to make Kansas better, and dedicated myself to making tangible, positive changes for Kansas through effective bipartisan solutions.

Now we are surging ahead towards the 2022 midterms with a lot more than just a dream. We have an incredible foundation made of grassroots supporters, like you! That's what makes this campaign so special... **_It's powered by the people._**

Even if you weren’t able to donate this time, I cannot thank you enough for your support and involvement in my campaign. If you want to learn more about why I’m running and where I stand, please join me in conversation on Twitter and Facebook.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jahmal=20Cole?=
subject: Lesson from Khammur
body:
I thought I was teaching my daughter about democracy. Really, she was teaching me. | | |
#### FEBRUARY NEWSLETTER
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/987935bb6434/lesson-from-khammur-6739613?e=339f142c50)
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
### A Note from Jahmal
I can’t think of a better way to kick off Black History Month than with a post about my eleven year old daughter, Khammur. We spent this past weekend in the field pretty much campaigning. We went to a meeting organized by 10 pastors in South Shore. Even though one of their assistants turned on a tv in another room for my daughter to watch cartoons, she still took notes on the questions around women’s equal pay.

We also stood out in front of Jewel Osco and collected signatures to get on the ballot, stopped by Powells Bookstore in Hyde Park, Dat Donuts in Chatham and then we went swimming--which is what Khammur had suggested we do in the first place. All I kept thinking about was how cold the water would be, how she’d forgotten her swim suit, how I was nervous about her swimming in 5ft of water, etc. but once we got in the pool, it was a lot of fun. She’s a great swimmer. She can swim in multiple styles and we literally had a blast playing patty cake games and talking.

After we got out of the pool Kammy gave me a speech about everything in the campaign and told me “I think you’re doing a great job. You’re confident and no matter what you keep on going.” The way she pointed at me with a hand gesture meant everything. Here I was thinking I was teaching her something special about participating in democracy and the whole time she was teaching me something way more important. How to both perservere and be present. Yours in service,

Jahmal Cole
---
|
---
|
---
|
---

Check out what we're calling "Jahmal's Jewels" -- and if you can! We've also kicked off our initiative called "Kitchen Table Discussions." Here is with the Duggan Sisters in Beverly. | | | CAMPAIGN NEWS | I am committed to making sure the people of the First District are my top priority when we're in D.C. To make sure that happens, I signed the Sunrise Movement's pledge to fight for the Green New Deal and took the #NoFossilFuels pledge. | | Keep up with the campaign on our website using the "" tab. Watch my on their "Save our Streets" special. Read this about the field and my position in it. | | GET INVOLVED | | | | | We're always looking for volunteers! Sign up . Want to host a fundraiser for the campaign? Let's make it happen! Contact us . | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Friends of Jahmal Cole, All rights reserved.

name: Madison Horn  for Oklahoma
subject: Madison on the Move!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
We here at Team Madison have been busy since launching the campaign! Madison's objective is to meet and hear from as many people in our state—both rural and urban—as possible.

Because we are committed to building a more united Oklahoma, we have been crisscrossing the state non-stop!

Right now, we want to share some highlights from the campaign trail:

Shootin' the Breeze Fundraiser
Former Governors Henry, Nigh, and Walters (who announced our campaign for Senate!) hosted this event. It was a great opportunity to get energized for the months ahead and meet some phenomenal leaders who continue to fight for Oklahomans.

Edmond Women Christmas Party
Edmond Women are a fierce, witty, and caring group dedicated to making Oklahoma a better, more equal place.
At their party, they collected donations for CAIR, which supports Afghan refugees, and were proud to contribute!

Adair County, Hometown Visit!
Madison’s home county! Adair county is named after a prominent Cherokee family. In fact, the Cherokee Tribe is one of the largest employers in all of northeastern Oklahoma.
When she is in the Senate, Madison aims to promote the needs of our tribal nations—the Cherokee, Chickasaw, Choctaw, and Seminole—and demand they get the respect they deserve.

Organizing Donations for Foxcroft Apartments
Since September, residents living in the Foxcroft apartments, including children and infants, have been without heat. We banded together ahead of a major freeze to get the needed supplies, including space heaters, blankets, and winter clothes.
We got local communities engaged, resulting in all the children getting coats and the inflated electric bills covered by a local business! (Thank you, Edmond Women, Paycom, Western County Schools, and Team Madison, for your dedication to our community!)

... Along with a number of advocacy events, supporting other Democratic candidates, like Joy Hofimester for Governor, supporting the YWCA to raise money to combat domestic violence, supporting Women in Tech and joining up with our National Committee State delegates across Oklahoma...

Join us! We’re building a movement of everyday Oklahomans doing what’s right. Here’s how to support Madison’s campaign:

VOLUNTEER [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hjt1QVhsSUelBkPwACm5oQ2]

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/madison-fr-jan22?amount=10&contactdata=3ROJtU%2FJpEbF0IqWo2djmhRamx0P1yyXsbTIEaUwSnBlA0QoJ9yjBKcZGGm3oqa7Y1ShGZzkcMguEHKMNZNKWTOKY2CGEL0Fd7H4v6n54U4%3D&refcode2=81a61ed8-6784-ec11-94f6-281878b85110]

Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/madisonhorn.ok/] |
Twitter [https://twitter.com/madisonhornok] |
Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/madisonhorn.ok/]

— Team Madison

CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/madison-em-footer?amount=10&recurring=true&contactdata=3ROJtU%2FJpEbF0IqWo2djmhRamx0P1yyXsbTIEaUwSnBlA0QoJ9yjBKcZGGm3oqa7Y1ShGZzkcMguEHKMNZNKWTOKY2CGEL0Fd7H4v6n54U4%3D&refcode2=81a61ed8-6784-ec11-94f6-281878b85110]
CONTRIBUTE ONCE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/madison-em-footer?amount=10&contactdata=3ROJtU%2FJpEbF0IqWo2djmhRamx0P1yyXsbTIEaUwSnBlA0QoJ9yjBKcZGGm3oqa7Y1ShGZzkcMguEHKMNZNKWTOKY2CGEL0Fd7H4v6n54U4%3D&refcode2=81a61ed8-6784-ec11-94f6-281878b85110]

Our country is facing major challenges that demand action from servant leaders to work together to build on America’s legacy. Madison is running for Senate to work towards the promise of the American dream and represent Oklahomans who have been left behind by self-serving politicians. Together, united by a common set of values, we can work to fight inequities, secure and defend our country, and build a better future. Help support her campaign by donating now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/madison-em-footer?amount=10&contactdata=3ROJtU%2FJpEbF0IqWo2djmhRamx0P1yyXsbTIEaUwSnBlA0QoJ9yjBKcZGGm3oqa7Y1ShGZzkcMguEHKMNZNKWTOKY2CGEL0Fd7H4v6n54U4%3D&refcode2=81a61ed8-6784-ec11-94f6-281878b85110]

Click here to unsubscribe from Madison Horn's email list. [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0447da96-6784-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/81a61ed8-6784-ec11-94f6-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWE2MWVkOC02Nzg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_B8CQDIaaQw8kcQho8Ney6yHdUNV06arwqKnTpAzJc=&id=106966782]

name: Jessica Mason
subject: It always traces back to corporate-backed interests
body:
Texans are bracing themselves for the winter storm today.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41363593/328475748/-1288899752?refcode=220202_FR_winterpowergrid_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjNlNjE2ZS02ODg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-cCemhIJgrirHHJnSz27n3pF5lBYatKTWC_bK-QxjtU=)
---
Team, Texans are bracing themselves for the impending winter storm that is expected to hit today and last through the week.

Our state’s lack of preparedness last year demonstrated how faulty and unreliable our grid system is — with Winter Storm Uri claiming 210 confirmed deaths (although analysis suggests the death toll was actually closer to 702.)

We deserve better than a dangerously unreliable power grid that puts folks without heat, power, or access to vital resources. I have seen the devastation that lack of preparation has caused on too many families and individuals in danger, so I’m committed to green investments in our grid to help save lives. **[Will you donate now to help me prioritize the safety of Texans and address the failing power grid as a public health issue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41363594/328475749/-1288899752?refcode=220202_FR_winterpowergrid_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjNlNjE2ZS02ODg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-cCemhIJgrirHHJnSz27n3pF5lBYatKTWC_bK-QxjtU=)** **______[PITCH IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41363595/328475750/-1288899752?refcode=220202_FR_winterpowergrid_BIO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjNlNjE2ZS02ODg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-cCemhIJgrirHHJnSz27n3pF5lBYatKTWC_bK-QxjtU=)** What’s worse than the actual crumbling infrastructure of the power grid itself is the fact that it was revealed after Uri that **_state regulators and lawmakers KNEW about the grid’s dangerous functions for YEARS._** And instead of investing resources to fix it, **they chose to serve corporate-backed special interests with the electricity companies.** Mainstream news outlets have already crowned a front-runner in this race who has taken money from the same energy company considered to be the main culprit behind last year's fatal power grid failure, _**but I proudly refuse to accept any corporate donations.**_ Not from the fossil fuel industry, not from Big Pharma, not from medical insurance giants, not from telecoms conglomerates. Not a penny.

No corporate money means that I’m only accountable to serving _**YOU**_. Otherwise, how can you trust that my opponent or other candidates wouldn’t put people’s livelihoods on the line for a fat payout?

**[So that means that every grassroots dollar makes a HUGE difference in this people-powered campaign. Please donate anything you can today so that I can defeat corporate greed and corruption that has put lives in danger. Chip in now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41363596/328475751/-1288899752?refcode=220202_FR_winterpowergrid_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjNlNjE2ZS02ODg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-cCemhIJgrirHHJnSz27n3pF5lBYatKTWC_bK-QxjtU=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ************[**$10 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41363597/328475752/-1288899752?refcode=220202_FR_winterpowergrid_EL10&amount=10&refcode2=EL10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjNlNjE2ZS02ODg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-cCemhIJgrirHHJnSz27n3pF5lBYatKTWC_bK-QxjtU=)************

clean_body: Texans are bracing themselves for the winter storm today. | | | = Team, Texans are bracing themselves for the impending winter storm that is expected to hit today and last through the week. Our state’s lack of preparedness last year demonstrated how faulty and unreliable our grid system is — with Winter Storm Uri claiming 210 confirmed deaths (although analysis suggests the death toll was actually closer to 702.) We deserve better than a dangerously unreliable power grid that puts folks without heat, power, or access to vital resources. I have seen the devastation that lack of preparation has caused on too many families and individuals in danger, so I’m committed to green investments in our grid to help save lives. = ____= What’s worse than the actual crumbling infrastructure of the power grid itself is the fact that it was revealed after Uri that state regulators and lawmakers KNEW about the grid’s dangerous functions for YEARS. And instead of investing resources to fix it, they chose to serve corporate-backed special interests with the electricity companies. Mainstream news outlets have already crowned a front-runner in this race who has taken money from the same energy company considered to be the main culprit behind last year's fatal power grid failure, but I proudly refuse to accept any corporate donations. Not from the fossil fuel industry, not from Big Pharma, not from medical insurance giants, not from telecoms conglomerates. Not a penny. No corporate money means that I’m only accountable to serving YOU. Otherwise, how can you trust that my opponent or other candidates wouldn’t put people’s livelihoods on the line for a fat payout? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | **********=******** ******** ******** | | **********=********** | **********=********** ******** ******** | | **********=********** | **********=********** ******** ******** | | **********=********** ******** ******** Together, we can defeat corporate interests in politics, but we must fully commit to electing leaders who reflect our people-first values. Thanks for having my back, Jessica = **********************EXPRESS DONATE to Jessica Mason for Congress******************** ********************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:******************** ********************= "="******************** | ********************= "="******************** | ********************= "="******************** | ********************= "="******************** ---|---|---|--- Jessica Mason was born and raised in Dallas and has experienced firsthand the socioeconomic barriers and systemic inequities that impede the success of Texas working families. As a former Navy medic, Jessica received her Master's Degree in Public Administration so that she could pursue her passion for public service. She's running for Congress to represent Texas' 30th District because she's tired of seeing everyday people left behind. TX-30 deserves policies that are designed for the success of the people who live here. That starts with new leadership that sees our humanness and understands our struggles. And that starts right here, with Jessica Mason. = __= | || || ** Jessica Mason for Congress PO Box 271183 Dallas, TX 75227 United States | |

name: John James
subject: I need you as my Co-Pilot…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Congress, Inc
body:
It’s time to suit up, Co-Pilot. I'm John James, and I’m running for Congress here in Michigan, and I need you as my Co-P
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztcv94jmn1avpif7satlfnc26r90dmo225b61db8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j6co74cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8shie4om8sbgmcqm0tb2m2qj9p776pqe1o5im2q7cdtkedp36pb2cmrm8obj61jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8pmcdj2mdj3fdr1copb1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
**IT’S OFFICIAL JOHN JAMES IS RUNNING FOR CONGRESS!** [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuf3q15049ov7f7bcnamlsnrk98omn9ltmpr1hn8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j6co74cjh2bs) **[Co-Pilot, GET YOUR ‘LAUNCH DAY DIGITAL DONOR BADGE’ >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1gn3fn1o9rn6bi1k0bqd4vgeapebb0iv54qimbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j6co74cjh2bs)** | |
---
It’s time to suit up, Co-Pilot.

**I'm John James, and I’m running for Congress here in Michigan, and I need you as my Co-Pilot.**

I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution, and now we’re facing one of its greatest threats in our lifetime.
_**Faith. Family. Service. The American Dream.**_
These core tenants have always guided the American way of life, **and each one of them is at risk with our current leadership in government:**
❌ The DOJ weaponized against concerned parents for opposing critical race theory.
❌ Washington serving their own interests while abandoning our servicemen and women.
❌ Inflation and out-of-control spending are making the American Dream just that, a distant dream.
**Co-Pilot, I gave this speech at CPAC 2020 about my own family’s journey through the American Dream:**
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsffr40kul0dg5obonb96m7cn01aj0823mlntjto_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j6co74cjh2bs)
**We’re rapidly approaching an America where this won’t be true anymore, where the American Dream will be nothing more than a myth, and _where the only people who prosper are wealthy elites._**

We are at what President Reagan called _‘A Time for Choosing,’_ and we as a nation must choose which path we wish to follow.

**_I choose exceptionalism over entitlement... _**

**_I choose achievement over apathy..._**

**_I choose freedom over socialism..._**

**I refuse to let the American Dream die with our generationーI know the stakes are high, but I put my oath to protect our Republic above all else.**
**_
Now, I’m asking you to send me to Congress to do just that by investing a ‘Day 1 Donation’ towards my fight—[are you ready to fly?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0gsf4bh7d4202v4dmm0hkao7keu8g6u13k088g8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j6co74cjh2bs)
_**
[**TIME TO FLY!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrsv3c7abontr516nbna2hecgddv7m34r293mscg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j6co74cjh2bs)
Thank you,
John James

Team, the Jan 6 Committee has begun formally investigating GOP Representative and Georgia Secretary candidate Jody Hice for his actions leading up to the attack: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-membership-2022?amount=20&refcode=email_020222_2]

Source - The Beat with Ari Melber, MSNBC
Accountability is key to preserving our democracy and it starts with those responsible for the attack on our Capitol. But we can’t afford to take anything for granted. Right-wing extremists use this kind of news to rake in fundraising cash! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-membership-2022?amount=20&refcode=email_020222_2]
We CANNOT allow Hice anywhere near the Georgia Secretary of State office – will you rush $20 to help us defeat Hice this November? >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-membership-2022?amount=20&refcode=email_020222_2]
CHIP IN NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-membership-2022?amount=20&refcode=email_020222_2]
Haven’t heard of Jody Hice before? Here’s a quick intro. He’s Trump’s top choice to be the next GA Secretary of State, and he’s 100% in on the big lie. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-membership-2022?amount=20&refcode=email_020222_2]
When a radio host asked, “Do you think Trump won Georgia?” Hice responded, “Yeah, I mean, obviously.” [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-membership-2022?amount=20&refcode=email_020222_2]
Should he win this year, he will have control over certifying Georgia’s 2024 election results – and could overturn the election for Trump. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-membership-2022?amount=20&refcode=email_020222_2]
We can’t overstate the dangers Jody Hice poses to our democracy – we need to do everything in our power to defeat him and protect our democracy.
The best way of joining the fight against the big lie is supporting our Democratic Secretaries of State by becoming a 2022 member of DASS. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-membership-2022?amount=20&refcode=email_020222_2]

name: Liz Walters, Team ODP
subject: re: January's goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| Hey there,

I just want to take a moment to say: Thank you.

I know your inboxes were full over the last week with similar requests, but you still showed up for this team. Ensuring we stay on track to hit our monthly fundraising goals is no easy task, and thanks to your generous support, we were able to reach our January end-of-month fundraising goal!

Your continued support is a crucial part of our plan to flip Ohio blue in November. With you at our side, we will continue to build the infrastructure needed to flip Ohio's open Senate seat, take back the governor's office, hold onto the House majority, and elect Democrats to every level of office.

But I'll be honest, hitting our January end-of-month fundraising goal was only the beginning. We need to keep our eyes on the future. Republicans are working overtime to gerrymander our election maps in their favor, attack the right to choose, and stall progress under Joe Biden's administration -- and we have to keep fighting.

This month is going to be extremely crucial in our fight for Ohio's future. Republicans on the redistricting commission are working overtime on our legislative maps and, if they get their way, they'll gerrymander their way into another victory. We need to keep our focus on the long road ahead to Election Day, and I hope I can continue to count on your support.

Thank you,

Liz

Liz Walters
Chair
Ohio Democratic Party

The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open US Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. **Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio.** [DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/odp-february22?refcode=em22_220202_eomty_enask_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220202_eomty_enask_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Countdown to February 22
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate
body:
| |
---
Team, First, I want to say 'Thank You' for your generous support. Your contributions enabled us to meet our important first end-of-month fundraising goal of 2022! With Mitch McConnell actively recruiting Larry Hogan to jump into this Maryland Senate race to help Mitch try to flip the 50:50 Senate and become Majority Leader again, the stakes are incredibly high. As we saw one week ago on voting rights, Mitch McConnell is determined to stop all progress in the Senate. His single-minded goal is to regain control of the Senate and block Joe Biden's positive agenda. McConnell and his big special interest allies have proven over and over again that they will go to any length to advance an agenda that rewards their greed over the priorities and needs of the American people. **That’s why the next three weeks are so critical.** February 22nd is the deadline date for Larry Hogan to file the required paperwork to enter this Senate race against me. And we need to be ready for the very real possibility that he will jump in at any moment. name: =?utf-8?Q?Aaron=20Rice?=
subject: MJI - Onward to Victory!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8132284?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

When our clients’ constitutional rights are being violated and the political branches of government refuse to act, we take their fight to the courts. And we come to win.

That’s what state regulators are learning right now in **our lawsuit challenging Mississippi’s Certificate of Need (CON) laws and home health ban.**

**Our client is Butch Slaughter, a physical therapist who owns a clinic in south Jackson.** When COVID arrived, many of his patients stopped coming in. Even today, many are reluctant to come and cancellations are routine. He also knows that elderly patients need physical therapy now more than ever, as many seek to delay or prevent the need to receive care in nursing homes, which have been prone to outbreaks.

So, **Butch had a simple idea: he would open a home health agency so that he could provide care to patients in the comfort and privacy of their own homes.**
---
|
---
| **But it wasn’t so simple. It turns out that opening a home health agency in Mississippi is illegal, and has been for 40 years. Not because they are unsafe – several other home health agencies are operating in the state. Rather, they are illegal because the state government says more aren’t “needed.”**

Translation: the government is shielding existing home health businesses from competition. This, despite the fact that the demand for home health services has at least tripled since the state decided there was no more “need.”

Even if this ban were lifted, Butch would still have to apply for CON before he could open. His competitors would then get to drag him into court and make him spend tens of thousands of dollars to try to prove his business was “needed.”

**Imagine if we had told Netflix they weren’t “needed” because we already had Blockbuster.**

This racket doesn’t just affect Butch. It hurts all of us. If you have ever had to travel to find quality care or paid exorbitant prices for mediocre care: it’s likely that health care CON laws were to blame.
---
|
---
| **Multiple bills have been introduced to remove the home health ban and CON requirement, but the state legislature has taken no action. So Butch teamed up with the Mississippi Justice Institute, and we sued.**

**In response to our claims that these laws violate Butch’s constitutional rights, the government argued that our lawsuit should be dismissed out of hand because our claims weren’t even plausible. But recently, the federal judge overseeing the case disagreed and allowed the lawsuit to proceed.**

In his [order](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=e0c312e55b&e=5703353baa) denying the motion to dismiss, the judge notes that “It is no secret that significant financial interests are at stake when it comes to CON laws.” He explained that “Rent-seeking businesses make a sort-of ‘extra-legal’ contract with politicians: money and votes for the politicians, regulations that ensure a monopoly for the interest group. Meanwhile, consumers lose out. Without the market competition that normally regulates businesses’ behavior, the monopoly can charge otherwise unsustainably high prices for otherwise unsustainably mediocre products.”

In other words: pure cronyism.

This doesn’t necessarily mean that Butch will succeed in having the laws struck down. But **it does mean the government will actually have to defend the laws in court. At the Mississippi Justice Institute, we are looking forward to that fight.**
---
| |
---

In Liberty,

Aaron Rice
Director, Mississippi justice Institute

_Ps. Check out some of the recent news coverage of our lawsuit below!_
---
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f9829bd646&e=5703353baa)
---

body:
We need to defeat Andy Kim in November if we want to take back the House [](http://links.donatetohealey.com/u/click?_t=b85a497f2e8f41748b694630e904c604&_m=fe503187171e452286aaf111d99c984b&_e=YkTBvg0yMRkpVZqLxt50I6A5OzZhMvpxc9_5xdDJ069ZzWt7CdIbdfNQykYymxc6wNptaad5oBRvyu5-zhqyV3nQY3BdKsBvOpzWQie3qYHvTwQkiWFNcd8xcnRE_2gkU5RMLk9IBZILVyEuRUYsIe06XL3g-I1W0qqUnYTYihHkPbgv5oyyCb6OiNzgqT_fgvpLInlfx-zbwzPudTzc58KV7holLo_KiTk3ZL-cAbB33r752XiRGHonjfYiNL3fPZjQOrTcxKlwobIPcZhXTnQ4wZeA94rY5ZOocbv4Gkos--scZXD_Y5s8Xj_ecc9393H2MmHsi5_9Vl2lA2CgBi_ndZQKbQ9kxVdHxmfowZ272cV4IfzEHSJO_AT_23pazpzWWU6SvoRaQJ3ltjp9MzEVU--GJgDhkUqqaOzKv7smF6k_QINg7-O7ZuD4ixh21IYBJfDzSE07u9ddLWuC_yPqPtlryX8koT2Rw54hmgDMjhHMo9ZsJWMhRVNjgDwy) Friend, To put it mildly, things aren’t looking too great for Joe Biden right now. **A new YouGov poll shows Biden’s approval rating at just 38%, and honestly, we think that seems a bit high considering how bad things have become in America since he took office.** But Bob also wants to know what YOU think about the President. Do you approve of Biden? name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: Truckers on the Move, Freedom on the Rise! (This is how we win!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Machele Hamilton Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
Thousands of truckers and other protesters have converged on Parliament Hill in Ottawa, Canada, to call for an end to COVID-19 vaccine mandates. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/02-02-22?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=d8da5cae46&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | Dear Friends,
---
| Over the last week, thousands of truckers and other protesters have converged on Parliament Hill in Ottawa, Canada, to call for an end to COVID-19 vaccine mandates. Across the country, thousands of supporters have joined in to demonstrate against mandates and to cheer on the truckers who are taking a stand for individual liberty. Entrepreneur and Tesla founder Elon Musk [tweeted](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=212df1ca83&e=823fa8e224), "Canadian truckers rule" and added in a follow-up [tweet](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=714a073449&e=823fa8e224), "Freedom is being stripped away one piece at a time until it is gone." As encouraging as it is to see Canadians taking a stand against tyrannical mandates, word is growing that an even larger protest may be brewing here at home. Arizona State Senator Wendy Rogers [tweeted](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=d0fe70951d&e=823fa8e224) Monday, "I am hearing rumors US Truckers are trying to beat the Canadian Trucker numbers. Shooting for over 500k trucks starting in Cali going to DC. Let's gooooo...." Regardless of whether or not massive truck convoys descend on Washington D.C., the Canadian protests point to the value of peaceful — yet highly visible — activism. The simple fact is that **mandates have no place in a free society!** Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, and business shutdowns were never appropriate actions for governments, and that these infringements still exist today, even when the evidence overwhelmingly shows they don't work, is beyond reprehensible. Here in Idaho, I have stood against mandates since the beginning, taking action to ban them when I was Acting Governor. Unfortunately, Brad Little reversed my actions and reimposed these mandates on Idahoans, infringing on our liberty and leaving our "red" state looking more like California and New York than Florida or Texas. When Joe Biden visited Idaho and California on the same day last September, he told the folks in California that Brad Little, with whom he had had a private conversation earlier in the day, "was complimentary of your governor [Gavin Newsom] and that we had to have mandates for vaccinations." I speak with Idahoans every single day, and very few embrace Joe Biden and Brad Little's support for vaccine mandates. Instead, they agree with President Trump, who called on "MAGA nation" to "rise up and oppose" vaccine mandates, which he called "egregious federal government overreach." **This is just one of the reasons why President Trump endorsed me for Governor.** Personally, I am excited to see the growing opposition to mandates, not just in Idaho but across our country and around the globe. People are rising up and taking back their freedom from tyrannical politicians who have the audacity to believe they should have control over your personal medical choices! Idahoans have a great opportunity to boldly express their opposition to mandates in the upcoming primary election. The choice is simple. A vote for Janice McGeachin is a vote to **Make Idaho Free Again!** Do you want to do more for the cause of freedom? Our campaign needs [volunteers](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=18fd35d544&e=823fa8e224) and [donations](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=c9d554886e&e=823fa8e224) to spread our message to every corner of our state. Our message of freedom reaches new eyes and ears every day, but we need your help to reach everyone. Donating [$100](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=4f42c72f75&e=823fa8e224), [$50](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=bd51ace7d3&e=823fa8e224), or even [$20](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=bb4309270a&e=823fa8e224) makes a big difference. We must do everything we can to make sure no Idahoan is forced to lose their job or face discrimination because of their medical choices.
---
| [DONATE Today!](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=a77f633f13&e=823fa8e224 "DONATE Today!")
---
| Will you help us make Idaho the state that leads the way on personal freedom? I can't do it alone, but with your help we WILL prevail!
---
| Sincerely,

Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor
---
| **P.S.** Please [**DONATE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=26df5bc5b0&e=823fa8e224) if you are able, [**VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=721de9f448&e=823fa8e224) to see our unique merchandise, [**LIKE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=c86c7bfde1&e=823fa8e224) and [**FOLLOW**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=2aba1ab0ce&e=823fa8e224) us on social media, and [**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=1afeeb5646&e=823fa8e224) to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign.
---
| | | | | | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=7d62d70a1e&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=de87322da9&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=52f310448f&e=823fa8e224)
---
| [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=38316ada1b&e=823fa8e224)

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)Fellow American, By now, I'm sure you're as furious as I am with the White House's absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it's not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don't comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden's. And if we don't stand up against it now, there's no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [** _That's why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA's National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-R1Gw)[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we've launched a **"NO FORCED VAX"** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we're shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-lMRV-Q) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It's about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students -the least affected by the disease - must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we'll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you'll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._mHDIxPgDjh3k1WVXc78A)[**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-sty-g) Thank you for your support!For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDMzLTY1YTJjZWZhMTNiNzQ3ZmRiY2U0MGY4YThlMDQzNjljIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/vYF2kyqi2yYVbPUwW-uSvA) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Justin Lamorte, MichaelBennet.com
subject: "Red Wave for Senate Democrats?"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41364056/328477959/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yzk2NGMxNy02Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kD4cw8UXgOAQHEW8mh_ffz0NMWn_7SW6innK_iCr3yc=)
Thank you, team! Because of the hard work and dedication of grassroots supporters like you, we hit our January fundraising goal and are starting this important midterm election on good footing. Here’s why your support is absolutely critical to this team and to re-electing Michael: Recent changes in the political climate show we can't afford to lose momentum. Recently, a political analyst said this: _"The worst-case scenario for Democrats could mean four or more GOP Senate pickups, moving into the bluer parts of the map. That would entail Republican pickups in Arizona, Georgia, and Nevada, ... along with an upset in New Hampshire or Colorado. This is the ‘wave scenario’ that’s looking more likely."_ The experts are saying a “red wave” is in the cards this midterm election year due to our historically slim Senate majority. The National GOP raised over $104 million last year to do exactly that, so we can’t afford to lose one bit of momentum. We knew this race wouldn’t be easy but grassroots support, like yours, helps us strategize and fend off obstacles and attacks that come Michael’s way. I’m not trying to scare you or cause you to lose hope — that’s not how we do things — but it’s important that our most loyal supporters like you know what we’re up against, folks. We need to sustain this momentum as attacks against Michael directed by his wealthy opponents, Mitch McConnell, and the GOP come his way. We can’t let up now. clean_body: | = Thank you, team! Because of the hard work and dedication of grassroots supporters like you, we hit our January fundraising goal and are starting this important midterm election on good footing. Here’s why your support is absolutely critical to this team and to re-electing Michael: Recent changes in the political climate show we can't afford to lose momentum. Recently, a political analyst said this: "The worst-case scenario for Democrats could mean four or more GOP Senate pickups, moving into the bluer parts of the map. That would entail Republican pickups in Arizona, Georgia, and Nevada, ... along with an upset in New Hampshire or Colorado. This is the ‘wave scenario’ that’s looking more likely." The experts are saying a “red wave” is in the cards this midterm election year due to our historically slim Senate majority. The National GOP raised over $104 million last year to do exactly that, so we can’t afford to lose one bit of momentum. We knew this race wouldn’t be easy but grassroots support, like yours, helps us strategize and fend off obstacles and attacks that come Michael’s way. I’m not trying to scare you or cause you to lose hope — that’s not how we do things — but it’s important that our most loyal supporters like you know what we’re up against, folks. We need to sustain this momentum as attacks against Michael directed by his wealthy opponents, Mitch McConnell, and the GOP come his way. We can’t let up now. I’m grateful as always to have you on the team as we fight to protect our Senate majority and keep Colorado blue. Talk soon, Justin Justin Lamorte Campaign Manager Bennet for Colorado If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | **= ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

Hi Friend,
This is the year we break out of the cycle of fear, oppression, destruction, and lies. This is the year we reclaim our personal freedom and dignity.

How do I know?

Over the last several years I stood up to do what was right in the face of adversity. In 2021, trusted supporters like you helped us reach goal after goal, ensuring our campaign had the resources to grow stronger and gain momentum. In 2022, we are now **one step closer to restoring freedom and dignity for all people of Oregon!**

**This is OUR YEAR!

clean_body: | | | | Hi Friend, This is the year we break out of the cycle of fear, oppression, destruction, and lies. This is the year we reclaim our personal freedom and dignity. How do I know? Over the last several years I stood up to do what was right in the face of adversity. In 2021, trusted supporters like you helped us reach goal after goal, ensuring our campaign had the resources to grow stronger and gain momentum. In 2022, we are now one step closer to restoring freedom and dignity for all people of Oregon! This is OUR YEAR! To celebrate our campaign success, | | | | | This is our year! It is time for Oregonians to reclaim their freedom and dignity! Thank you for standing with me, Friend. Together, we can turn socialism on its head! Best wishes, Marc Thielman | JOIN US | | | | ELEGRAM_ PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE Marc For Oregon P.O. Box 95, Bend, 97709

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41364150/328478142/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzk2NGMxNy02Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGcKtw0qSRtip06OlHaq5Yz6LzNPxwZb8E3kIs-guVE=&emci=8d347d29-a282-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=a3964c17-6b84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41364152/328478144/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzk2NGMxNy02Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGcKtw0qSRtip06OlHaq5Yz6LzNPxwZb8E3kIs-guVE=&emci=8d347d29-a282-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=a3964c17-6b84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Confidence. That’s a word that keeps coming up when I talk to reporters and supporters and as I continue to crisscross the state talking to Iowa voters where they live and work. Will it be difficult to defeat to defeat Iowa’s senior U.S. Senator Chuck Grassley? Yes, but not at all impossible!
Our campaign has great momentum. Just yesterday we made a big announcement that because of staunch supporters like you, we have raised over $750,000 in campaign contributions since our announcement in mid-October of last year.
Our campaign is proud that we have raised this amount without any corporate PAC money. The enthusiasm and support from so many individuals shows that this campaign has the momentum and stamina it will take to defeat Chuck Grassley in November.
Thank you. Thank you. Thank you.
We put in a lot of miles in the state last week as we visited Linn, Johnson, Montgomery, Pottawattamie, Cass, and Woodbury Counties. We had a fantastic turnout in Mount Vernon for a meet and greet, and I want to thank the IBEW Local 405 for giving me a tour of the Cedar Rapids Electrical Training Center. I am confident that with the right Senatorial leadership Iowa can again be a leader in innovation and technological opportunities.
Our next stops were in SW Iowa in Montgomery and Pottawattamie Counties. Thank you to everyone for coming out and braving the cold weather. For those of you who missed it, [please check out some of the local coverage here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41364154/328478146/247530309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzk2NGMxNy02Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGcKtw0qSRtip06OlHaq5Yz6LzNPxwZb8E3kIs-guVE=&emci=8d347d29-a282-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=a3964c17-6b84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6371843) where I discussed energy, education, and childcare.
If your county party is holding any upcoming events or if you are interested in hosting a fundraiser or meet and greet, please email us at [info@frankenforiowa.org](mailto:info@frankenforiowa.org).
I never turn down an opportunity to stop in at the University of Iowa. Last week, I visited with The Daily Iowan and discussed the importance of keeping young people in our state and [my vision for the future](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41364156/328478148/-791308061?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzk2NGMxNy02Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGcKtw0qSRtip06OlHaq5Yz6LzNPxwZb8E3kIs-guVE=&emci=8d347d29-a282-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=a3964c17-6b84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6371843) for the next generation of Iowans.
For those of you in the Davenport viewing area and beyond, I recently sat down with Jim Niedelman of WHBF. Please [check out the full interview](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41364158/328478150/-1972422306?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzk2NGMxNy02Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGcKtw0qSRtip06OlHaq5Yz6LzNPxwZb8E3kIs-guVE=&emci=8d347d29-a282-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=a3964c17-6b84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6371843) where I talk about what it will take to defeat Senator Chuck Grassley.
News of Justice Stephen Breyer’s retirement was on the minds of everyone last week. I join legions of others in wishing him well in this next chapter of retirement. Our nation is more fair and more accommodating for all because of his service on the bench. His rulings on the Affordable Care Act and freedom of speech serve as recent examples of how he helped this nation.
As we enter the nomination process for his relief on the bench, let’s not forget that in 2016 Sen Grassley blocked the nomination of Attorney General, Merrick Garland, for 293 days in one of the most egregious examples of judicial obstruction in this country’s history. I am confident that Pres. Biden will choose Justice Breyer’s successor based on his distinguished legacy of equality and justice for all. It is also important to note that the practice of enacting a filibuster for[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41364160/328478152/1721026915?src=hashtag_click&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzk2NGMxNy02Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGcKtw0qSRtip06OlHaq5Yz6LzNPxwZb8E3kIs-guVE=&emci=8d347d29-a282-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=a3964c17-6b84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)Supreme Court nominees was broken by the Trump Administration.
**Upcoming Events**

I am confident that we can do this. We’ll see you next week.
Thank you for reading this.
Sincerely,
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)

name: Team Schmitt

body:
REDISTRICTING AND PATHWAY TO VICTORY

| [](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=e2f1e50a4a4849d592928b62f989ebe3&_e=4IzUCMygQQhUjJo6fw1annIRvR4HtMWQ-Vn3FX2-BGY8R-UN_0Gw32DFrfE9C0CKYSpKu6ppnwTBQMUyySJlly91QdemIcDjzXO9LMmRf3QMuBTyBYWA0czYchjSvDCQcH1_RtVX9Vhci_tDGfdIgbhc-MC8Md-Ru5mpMrBbs8yrxfMSlv8Xbt6NYZL08MrxGVJifDGJ3RYshAiPLfL8yGlA9A69hb2KP4Eh2N1LOUjGqQRZhe-Ro9Nx-uMRbTQqHwUkAczwuDZQAKaIengtTWcMPuhqdzaeJN14l2PSbhE%3D)
---
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:**
_February 1, 2022_
**SCHMITT ON NEW YORK STATE REDISTRICTING AND PATHWAY TO VICTORY** _NY-18 rated the most competitive district in New York State_
**New Windsor, NY** — New York State Assemblyman and candidate for New York’s 18th Congressional District, Colin Schmitt (R-New Windsor), today released the following statement on the release of final gerrymandered redistricting maps by the New York State Legislature. New York’s 18th Congressional District now spans portions of Orange, Dutchess, Putnam, Ulster, and Westchester counties, with a PVI score of just D+1. The new NY-18 has been rated as the most competitive congressional district in New York State and the one most likely to flip from Democrat to GOP control.

Just prior to the release of the newly drawn maps from the Democratic-controlled state legislature, Sean Maloney attempted to save himself by submitting one of the most aggressively partisan and outright gerrymandered congressional maps to Albany Democrats. Maloney attempted to redraw his own district but Albany Democrats did not cave into his wishes. As the**NRCC spokeswoman, Samantha Bullock stated** , “Sean Patrick Maloney is so unpopular even his own party doesn’t want to help him.”

“In November, we are going to beat Sean Maloney and retire Nancy Pelosi,” **said Assemblyman Schmitt**. “The newly configured NY-18 is a district we will win — the Hudson Valley is sick and tired of one-party Democratic control in Washington. With Inflation running sky-high, local food store shelves bare, crime spikes and attacks on law enforcement continuing unabated, parental rights being stifled, an unsecured border and new failed national security decisions at every turn — Biden and Sean Maloney continue to show they are not fit to lead.”

“Sean Maloney lied to Hudson Valley voters when he promised to represent us when he was first elected to congress. Since his time in the Capitol, he quickly transformed into the most partisan politician in Washington,” **Schmitt continued.** “Maloney votes with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time and serves as her Democratic Campaign Committee Chairman — the enforcer for the most radical efforts in Washington to pass Build Back Better, Federalize our National elections, pack the Supreme Court, and more. The Hudson Valley deserves a real congressman, not a Democrat Campaign Chairman.”

“Over the last few months before the final district lines were established, my campaign and I raised nearly $600,000, fueled by the support of thousands of New Yorkers,” Schmitt noted. “Already during that time my campaign, powered by local volunteers, successfully ran 49 door-to-door deployments, an on-the-ground field strategy that aided in 94% of candidates we supported winning in November. With final lines established, these efforts will only be amplified. In November the Hudson Valley will have a new congressman.”

_Colin Schmitt is committed to public service. Colin is a Sergeant in the Army National Guard and Assemblyman for the 99th NYS Assembly District which includes parts of Orange and Rockland counties. Colin and his wife, Nikki, live in the Town of New Windsor with their rescue dog Quincy. On April 6, 2021, Colin announced his campaign for New York’s 18th Congressional District. As a lifelong Hudson Valley resident, Colin will stand up for local families and their values in the U.S. House of Representatives by fighting for lower taxes and more jobs and defending the region’s wonderful quality of life._
