clean_body: REDISTRICTING AND PATHWAY TO VICTORY | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: February 1, 2022 SCHMITT ON NEW YORK STATE REDISTRICTING AND PATHWAY TO VICTORY NY-18 rated the most competitive district in New York State New Windsor, NY — New York State Assemblyman and candidate for New York’s 18th Congressional District, Colin Schmitt (R-New Windsor), today released the following statement on the release of final gerrymandered redistricting maps by the New York State Legislature. New York’s 18th Congressional District now spans portions of Orange, Dutchess, Putnam, Ulster, and Westchester counties, with a PVI score of just D+1. The new NY-18 has been rated as the most competitive congressional district in New York State and the one most likely to flip from Democrat to GOP control. Just prior to the release of the newly drawn maps from the Democratic-controlled state legislature, Sean Maloney attempted to save himself by submitting one of the most aggressively partisan and outright gerrymandered congressional maps to Albany Democrats. Maloney attempted to redraw his own district but Albany Democrats did not cave into his wishes. As theNRCC spokeswoman, Samantha Bullock stated , “Sean Patrick Maloney is so unpopular even his own party doesn’t want to help him.” “In November, we are going to beat Sean Maloney and retire Nancy Pelosi,” said Assemblyman Schmitt. “The newly configured NY-18 is a district we will win — the Hudson Valley is sick and tired of one-party Democratic control in Washington. With Inflation running sky-high, local food store shelves bare, crime spikes and attacks on law enforcement continuing unabated, parental rights being stifled, an unsecured border and new failed national security decisions at every turn — Biden and Sean Maloney continue to show they are not fit to lead.” “Sean Maloney lied to Hudson Valley voters when he promised to represent us when he was first elected to congress. Since his time in the Capitol, he quickly transformed into the most partisan politician in Washington,” Schmitt continued. “Maloney votes with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time and serves as her Democratic Campaign Committee Chairman — the enforcer for the most radical efforts in Washington to pass Build Back Better, Federalize our National elections, pack the Supreme Court, and more. The Hudson Valley deserves a real congressman, not a Democrat Campaign Chairman.” “Over the last few months before the final district lines were established, my campaign and I raised nearly $600,000, fueled by the support of thousands of New Yorkers,” Schmitt noted. “Already during that time my campaign, powered by local volunteers, successfully ran 49 door-to-door deployments, an on-the-ground field strategy that aided in 94% of candidates we supported winning in November. With final lines established, these efforts will only be amplified. In November the Hudson Valley will have a new congressman.” Colin Schmitt is committed to public service. Colin is a Sergeant in the Army National Guard and Assemblyman for the 99th NYS Assembly District which includes parts of Orange and Rockland counties. Colin and his wife, Nikki, live in the Town of New Windsor with their rescue dog Quincy. On April 6, 2021, Colin announced his campaign for New York’s 18th Congressional District. As a lifelong Hudson Valley resident, Colin will stand up for local families and their values in the U.S. House of Representatives by fighting for lower taxes and more jobs and defending the region’s wonderful quality of life. | Paid for by Schmitt for Congress Our mailing address is: Schmitt For Congress PO Box 67 South Salem, NY 10590 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans’ side. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we’ve seen, **but we have bad news for you.**

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There’s good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f0zi-1w95h-4qqlpo5/ "11:59 PM TONIGHT")**.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We’re already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f0zi-1w95l-4qqlpo9/ "11:59 PM")** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it’s too late>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f0zi-1w95m-4qqlpo0/ "Renew before it’s too late >>>")**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don’t let them down.

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

body:
Biden’s America-Last agenda is costing you and your family.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j_mw-veJRcQ-zXifmM4TF9DRcqey8cEb1v9J6Y4egpyZJqa7X_eM2hBqzQZ_5-7XnDtxUx6oDisLk2R16QYMUIAZ-pjeJ0ltLWrVIX_eDhPl-6VWKuUZMbA_M15dQMDHlWJWM7CA3KF1m-FLWdBHl0XoXWXiJnH0rBLKyAlX2sx-SC8n8fbwIZHgjTPqSBAscDLmOgkUvq3oI1x3Nbk8SA==&c=1pifJF4GEXGRqH-4MAEPP0ZdGX9U_rbDJs59n3VJFv6Df2iQdA1vsg==&ch=iqgpkLdlKlSlRcgG1eubxzwWxckjO4ThGBFAsQLICFLvdu2iEjq0dg==)
---
| Friend,
Biden's America-Last agenda is costing you and your family. On average, Americans are spending more on all goods and services than they were under President Trump.
It's not hard to find the cause of the skyrocketing prices in America's grocery stores and markets. Biden's free-for-all agenda is putting liberal elite donors over the well-being of working Americans.
Working-class Americans have been unjustly burdened by the Left's trillion-dollar spending sprees.
With your support, Kat can keep fighting to take back the House, end our rapid inflation, and put America First economics back in our government. [Can Kat count on your support in her fight to take back the House and bring America First policies back to Congress?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j_mw-veJRcQ-zXifmM4TF9DRcqey8cEb1v9J6Y4egpyZJqa7X_eM2hBqzQZ_5-7XnDtxUx6oDisLk2R16QYMUIAZ-pjeJ0ltLWrVIX_eDhPl-6VWKuUZMbA_M15dQMDHlWJWM7CA3KF1m-FLWdBHl0XoXWXiJnH0rBLKyAlX2sx-SC8n8fbwIZHgjTPqSBAscDLmOgkUvq3oI1x3Nbk8SA==&c=1pifJF4GEXGRqH-4MAEPP0ZdGX9U_rbDJs59n3VJFv6Df2iQdA1vsg==&ch=iqgpkLdlKlSlRcgG1eubxzwWxckjO4ThGBFAsQLICFLvdu2iEjq0dg==)

We can't end America's rapid inflation until Conservatives regain the majority in the House. As your Representative, Kat has always pushed for common-sense fiscal responsibility in Congress, but she can't end big government socialism without your support.

## January 31, 2022

# Idaho needs a Governor who will fight the CCP instead of befriending it!
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011mSHVt_qHlErBWegGZdTIxlDJlq3vLiuYD_PJqKkamxazXjyPcP5WgaNiaNWcUXZVA9iziTtdPaK5VgT3Mjf2bFlDTLX0d4sEKaozb6saP2D2AOLC9wLLavWCYHWGEZA_G7urzFZXSTW8DhOL2q2aw==&c=aOTqLYIroOfPw7lglfoe6JQ5memjoqyxh6CHrbBMaV9Iy9SMStMYIg==&ch=R3gThEbB27SYWkwtKrhuI5-DCLlTUCLrehuaOs-IEZDef6whLFjv5Q==)
---
|
##

## The Chinese Communist Party is an enemy to Idaho and an enemy to America

The Chinese Communist Party (CCP) has developed a dangerous network of influence in government, education, agriculture, infrastructure, and business. They have targeted leaders at all levels of government, including Idaho leaders, to advance CCP interests and policies under the guise of building cultural ties and economic alliances. The CCP uses academic and economic arrangements to penetrate US innovators, such as Micron, and steal their ideas and technology. University programs, such as the Confucius Institute and Chinese Students and Scholars Association (CSSA) which are found in Idaho universities are used to sanitize the public image of CCP's murderous policies and soften students to anti-American indoctrination. On January 19, 2021, Donald Trump issued what may prove to be the most important Executive Order of his presidency. He declared a national emergency arising from the investments unwary Americans are being induced to make in the Chinese Communist Party's military-industrial complex.
---
| [Read More](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011mSHVt_qHlErBWegGZdTIxlDJlq3vLiuYD_PJqKkamxazXjyPcP5WgaNiaNWcUXZMznTn6tGMSyeVtSSpLkB_OTYLgOkqJB6cVl6sVXAUllGFFBLd_sTxhSMjvw2ScUaDYIQBqxZYwrb5xLAFbbkOKwLoX4OVAmS9WJ_eLEZl9OO0zrTTnDyNj2yyrXngZfFLIvXdZthKdnIK-hjAzM1eJDvjBN7MdtJ&c=aOTqLYIroOfPw7lglfoe6JQ5memjoqyxh6CHrbBMaV9Iy9SMStMYIg==&ch=R3gThEbB27SYWkwtKrhuI5-DCLlTUCLrehuaOs-IEZDef6whLFjv5Q==)

## A Peek at the Past Week
---
| | |
---
|
### Janury 29

The true meaning of a grassroots campaign: A friendly couple opened up their private home to strangers with a common goal, to save idaho. Thank you Billy's Cowboy BBQ for catering

---
| | |
---
|
### January 29

I had the opportunity to sit down with some homeschool families this morning. Nothing will have a more positive impact on protecting the free exchange of ideas in education than school choice.
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
# Principles Above Politics
---
|
---
| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept.

---
| [The Plan](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011mSHVt_qHlErBWegGZdTIxlDJlq3vLiuYD_PJqKkamxazXjyPcP5Wueez03I7L4HXy3QqopFmR2BNdHKGoeLb5WMcpG--CbNTzqQu2kLKP-COY-iGbS-mmYgnnrk3tOnXmxldGE569ojkb-6JPpSeirXwZfE2mPh&c=aOTqLYIroOfPw7lglfoe6JQ5memjoqyxh6CHrbBMaV9Iy9SMStMYIg==&ch=R3gThEbB27SYWkwtKrhuI5-DCLlTUCLrehuaOs-IEZDef6whLFjv5Q==)
---
| |
---
|

|

|
## Upcoming Events
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011mSHVt_qHlErBWegGZdTIxlDJlq3vLiuYD_PJqKkamxazXjyPcP5Wueez03I7L4HxS0q4_PCyW0NLLHEVH2v-NnNodXCCrpt3BGck1AAKCTfTNVEidnxnpVl2IpVX6MvKqCXnRgS89R3M8v2TsqF4NFEmGR6zm0d&c=aOTqLYIroOfPw7lglfoe6JQ5memjoqyxh6CHrbBMaV9Iy9SMStMYIg==&ch=R3gThEbB27SYWkwtKrhuI5-DCLlTUCLrehuaOs-IEZDef6whLFjv5Q==)
---
| [RSVP Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011mSHVt_qHlErBWegGZdTIxlDJlq3vLiuYD_PJqKkamxazXjyPcP5Wueez03I7L4HxS0q4_PCyW0NLLHEVH2v-NnNodXCCrpt3BGck1AAKCTfTNVEidnxnpVl2IpVX6MvKqCXnRgS89R3M8v2TsqF4NFEmGR6zm0d&c=aOTqLYIroOfPw7lglfoe6JQ5memjoqyxh6CHrbBMaV9Iy9SMStMYIg==&ch=R3gThEbB27SYWkwtKrhuI5-DCLlTUCLrehuaOs-IEZDef6whLFjv5Q==)
---

|
### JOIN THE MOVEMENT

If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and I welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow Patriots. Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can't volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho.

clean_body: You don't want to miss this. | | | | | | | January 31, 2022 | | | | Idaho needs a Governor who will fight the CCP instead of befriending it! | == | The Chinese Communist Party is an enemy to Idaho and an enemy to America The Chinese Communist Party (CCP) has developed a dangerous network of influence in government, education, agriculture, infrastructure, and business. They have targeted leaders at all levels of government, including Idaho leaders, to advance CCP interests and policies under the guise of building cultural ties and economic alliances. The CCP uses academic and economic arrangements to penetrate US innovators, such as Micron, and steal their ideas and technology. University programs, such as the Confucius Institute and Chinese Students and Scholars Association (CSSA) which are found in Idaho universities are used to sanitize the public image of CCP's murderous policies and soften students to anti-American indoctrination. On January 19, 2021, Donald Trump issued what may prove to be the most important Executive Order of his presidency. He declared a national emergency arising from the investments unwary Americans are being induced to make in the Chinese Communist Party's military-industrial complex. | == | | | | | == | | | | | A Peek at the Past Week | | | | Janury 29 The true meaning of a grassroots campaign: A friendly couple opened up their private home to strangers with a common goal, to save idaho. Thank you Billy's Cowboy BBQ for catering | | | | January 29 I had the opportunity to sit down with some homeschool families this morning. Nothing will have a more positive impact on protecting the free exchange of ideas in education than school choice. | | | | | Principles Above Politics | | | We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us. It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. | == | | | | | | | Upcoming Events | == | == | | | | | JOIN THE MOVEMENT If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. name: Shontel Brown
subject: Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
This Black History Month marks the 67th year since the start of the civil rights movement.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41364584/328480085/918102368?refcode=EM_FR_220202BHM_N_SB_ALL_30DO_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTQyNTA3Mi02ZDg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5TNhkqdZa2BEydLgNpwmvn_nOUGy0hn_7AHFegmCh8c=) Peter, This Black History Month marks the 67th year since Rosa Parks refused to give up her seat, sparking the civil rights movement. Commemorating countless important people and events, Black History Month remembers the efforts in abolishing segregation, discrimination, and disenfranchisement throughout the United States.

Figures such as Dr. King, Malcolm X, Rosa Parks, and communities of unnamed activists were committed to upholding the country’s founding promise: that all people are created equal. The America we live in today exists because of the will, bravery, and commitment of those who came before us. Yet their work is incomplete.

Bias and discrimination still hold back justice and equality. States across the country are passing laws that make it harder for Americans, particularly Black and Brown Americans, to vote, and Congress stands powerless. This must change.

**The arc of the moral universe can bend towards justice, but only if you help bend it.**

Shontel Brown |
As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**
---

body:

# House Republican Whip Scalise Endorses Juan Ciscomani (AZ-06)

**House Republican Whip Steve Scalise [announced today](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=9ad9322976&e=659fba240e) he is endorsing Juan Ciscomani (AZ-06) for U.S. Congress.**

Arizona's new 6th congressional district** ** is a critical, key battleground seat we must flip in 2022 to ensure we take back the House!

“Juan Ciscomani is the kind of conservative fighter we need more of in the United States Congress. Juan will work with us to secure our border, rebuild our economy and stand up for American values. **Juan will help us fire Speaker Nancy Pelosi, stop the reckless policies of the Biden-Harris administration, and build a Republican majority that will get our country back on track._I’m proud to support Juan Ciscomani for Arizona’s Sixth Congressional District_** ,” said Whip Steve Scalise.
[](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=cf83be4956&e=659fba240e) Whip Scalise's endorsement comes on the heels of several other endorsements for Juan including [Leader Kevin McCarthy](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=e88229faba&e=659fba240e), [Congressional Leadership Fund](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=62c6772c49&e=659fba240e), and [Arizona State Representative Teresa Martinez (LD-11)](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=ad60252dc7&e=659fba240e).
**TOGETHER WE WILL WIN #AZ06 AND TAKE BACK THE HOUSE!** 🇺🇸

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: AOC was right about Manchin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, Joe Manchin
isn’t interested in passing any of our progressive priorities. And the
Squad knew it from the very beginning. Here’s Manchin joking about
obstructing progressive policies in Build Back Better yesterday:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/91538?refcode=em20220202-21789&t=1002&akid=21789%2E1203867%2EtEGA9W ]Tweet from reporter Manu Raju reads Sen. Joe Manchin, asked about Build
Back Better, said: 'What Build Back Better bill? I don’t know what you
guys are talking about.' I asked him if he’s had any talks on the matter
since December. 'No, no, no, no. It’s dead.'

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez didn’t like Manchin’s apathy in the face of
millions who need Democrats to act. Here’s her response:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/91538?refcode=em20220202-21789&t=1003&akid=21789%2E1203867%2EtEGA9W ]Tweet from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez reads Seniors, kids, & people with
disabilities in my community have been sleeping with bubble jackets on in
18 degree nights, despite paying rent, bc the NYCHA funding to fix their
heating and capital needs is in BBB. Where should I direct them to wait
out the cold? Manchin’s yacht?

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan
Omar, and Ayanna Pressley all urged Democrats to make sure Manchin
couldn’t pass his bipartisan infrastructure bill WITHOUT also passing
Build Back Better. The Squad even voted against the establishment. But the
corporate Democratic Party passed the infrastructure bill anyways. And now
the core social and economic reforms of the Democratic agenda are (still)
being blocked by Manchin.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/91538?refcode=em20220202-21789&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=21789%2E1203867%2EtEGA9W ]We need to show that Justice Democrats and the Squad are the future of
politics, and the ones that will truly fight for economic, social, racial,
and environmental justice. Can you chip in a $3 donation
today to stand with the Squad and highlight the failures of the Democratic
Party?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/91538?refcode=em20220202-21789&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=21789%2E1203867%2EtEGA9W ]Contribute $3

Last year, corporate Democrats joined with Republicans to put climate
action, universal pre-K, paid leave, and Medicare expansion at risk. The
Squad voted against the political establishment, and for good reason.

The Squad was right not to trust corporate Democrats like Joe Manchin.
Corporate Democrats promised the people they would pass Build Back Better
if Congress just passed a bipartisan infrastructure bill first. Now,
Manchin simply sneers at Build Back Better.

Cori, Jamaal, Alexandria, Rashida, Ilhan, and Ayanna were the only
Democrats to vote WITH THE PEOPLE.

When it comes down to it, corporate Democrats do not want to pass popular
progressive policies. It’s on the Justice Democrats in Congress — and the
grassroots movement behind them — to hold the line in the fight for
working people.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/91538?refcode=em20220202-21789&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=21789%2E1203867%2EtEGA9W ]We need to back up the Squad. We need to show that we are the future
of the Democratic party, not the same old politicians voting with
corporate lobbyists and maintaining the status quo. Can you make a
$3 donation to Justice Democrats today to protect and
expand the Squad in Congress?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1025&akid=21789%2E1203867%2EtEGA9W ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1026&akid=21789%2E1203867%2EtEGA9W ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220202-21789-footer&t=1027&refcode2=21789_1203867_tEGA9W&akid=21789%2E1203867%2EtEGA9W

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1028&akid=21789%2E1203867%2EtEGA9W

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: Paxton is Protecting Our Elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ken Paxton Campaign
body:
Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 2, 2022

|
---
**Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 2, 2022**

**Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: **

**Post:** Ken Paxton earned another crucial victory, preventing Democrats' radical efforts to change Texas' election process and maps. He'll never stop fighting to keep our elections safe and secure.

**Link: **[https://twitter.com/KenPaxtonTX/status/1488655777585930246?s=20&t=ET_3XpgRSXatmfyccrHCVA](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=2fe23031d1a14ca2aec2e166991553d2&_e=54SpuhDeVSS5Mwm9jA9eLxjJKvx-milMVuFX6uVgWa7oGNhmH_bYznVR0KgxfObmJll93WIhqjbqy68TQ4658SczP1LV799fYOH6-89aP6ngDayp_aRF7nEEqKzv855pQw4kkHll6Tgto88flbEpioD74z5Tu7Hmy9d-UYIyZRUB-P32sdUiB5KDN44-GstYJ4gj80dehGLcmsbWl2piUyurcCYZlJeelXHroCQH5Z6bD3MCI0AgjJe7vYBe8Ljv0iIdelilwNSso9ELt7HI3RG3nroW3pPpvKouZyMcWtPv6S7MsbLgElRGa7bhBfQs2BSMSI5OjchNiNBnY6jMyglmEhRSL_WJaCkcdpTmKbA%3D)

**Theme of the Day: Paxton is Protecting Our Elections **

As the Biden administration pushes their lawless agenda that has resulted in dire consequences for Texas, Ken Paxton is committed to holding the admin accountable, defending the Lone Star State from burdensome mandates, and championing the conservative values Texans hold dear. Here’s a recap of Ken Paxton’s efforts to defend Texas values and what’s driving the news you need to know: ~ Ken Paxton's victory in the Texas redistricting case is a major victory for the integrity of our elections. He dealt a major blow to Democrats' attempts to radically alter our maps and successfully defended the Texas Senate maps. Ken Paxton will never stop fighting to ensure our election process is fair and secure.

~ Life News has cited a new report from the Texas Health and Human Services Commission that confirms the Texas abortion ban is saving 90 babies from abortion every day and 3,860 babies have been saved from abortions so far in the Lone Star State. Ken Paxton was proud to defend the heartbeat bill and will always work to protect the sanctity of life.

~ Fox News has reported that at least 30 police and law enforcement officers were shot in the month of January – up 67% from the same time last year. This number is completely staggering and it's a result of radical efforts to discredit the brave men and women of law enforcement. Ken Paxton will always stand with our police and ensure they have the support and resources they deserve as they serve our communities.

We encourage you to [share these messages](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=2fe23031d1a14ca2aec2e166991553d2&_e=54SpuhDeVSS5Mwm9jA9eL_6_7Qm9O7td7a4aJZux6s_aXcWL-vWxjVVs8eGIMNPC1lfrU3sVFgr2ihRI32XCSPw1s5a0XrxP3vbso-lANgkzAjt4HvEGloBmYsZnrtnDiNM3-yOQ7IfDN9aeJ2h3B7Cf_3jFPJqsqRc8OqnrJSEr76MolZSdA8sdRzV9hSNuByoxHYhp98tczEkzl4Dsgzf0mvl3T1sBtWICHqHY5GmRFCEQ4Q6kR2yo7cf55DcIAoho5W1XcMHSejcSmeve5w%3D%3D) with your friends and followers on social media. name: Troy Newman, Operation Rescue
subject: Sign the National Petition to Defund Planned Parenthood
body:
Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I help
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zenqauv26rlcofuueosr1cs0icn64kv86fs717j8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u9r66ptmmep3ep5mm4o66cpme5on4c72ephb3dpke2qm8clhmlh64c3gc5jb6c77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchjcor65cr56up34phks2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1cpgecpr1c9h649fg)
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z44ijulv8ijlknhqojnontmpvhgobav54l1gscqo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j6eob2c9h2bs) Fellow Pro-Life American, Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I helped uncover their cash-for-baby-body parts scheme five years ago. But just because the radical left is suppressing content online and refuses to tell the truth about the radical abortion lobby ... that doesn’t mean they’ve cleaned up their act. **Far from it! ** While I was exposing Planned Parenthood’s crimes, and was found liable in a San Francisco court for $17 million in damages in a historic pro-life case, the federal government — with partial funding of Anthony Fauci’s National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases — **_was supporting research to graft the scalps of unborn babies who were just 17 to 20 weeks old onto lab rats and mice to see if they’d keep growing._** [**We MUST demand that Congress act NOW to Defund Planned Parenthood and end the senseless murder of unborn children and STOP using these innocent lives in the name of "research." Please sign the petition right away!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlf4dak6l3aijgpp36r51sn01m0mhtuolmc2jqbg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j6eob2c9h2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu9l43q214ubinfh14knetbjb5q62r0tpionmijg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j6eob2c9h2bs) Right now, the radical abortionists are coming after life in new and horrific ways. They’re passing legislation aimed at expanding access to late-term abortion and infanticide, and they’re ramping up the number of pill mills across the nation. On top of it all, they’re working to **DESTROY** threats to their business — like me. Not long ago, they won a hard-fought battle against me in court, which cost Operation Rescue hundreds of thousands of dollars and hundreds of hours of our time. My team and I are on the ground every day exposing the radical abortion lobby and **SHUTTING THEM DOWN** , but now that Planned Parenthood has picked up their pace — and is now focused on opening pill mills over surgical facilities — we must ensure that Congress does their part by taking away all federal funding from these monsters. [**To help save innocent lives and ensure our tax dollars don’t fund Planned Parenthood in ANY manner, I need you to sign this national petition today.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn4b4401pov03c4arg5j3j27vlknqdsm42a9sd6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j6eob2c9h2bs) Over the last ten years, the number of surgical abortion clinics **decreased by 35 percent**. While this is fantastic — and in part thanks to the work we do at Operation Rescue to expose the abortion industry, shut down dangerous facilities, and put abortionists out of work — what’s very troubling is that Planned Parenthood has recently _shifted strategy._ [**_Medication abortion facilities —_** **_which are dispensaries for abortion-inducing drugs — have become the reliable “cash cow” for the abortion industry. And they’re popping up at an alarming rate!_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1pnsudptpuqhqk7efqgflnoq5sup6e25379ihp8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j6eob2c9h2bs) That is why we must **INCREASE** our efforts this year to ensure that we can keep up with the pace of murder-pill mills AND pressure Congress to take every taxpayer dollar away from Planned Parenthood. [**Please help today by signing this national petition. It will only take a moment of your time and the impact will be huge.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm102ft0aunbe1suganjecfhgefs46fh85iopnag_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j6eob2c9h2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsfp1n37httq3nd9jkf32ndfou152ddsb3ivn0kg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j6eob2c9h2bs) Thank you for your support, God bless you, Troy Newman President P.O. Box 782888 • Wichita, KS 67278 ****
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zhdgft8v1h0ln4nfisamjasdaq45km1nu9sj4mlo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfagpk20sn829bdi7fhbv4k35is7nbg67tcbmer0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1cpgecpr1c9h649fg)

name: YOUR FEEDBACK REQUESTED (via DCCC)
subject: requesting your input, not your money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
11,800 responses requested by 11:59 PM
| | _**YOUR INPUT REQUESTED:
Should Election Day be a federal holiday?**_

| It's no secret voting rights are under attack nationwide.

Our House Democrats are committed to defending our democracy and our sacred right to vote in any way they can.

Some have even suggested that Election Day should become a federal holiday, so that Americans from all backgrounds are able to make it to the polls.

**And as we quickly approach Election Day 2022, we 're collecting data on where top Democrats like you stand on this pivotal issue.**

[******Please, let us know: Do you think Election Day should become a federal holiday? >>******](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~)

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Poll Response: [PENDING >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-YTZZk6_)
| [Take the Poll >> ](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

We're rapidly approaching the most important election of our lives.

And if we're going to defend our House Majority and our democracy, ensuring that every eligible American can vote will be absolutely critical.

But in states where Republicans are making it harder to vote - like Arizona and Georgia - Election Day is not a holiday.

Here at Democratic HQ, we believe voting should be _**more accessible**_ - not less.

And since the 2022 elections are just around the corner, we want to know where our best grassroots supporters stand.

**That 's why we're urgently requesting your feedback on our poll before midnight:**
| [Let us know: Do you think Election Day should be a federal holiday? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thanks,

DCCC

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46338680&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4MDI0NjExMAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority \-- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46338680&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4MDI0NjExMAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Team Blumenthal
subject: Fwd: new challenger alert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend: We hope you didn't miss this news, because it's critical: **A new Republican challenger just emerged to take on Sen. Blumenthal, flip this state red, and dismantle Democratic control of the Senate!** With the Senate split 50-50, we must defend _every single Democratic seat._ If we lose _even one_ , we hand control right back to Mitch McConnell. Thankfully, since we sent our first email announcing this news, _hundreds_ of supporters have chipped in to support Sen. Blumenthal and keep this seat blue - **but with just a few hours until our deadline, we 're still only 89% of the way to our must-hit rapid-response fundraising goal.** With the election year officially upon us and national Republicans targeting this seat, we CANNOT afford to fall short here and risk having to cut back our campaign efforts. You've come through for Democrats many times before. Now, we need your grassroots support to defend this critical Senate seat: **[Please chip in $5 or more right now- whatever you can spare, before our most important fundraising deadline yet - to protect Sen. Blumenthal's seat and keep the Senate blue.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1139-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500) Team Blumenthal
---
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Team Blumenthal**
Date: Tue, Feb 1, 2022
Subject: New Republican Entry in CT Senate Race

[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=L0HuluK7conoyxnMRj0THZ7hyExA85Vx&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
I wanted to give you an update on our campaign, as a lot has changed over the last 48 hours. There are now four Republicans running against Sen. Blumenthal including a serious new challenger -- a statehouse insider -- the former Republican Minority Leader.
She was pushed to run by Republican Party leaders and even supported by Fox News darling Laura Ingraham.
Whoever wins the Republican primary, national Republicans have made their intentions clear. They are targeting Dick Blumenthal. Mitch McConnell wants to take back control of the Senate and he thinks his path goes straight through Connecticut.
**We can 't let that happen.**
We need Sen. Blumenthal in the United States Senate. A stalwart warrior for the rule of law, voting rights, women's healthcare, infrastructure, and support to small businesses as the challenges of the pandemic continue, he is focused on doing his job and working for the people of Connecticut.
[Please help us stand up to Mitch McConnell and support Dick Blumenthal. Click here to chip in what you can to defend this blue Senate seat and keep Democrats in control of the Senate. We need you to be part of our team.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1139-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1139-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
Team Blumenthal

Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

subject: What Ben has been up to

Niki Conforti

---
Peter,
Under Joe Biden, America’s southern border is an absolute crisis. Hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants flood across — some are captured and then released, while most simply cross without detection. We’ve seen humanitarian crises because of Biden’s failed leadership — _**guns, drugs, and worst of all, human trafficking, have all surged under Biden.**_
This week, Fox News reported, “ _Five Syrian men were arrested by Border Patrol agents as they crossed into Hidalgo, Texas._ ”

When will it end? It’s time to know **_WHO_** is coming into America!! It all starts with a secure border! _**Biden created this dangerous crisis, and I’m fighting to hold him accountable for it!**_

[_**Help fight back by donating to my campaign.******_**_Ever_ y dollar helps. Donate $25, $10 — even just $5: https://secure.winred.com/josh-hawley-committee/whats_happening_at_the_border.**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=00e4d4834fa64148b1a3566cd747bfd6&_e=6Tq5mqGqb7sDybENfHBXWbdlESrHgFF68wGs36RX8qKqSgSukP6hASsb3LrSclyVA-NDFtE7bwPwEWt5t8muK6ci_VqwmDh0jNk44653WmlHa4-iOE90x47LqPuozB2RkEnm8PSxqi4BFhgzonOThB25nXYWxM0nQqsoBtmvUqYeiLj0O7pi_sD2At57NVc-Zv_umSGiyjtwbf2QKrIHis4LKV7s6u9oScMWSHpVoAjHRn-S5s1KEZkgATCLrQNg4i_DlCi6CcpEOLJCEYyq2PKznjhZzKdxWn-QnLbQonLsh9_pIDp7L_iaQn-4GUDmplJzRuxd-JobtfYG76iKC0hIXw4C9szg_7RgLGA6U702efiVkfDV9yNdKnPjNn5Xz3fnTGm1SwyucF7BfgpomAC9UyASidP-6Hjbqf1PxiY%3D)

Josh Hawley

clean_body: | | Peter, Under Joe Biden, America’s southern border is an absolute crisis. Hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants flood across — some are captured and then released, while most simply cross without detection. We’ve seen humanitarian crises because of Biden’s failed leadership — guns, drugs, and worst of all, human trafficking, have all surged under Biden. This week, Fox News reported, “ Five Syrian men were arrested by Border Patrol agents as they crossed into Hidalgo, Texas. ” When will it end? It’s time to know WHO is coming into America!! It all starts with a secure border! Biden created this dangerous crisis, and I’m fighting to hold him accountable for it! God Bless, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

name: Team Greitens
subject: ICYMI: Ex-FBI Agent Hired by Soros' DA to Investigate Gov. Eric Greitens Indicted on 7 Felonies for Perjury, Evidence Tampering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| ICYMI: Ex-FBI Agent Hired by Soros' DA to Investigate Gov. Eric Greitens Indicted on 7 Felonies for Perjury, Evidence Tampering
---
| An ex-FBI agent hired by Soros-funded prosecutor Kimberly Gardner to investigate then-Missouri Governor Eric Greitens has been indicted on six felony charges of perjury and one felony charge of evidence tamping.
The criminal trial of ex-FBI agent William Don Tisaby is set to begin on March 28 in St. Louis.
In 2018, Gardner brought a false criminal case against Greitens that was ultimately dismissed after Greitens' accuser admitted under oath that she might be remembering the allegations against Greitens, "through a dream."
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qleuoAS3ZWBEYmDjD_b097ngjdK1EdPom5BoBHtBBtVxN_0EUJUzGLiZ8EYOfNOpTJgx8ytaO38zycKvneGoleqRfO_lP_CUi8Qvo3KfkATIO8MF5cFy-8s6vhBPULWB_bnA1gDeqiKh72ZD0u1LSw==&c=EgzGzSsv_P8iXSDbsOwiwv88tdEAGXBXkZw886Kmhp94HAzma5G3ZA==&ch=jL_nkj2ubARSDXT0MdxO8rQppC3CLAM64lrU4UrD_nj69T6MLq6ReA==)
---
| Last week, [a Missouri judge ordered St. Louis Circuit Attorney Kim Gardner to turn over records](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qleuoAS3ZWBEYmDjD_b097ngjdK1EdPom5BoBHtBBtVxN_0EUJUzGLiZ8EYOfNOp_2FlrLlSb8esGgzKwOYeJgtDkHU_ecTcSVnMmK2JSOg22IHBGrkFU56ZhWwmSYFWaV4gsHGyK-jMqsxJ2ZJbACXQ5JdoVqLT49TOfFM0LFB2POgNuz0WsUxOvRNo_Yxxwa8XwLy4iWcPEKFVetHdEmX4ZlvoVsVCBql5YUX98rO61teMfu3t9gjV0enpPs4Yxp9PYvmvuCp9Q8VNP9TifKqVbIMzXULDGvO93NS1_ohQG3qBzzrg9AC-ax70NeVN&c=EgzGzSsv_P8iXSDbsOwiwv88tdEAGXBXkZw886Kmhp94HAzma5G3ZA==&ch=jL_nkj2ubARSDXT0MdxO8rQppC3CLAM64lrU4UrD_nj69T6MLq6ReA==) relating to Gardner's false case against former Missouri Governor Eric Greitens, including Gardner's private communications with George Soros and his associates and Missouri political insiders.
The records ordered to be turned over are to include Gardner and her staff's communications with liberal billionaire George Soros and his associates; Scott Faughn, a convicted felon and political blogger who delivered $120,000 in cash payments to a witness in the case; Al Watkins; Katrina Sneed; Phil Sneed; Democratic State Rep. Stacy Newman; Republican State Rep. Jay Barnes; and several insiders of Missouri's corrupt low-income housing tax credit (LIHTC) program.
Greitens ended the LIHTC program after finding rampant fraud and abuse of Missouri tax dollars. Since being driven from office, the LIHTC program in Missouri has been fully restarted by Greitens' successor-- who has taken excessive contributions from the LIHTC industry.
This comes as Gardner faces a disciplinary hearing in April following an investigation that found Gardner to have committed 68 acts of misconduct that resulted in 72 misrepresentations to the judge, jury, defense attorneys, and even Gardner's own assistant prosecutors.
---
| | | | FOLLOW US
---

In Congress, Dr. Caraveo will be a strong fighter for families and a critical voice to protect the future of our democracy."_
Dr. Caraveo and Rep. Porter both understand that the status quo isn’t working for too many families in this country. Imagine what they can do—together—in Congress to fight back against entrenched special interests and corporate greed, and restore the American Dream for working families.

clean_body: I’m honored to have Representative Katie Porter’s support in this race. Rep. Porter is one of the most visible, tireless advocates for working families in Congress — she is exactly what a representative who always fights for working people is like. | Hey Peter — did you catch my team’s big news yesterday? I’m honored to have Representative Katie Porter’s support in this race. Rep. Porter is one of the most visible, tireless advocates for working families in Congress — she is exactly what a representative who always fights for working people is like. That kind of fearless representation is what working families in Colorado’s 8th District so desperately need, and I’m humbled that Katie recognizes that fighting spirit in me. I look forward to working alongside Rep. Porter to restore faith in our country and make the American Dream achievable again for working families. = | **= Thank you! Dr. Yadira Caraveo \------Forwarded message------ From: Team Caraveo Subject: Katie Porter just endorsed Dr. Caraveo! Date: February 1, 2022 = Big news, Peter: Rep. Katie Porter just endorsed Dr. Caraveo’s campaign for Congress! = As one of the toughest, most vocal champions for working families in Congress, we’re thrilled that Rep. Porter has joined Team Caraveo. Here’s what she had to say: "I know that Dr. Yadira Caraveo is the best candidate to represent Colorado’s new 8th Congressional District. As a pediatrician, a former union representative, and a two-term state legislator, Dr. Caraveo is a trusted leader and a true reformer. In Congress, Dr. Caraveo will be a strong fighter for families and a critical voice to protect the future of our democracy." Dr. Caraveo and Rep. Porter both understand that the status quo isn’t working for too many families in this country. Imagine what they can do—together—in Congress to fight back against entrenched special interests and corporate greed, and restore the American Dream for working families. With control of the House of Representatives likely coming down to Colorado’s 8th District, we have to do everything we can to elect Dr. Caraveo so that she can go to Washington and fight for families alongside Rep. Porter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = ---|---|--- = | | = = | | = — Team Caraveo | | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614 If you would like to receive fewer emails, please . name: Nina Turner
subject: Thank you!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
I’m so proud of how we’re funding this campaign.
#

Hello Somebody!
I just wanted to reach out to say THANK YOU!
My team is still adding up our final January fundraising numbers, but our launch made one thing very clear: this grassroots movement is building something pretty special here. And together, we are going to win this race and give working people a voice in Congress.
We’re running a campaign that centers the voices of working people — NOT the millionaires and billionaires who have rigged the system against the rest of us.
We’re able to do this because lots and lots of people chipped in what they could afford to power our movement. We’re powered by the PEOPLE, not corporate PACs, and I’m grateful for everyone’s support.
I’m so proud of how we’re funding this campaign, because change doesn’t come from the top. It comes from people like us standing together and deciding to get involved.
So thank you again for standing with our campaign. We’ve got a lot of work ahead of us in the next few months, but if all of us put a little extra on our ordinary, then extraordinary things will begin to happen in this country.
I know it, and I believe it.
With these hands,
Nina Turner

name: Holly
subject: I wish we had a representative who cared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41365387/328484522/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzdlOGQ2Mi03Mzg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V0lfUMIQXGkOdXTfmtJtpLJcRy8ZcW-sBnbz6Vu2KTE=&emci=2c1dc1e5-6784-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=737e8d62-7384-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=23594672) | |
---
Peter, Marjorie Taylor Greene is at it again...

**Yesterday, she called out Sen. Lindsey Graham for calling Trump’s suggestion of pardons for the January 6th insurrectionists “inappropriate”. **

She claimed that, “instead of actually doing something about the great injustice happening to pretrial Americans awaiting their day in court, Lindsey Graham turns his head to their abuse, votes for Joe Biden's nominees, votes for Joe Biden's Infrastructure bill, and then pretends to be a friend to President Trump.”

At the same, Marjorie Taylor Greene cries foul when folks of color protest unfair treatment by a justice system that often leaves them behind. She conveniently ignores that some County Sheriffs in her District frequently target hispanic communities with legally suspect roadblocks that oftentimes result in families being torn apart without cause. She ignores the fact that an increasing number of people in her District who can’t afford their speeding tickets are regularly **arrested** simply for the crime of being too poor to pay it. **She overlooks her constituents' needs, leaving them alone in a district that is falling behind.**

I wish that we had a representative who cared more about our District, than those who participated in an insurrection. I wish that we had a representative who would stand up for us. I will never stop fighting for our community and when I am elected I will proudly stand up for Northwest Georgia.

**[Rush $14 today if you agree that Marjorie Taylor Greene’s days in Congress are limited.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41365388/328484524/-804235033?refcode=em0202&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzdlOGQ2Mi03Mzg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V0lfUMIQXGkOdXTfmtJtpLJcRy8ZcW-sBnbz6Vu2KTE=)**

Thank you,
Holly.
|

name: Charles Graham
subject: It's Black History Month, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charles Graham for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41365632/328484829/-325589832?refcode=gra_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGE1NWY3OC03Mzg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Ob5p-qmN4Na4HACca3RVctiKdWdOapPM4V4ntj1GDM=)

| | Folks, February is Black History month – a month dedicated to acknowledging the contributions and accomplishments of Black Americans. The roots of much of the music we listen to can be traced back to enslaved folks. We can thank Black Americans for advancements in the fields of science and medicine. Even the TikTok dances that Gen Z obsess over are more often than not attributed to Black creators. (And I would know, since I’m on TikTok myself.) But, this month is just as much about acknowledging the struggles that Black Americans continue to go through. Republican lawmakers are gutting voting rights protections across the country, disproportionately limiting Black folks’ access to the ballot box. Black mothers have a higher maternal mortality rate than that of their white counterparts – and when compared to the white population, Black health outcomes are worse. Environmental racism ensures that people of color bear the brunt of climate change. Republicans at the state and local level are banning teaching Critical Race Theory in schools, a lens that educators use to teach folks about the reality of racism and racist institutions in our country. Banning CRT essentially erases Black history and Black experiences from our textbooks. As a Native American whose community has experienced violence and erasure since this country's inception, I empathize with my Black neighbors and honor their experiences this month and every month. In solidarity,
Charles
---

The roots of much of the music we listen to can be traced back to enslaved folks. We can thank Black Americans for advancements in the fields of science and medicine. Even the TikTok dances that Gen Z obsess over are more often than not attributed to Black creators. (And I would know, since I’m on TikTok myself.) But, this month is just as much about acknowledging the struggles that Black Americans continue to go through. Republican lawmakers are gutting voting rights protections across the country, disproportionately limiting Black folks’ access to the ballot box. Black mothers have a higher maternal mortality rate than that of their white counterparts – and when compared to the white population, Black health outcomes are worse. Environmental racism ensures that people of color bear the brunt of climate change. Republicans at the state and local level are banning teaching Critical Race Theory in schools, a lens that educators use to teach folks about the reality of racism and racist institutions in our country. Banning CRT essentially erases Black history and Black experiences from our textbooks. As a Native American whose community has experienced violence and erasure since this country's inception, I empathize with my Black neighbors and honor their experiences this month and every month. In solidarity, Charles | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, | | = | | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click | Paid for by Charles Graham for Congress Charles Graham for Congress 479 Bee Gee Road Lumberton, NC 28358

name: Team Gallagher
subject: WATCH: In case you missed these…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
Recapping Mike’s top interviews from January [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=9881b575cd4f41088cd5402e1e244866&_e=qfMA0NmLc26jbNLKd2dyG_aEy2pjBw1OZephN-HBD34Iyeimp2tWU4KTYTa4YH7EgxkAg92Dqc7LZ741XkMOXpVkSZw3ITsxRxabd-DdK34SoP2QFKs4t5GoMVWtw7eV_fs10pdJ3U1Vr2c8aRhD66_dVzbw_90dh-xGOg2mqLUysyTBjahgUXKX9Os6UM_DAfZOEAbyw3cNkQGkrwaHiMO6d6BZ9xWguH9Z6zKsJcuK4Wk9bhWUAMXqo1N-bjb4DFlbGGkefNNSTe9N70NUB9WK0rvPeugJWumUVUjHhsJOT-rTLf-ZhYypVFjNABOvvnuDFH7YiNW2828-AP82Sx9idB8NsA-4-sn369E5gzoGF9jc1D2ddTwtAgvq8Or2GTF4xRs1sBLKX2lxujRxblgaYSD1OVUhZ2AGSrB1vFG5qdlkdSU4ywtGxwselbHB) Peter, From standing up to yet _another_ wave of school shutdowns to confronting Biden’s weakness against Russia, Mike is fighting for the issues that matter the most to you and the future of this country.
In case you missed them, we recapped Mike’s top interviews from January below and you can****[_**support Mike here**_](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=9881b575cd4f41088cd5402e1e244866&_e=qfMA0NmLc26jbNLKd2dyG_aEy2pjBw1OZephN-HBD34Iyeimp2tWU4KTYTa4YH7EgxkAg92Dqc7LZ741XkMOXpVkSZw3ITsxRxabd-DdK34SoP2QFKs4t5GoMVWtw7eV_fs10pdJ3U1Vr2c8aRhD66_dVzbw_90dh-xGOg2mqLUysyTBjahgUXKX9Os6UM_DAfZOEAbyw3cNkQGkrwaHiMO6d6BZ9xWguH9Z6zKsJcuxpkGlQa8MRsQCB1cIFz3leNnaGRyQ33BUFnsV_HkVAMoGmdmP2fHYbj88v24qioccWWqLc1GURyMsFN2ChTByKMzDz4MjkwjIzuxJlosocKwNOuC42azW4Iy9E81jZY60_AR2hPHcClZS77MhluPptAYgCNaQx8xViMctoBYJDpmJBBHMJu1KrWlbU_fB20vek3CbyBSmLwQ_BXVBwum5)**** to keep his leadership in Congress. **ON SCHOOL CLOSURES** [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=9881b575cd4f41088cd5402e1e244866&_e=qfMA0NmLc26jbNLKd2dyGyoBCzu2L25QSjEsRf3Z1xIxiZ213qBZXqZRepsN8bGwIYQYd8iOO9dWB1KkuQwohftaBXMuhC2EFyG9qvkNo5nibaajjM-bqgSU_GsKXbumPeroS2rdcIYZQDUe6ONNvm19cNHf9UwAlJ5ubYLTJ36pAy1haIC0lxqbvQXUZA6Gb8fx7vJxh6fCQihYkC3Pquxo_-1MzGo9j9XxR23GNNo8VghvRx40jxhcGtM5K5XPlzjFyOpsuqc8VHxVlIjmN_p7JzX21Gar-Xp1kQqJMBGc49PfHu2j2MDAxvfhKapjh-9598_065AORldNjPXSQJv_OHTlQJzol_4bMXXtkHaxjalWjcYALfvvB6VNwKozwhYi4X-rX8gtu_FpyA-dt0KFJHva1i2_d914ccOGEq0%3D) _[**WATCH: “We have teachers unions who are holding our kids hostage”**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=9881b575cd4f41088cd5402e1e244866&_e=qfMA0NmLc26jbNLKd2dyGyoBCzu2L25QSjEsRf3Z1xIxiZ213qBZXqZRepsN8bGwIYQYd8iOO9dWB1KkuQwohftaBXMuhC2EFyG9qvkNo5nibaajjM-bqgSU_GsKXbumPeroS2rdcIYZQDUe6ONNvm19cNHf9UwAlJ5ubYLTJ36pAy1haIC0lxqbvQXUZA6G-HPnHeRtpSb734ItekcH7dSDpVJnKQH_DYukpInjQeoMM0DVJy39Iw0ei1Qrk5UqbtHgpf6Z_m745-DWkPPDVHMNNFglYuIur9sTB_N3JcGDBrR3fmtQB5FbMcPYj54xUHz39v0LlqZcPNHk8V5nfocPAqGZnOFxKvfSw-6tG-sI0fzcpoMKIkDjPfOVQYVktVBVkGdZuAD6B72coYt-_W4EMVBuzq87noMQcDvLb4c%3D)_
**Bottom Line:**_“_ _We have teachers unions holding our kids hostage and allowing ourselves to be dominated by fear...look at the skyrocketing cases of anxiety, depression, and suicide among kids. In case you missed them, we recapped Mike’s top interviews from January below and you can** to keep his leadership in Congress. ON SCHOOL CLOSURES Bottom Line:“ We have teachers unions holding our kids hostage and allowing ourselves to be dominated by fear...look at the skyrocketing cases of anxiety, depression, and suicide among kids. We cannot go back to this." ON BIDEN’S GLOBAL RETREAT Bottom Line:“The same team that bungled the evacuation in Afghanistan may get another shot to do the same in Ukraine. We’re one year into the Biden Administration and you can literally measure our global retreat by the number of embassies we’re evacuating... Xi Jinping is sitting there thinking that given how weak America looks, he could get away with an invasion of Taiwan.” Bottom Line:“The Commander-in-Chief really sets the tone. It's the Commander-in-Chief whose strength and consistency is what our adversaries look at. We couldn't be happier to hear this news. **But we can't forget that the last time Democrats tried to get drug price reform, one member of Congress stood in the way: Senator Kyrsten Sinema.** [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSq3dTyLOkDNu3MnFhl2fK9NiZufCi8u3oxpsUl41R-1VDCtkv0SYjxBzWmmxvvUGZ42NCaUKmWNBr_zqV2hFyG-FOSu9mQKj9M-R-wkSmJrVrkEuI7QZZ65XKyOtRd1BRRtpx0juOGDJjc0UhTVNxX0qRhrXCwusrVB72lU03iXIzyZOJYe1Ox4MrfpNXNi4UtW42hObjGEVFOBYVPBTiFs3yuK_bZGiZ_XHbzSqZGJITWHEi0EHSjxdy3-twcU7NjiKpQbSkEaVYWGudIYd84E2Xl_cXkyiP6dBy82GN4uQ5St9z5erV8eBfBQWTt79CG4R1hSvYzbVEADvXQYMXNHJbFgnxeZGTAi_ZyhI49scEX3DyuWjZqx2tkTd6aB1IKAKyXs5YrikqVdadgeBHew/3j8/FkV-Vag1RT24Z7PBdbrJyw/h1/1qaqWjHlhl7HY_X4H341mgzwb11IahVC4enlWoAPqSk) Peter, we can't allow her to obstruct this again. And now, with this legislation coming back around — **who knows what Big Pharma will pull to make sure that Kyrsten Sinema obstructs her Democratic colleagues' agenda?** We can't stand on the sidelines to wait to find out, Peter — and we need to act now to build the infrastructure we'll need to defeat Kyrsten Sinema. **[Please, chip in $5 to the Primary Sinema Project today. clean_body: To say that Kyrsten Sinema is deep in the pocket of Big Pharma is an understatement. | | | We have a big opportunity on our hands, Peter: Recent reports note that a group of 40 House Democrats — many in battleground districts — are anxious to speed up passage of a huge package of drug pricing reforms, similar to the ones that were included in President Biden's social spending plan. We couldn't be happier to hear this news. But we can't forget that the last time Democrats tried to get drug price reform, one member of Congress stood in the way: Senator Kyrsten Sinema. Peter, we can't allow her to obstruct this again. That means we need to do everything we can to hold her accountable to do the right thing. To say that Kyrsten Sinema is deep in the pocket of Big Pharma is an understatement. As of November 2021, reports showed that Center Forward — a dark money group funded by powerful drug lobby Pharmaceutical Research and Manufacturers of America (PhRMA) — spent $1.2 million since September 2021 to build up support for Senator Sinema. In turn, she helped gut the Democrats' drug pricing plan from the Build Back Better Act, blatantly refusing to keep her campaign promise to millions of Arizonans to lower drug prices. And now, with this legislation coming back around — who knows what Big Pharma will pull to make sure that Kyrsten Sinema obstructs her Democratic colleagues' agenda? We can't stand on the sidelines to wait to find out, Peter — and we need to act now to build the infrastructure we'll need to defeat Kyrsten Sinema. More soon, The Primary Sinema Project team | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC** | | Sent via . name: Troy Newman, Operation Rescue
subject: Sign the National Petition to Defund Planned Parenthood
body:
Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqe3p8bfqlpo33mq8fdmdcsianc66stbsbq4pee0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j69oj4c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf3db36soe0oj5msqn1ppjcjin6ctnmprr8s3gcjj71phjespr2sr4suqj1c3mm1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8pmcdj2mdiefclhcor61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6cgiqhfts4q4rjdjvl47pth3uij43sdmetf5pdg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j69oj4c3h2bs) Fellow Pro-Life American, Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I helped uncover their cash-for-baby-body parts scheme five years ago. But just because the radical left is suppressing content online and refuses to tell the truth about the radical abortion lobby ... that doesn’t mean they’ve cleaned up their act. **Far from it! ** While I was exposing Planned Parenthood’s crimes, and was found liable in a San Francisco court for $17 million in damages in a historic pro-life case, the federal government — with partial funding of Anthony Fauci’s National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases — **_was supporting research to graft the scalps of unborn babies who were just 17 to 20 weeks old onto lab rats and mice to see if they’d keep growing._** [**We MUST demand that Congress act NOW to Defund Planned Parenthood and end the senseless murder of unborn children and STOP using these innocent lives in the name of "research." Please sign the petition right away!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlnabl0tvsnk7p3oguqdqc9imd05vmi55uoa4u5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j69oj4c3h2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zacdjljbvnm2c9icjm5a1dbn2lphr7ieln66qepg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j69oj4c3h2bs) Right now, the radical abortionists are coming after life in new and horrific ways. They’re passing legislation aimed at expanding access to late-term abortion and infanticide, and they’re ramping up the number of pill mills across the nation. On top of it all, they’re working to **DESTROY** threats to their business — like me. Not long ago, they won a hard-fought battle against me in court, which cost Operation Rescue hundreds of thousands of dollars and hundreds of hours of our time. My team and I are on the ground every day exposing the radical abortion lobby and **SHUTTING THEM DOWN** , but now that Planned Parenthood has picked up their pace — and is now focused on opening pill mills over surgical facilities — we must ensure that Congress does their part by taking away all federal funding from these monsters. [**To help save innocent lives and ensure our tax dollars don’t fund Planned Parenthood in ANY manner, I need you to sign this national petition today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgv3c7hpph3et4i113185gvseejv4bvr84ctt028_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j69oj4c3h2bs) Over the last ten years, the number of surgical abortion clinics **decreased by 35 percent**. While this is fantastic — and in part thanks to the work we do at Operation Rescue to expose the abortion industry, shut down dangerous facilities, and put abortionists out of work — what’s very troubling is that Planned Parenthood has recently _shifted strategy._ [**_Medication abortion facilities —_** **_which are dispensaries for abortion-inducing drugs — have become the reliable “cash cow” for the abortion industry. And they’re popping up at an alarming rate!_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmduffiicck75m4p0v9tukt944uhg5pfhpf6h030_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j69oj4c3h2bs) That is why we must **INCREASE** our efforts this year to ensure that we can keep up with the pace of murder-pill mills AND pressure Congress to take every taxpayer dollar away from Planned Parenthood. [**Please help today by signing this national petition. It will only take a moment of your time and the impact will be huge.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z10mm8b2eo3kuunn20muuplfmv5rgee8i1j14aj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j69oj4c3h2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z45kqieqjj90dbvfudb4g42kgu2kane37i7cpih8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3j69oj4c3h2bs) Thank you for your support, God bless you, Troy Newman President P.O. Box 782888 • Wichita, KS 67278 ****

clean_body: You’re invited Friend, I am excited to announce that we are launching our BRAND NEW Trump Election Year Donor Card. from all around the Nation will be THE MOST important group of supporters when it comes to our efforts to WIN BACK our Republican Majority this November, and I need YOU to be a part of it. The Democrats will be coming after us like never before, and it's absolutely critical that my best supporters are ready for whatever comes. To join, all you have to do is contribute $45 and you'll automatically become an and receive your PERSONALIZED Card. I've asked my team to send me the names of the FIRST round of Patriots who step up and join before 11:59 PM TONIGHT, and I expect to see your name on there. Don't let me down. Thank you, Donald J. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41366267/328487456/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjJmMDlhYi03Njg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4uy-hPLDHlJIIYjrADw2YsQJWa90qoBTIMC9lNlkoSs=)

Hi team,

It's been a hectic couple of days over here for our campaign. Between rushing to make our end-of-month fundraising goal and reports of new district maps – I almost forgot to reach out and report back to everyone.

With the help of grassroots activists like you, we reached our January fundraising goal right before the books closed on us.

It was close, but what's important is that we made the mark. Now, in the face of a majorly consequential electoral shift, we're in an excellent spot to meet the moment.

So, thank you, team. Asking for financial support isn't the easiest thing for me, but I know deciding to invest your hard-earned money to drive progress alongside me isn't any easier. But time and again, this team comes through for me and pushes this campaign over the finish line.

Make no mistake: we couldn't have reached our end-of-month goal without you – thank you.

This week will continue to be on the hectic side, but when all is said and done, I think we'll be closer than ever before to flipping the 1st blue.

Take care,

Kara Hahn

| Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a _must win_ for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help.**Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress!** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41366268/328487457/-2026774271?refcode=em22_220202_eomty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjJmMDlhYi03Njg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4uy-hPLDHlJIIYjrADw2YsQJWa90qoBTIMC9lNlkoSs=&recurring=1) ** **[DONATE ONCE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2202_email_hahn?refcode=em22_220202_eomty) **

clean_body: | = Hi team, It's been a hectic couple of days over here for our campaign. Between rushing to make our end-of-month fundraising goal and reports of new district maps – I almost forgot to reach out and report back to everyone. With the help of grassroots activists like you, we reached our January fundraising goal right before the books closed on us. It was close, but what's important is that we made the mark. Now, in the face of a majorly consequential electoral shift, we're in an excellent spot to meet the moment. So, thank you, team. Asking for financial support isn't the easiest thing for me, but I know deciding to invest your hard-earned money to drive progress alongside me isn't any easier. But time and again, this team comes through for me and pushes this campaign over the finish line. Make no mistake: we couldn't have reached our end-of-month goal without you – thank you. This week will continue to be on the hectic side, but when all is said and done, I think we'll be closer than ever before to flipping the 1st blue. Take care, Kara Hahn | Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a must win for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help.Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress! *

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Biden should consider 'all possible candidates' for Supreme Court
body:
New poll shows what we already know is true
---
| | | | | | Volume 26 | January 26, 2022
---
|
---
| All possible candidates should be considered
---
| Joe Biden said the next Supreme Court justice he nominates will be a black woman. He is placing race and gender as the top two qualifications of his nominee to fill the vacancy left by Justice Stephen Breyer. This is patently absurd and antithetical to everything for which this country stands. I am appalled.
On the contrary, we are a country where we are should demand to be judged by, what Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. said, "the content of our character, not the color of our skin." We want the best people on the Supreme Court who will uphold the Constitution--this is a position that should be granted by merit, not superficial differences. This perspective is one of many I shared with George Brauchler on Monday.
And I'm not alone. An ABC/IPSOS poll shows that 76% of those surveyed believe that Biden should consider all possible candidates--that's more than three out of four people. The poll also demonstrated that little more than one in four nonwhite Americans want Biden to consider only black women for the vacancy. In other words, most people agree that the position should be filled based on merit, not skin color.
By the way, the poll also showed that the majority people are unhappy with how Biden is handling a myriad of other issues. The percentage of those who DISAPPROVE of his management are as follows: 64% on immigration, 56% on economic recovery, 69% on gun violence, 64% on crime, 56% on the situation with Russia and Ukraine, and 69% on inflation.
Americans have had enough of Biden and enough of one-party rule. By sending me to Congress, I will work on solutions that shift our country's direction in a way that serves us, not the elites in Washington. I will vote against reckless spending that is driving up inflation, I will formulate sound foreign policy, and I will make sure our Second Amendment rights are preserved. Please join our team by donating today. Together we can course-correct the direction our country is heading.
---
| | |
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
This week we continued with petition signing and celebration of small business with our Brewery Tour of CD7.

Check our schedule below, and come out to see me, talk about issues important to you and if you are a registered Republican living in CD7, sign our petition.

This week I was on the George Brauchler show where we discussed the Supreme Court and my time in the military in Iraq and Afghanistan. I will join Dan Caplis on Thursday at 5:30 p.m.

We can really feel the momentum building in this campaign. We hope to see you on the campaign trail as together we find solutions so some of our nation's--and Colorado's--biggest issues.
| |
---
| | |
---
| Every bit can help
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization.
There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today.
Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for Colorado Staff

We continue our series of Micro Brewery Meet & Greet/Petition parties throughout Jefferson County.
At each event you can purchase fine craft beers while taking advantage of the opportunity to talk one-on-one with Erik Aadland. Ask questions, discuss the campaign or talk about beer!

We acknowledge that Coloradans get out and about in 10" of snow, but we'll have a lot more fun without the stress. So we will not be at 6 & 40 Brewing or Great Frontier Brewery this evening
Let's have a drink by the fire tonight and get together next when we reschedule these fine breweries
Stay Warm, everybody!

| Friend,

The crime wave sweeping the country is impacting all communities. Murders are up 44% since President Trump was in office, and last month alone, 24 police officers were shot in the line of duty, leaving four of our bravest dead.

This is not a coincidence. The Defund the Police policies and rhetoric of the Democrat Party as well as the soft on crime policies of the Biden Administration are directly responsible for this unprecedented crime wave. [If you support the Men and Women in Blue, Join my Team today!](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=161fb503dd&e=598f6aa24c) [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=54c75e5b44&e=598f6aa24c)

The days of violent criminals being released on bail will be over. We will always DEFEND, not Defund the police. **[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=18e4addd3c&e=598f6aa24c)** Thank you,

As we bring January to a close and begin what’s sure to be an even more eventful February, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you. I’m happy to let you know that we reached our fundraising goal for the month, and we’re off to the strong start we needed this year thanks to this amazing grassroots team. Supporting our movement this early in the year puts us in the best position possible to elect more progressive Democrats nationwide. name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]Thank you.

I wanted to reach out to make sure you know how grateful I am for your support. By joining our team, you’re supporting our efforts to create meaningful bipartisan progress and make long-lasting change in this country.

There’s still a long way to go before Election Day. We’re facing a tough challenge in November, and it’ll take a ton of hard work and dedication to fight back. I need to know that you’re in this fight with me.

All that to say: I’m confident that our movement is strong enough to stand up for Jersey values. This team continues to impress me, and the past month is no exception. I can’t wait to see what we accomplish together this year.

That’s all for now,

Josh

P.S. If you didn’t have the opportunity to support our campaign last month, please consider clicking here to chip in now. please consider clicking here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2202?amount=20]
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Tony Evers
subject: Wisconsin Republicans vs. American democracy
body:
Derek,

For most of my life, no matter where someone stood on the political spectrum, I used to be able to assume that almost everyone I met agreed that here in America, folks should have the right and ability to vote and make their voice heard.

Sadly, in 2022, I can no longer say that. A radical well-funded special interest group and my opponent, Rebecca Kleefisch, both filed lawsuits with the goal of banning absentee ballot drop-off boxes in the state of Wisconsin.

A judge took their side by ruling to ban absentee drop-off boxes. Even worse, a group of her close advisors and donors were caught trying to send fake electors to swing the 2020 election against the will of voters.

Derek, our democracy is under attack from my radical opponents and the radical anti-democracy special interest groups backing their campaigns. Can I count on you to please split a donation here between my campaign and CommonGood to help me fight back and defend our voting rights here in Wisconsin?
[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2022_evers?refcode=CGVA_20220202_Evers]

We’re going to do everything in our power to protect ballot drop-off boxes and ensure that all eligible Wisconsinites have the right to vote. Beyond this, they are also working to move the counting of the vote into partisan hands and undermine the entire integrity of our elections. Without me as governor, they would have already done it.

The challenge we are facing goes beyond partisan politics — it strikes right to the heart of what it means to be an American.
Together, we can rise to this challenge and defend our democracy for future generations — who are counting on us to stay strong.
If you can afford it, please split a donation here between my campaign and CommonGood to help me fight back and defend our democracy!

[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2022_evers?refcode=CGVA_20220202_Evers]
Onward,
Governor Tony Evers, Wisconsin
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2022_evers?refcode=CGVA_20220202_Evers [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2022_evers?refcode=CGVA_20220202_Evers]

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215
If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f37e10ad-6e84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/e4d2e7b2-7684-ec11-94f6-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGQyZTdiMi03Njg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_IYfolPua8NAebpzJSZ30WPAx8itcfnV2W7no7IgBh0=&id=108609855 .

subject: Democrat Approval Ratings are Plummeting
body:
The numbers back it up - support for top Democrats like Joe Biden and Steve Sisolak continues to fall.

| Peter,
The numbers back it up - support for top Democrats like Joe Biden and Steve Sisolak continues to fall. We know that our current leaders aren't making OUR rights and safety the priority!
Biden's approval rating is falling fast after inflation reached levels not seen in 40 years, hurting Nevadans and Americans of all walks of life.
And polls here in the Silver State show that only 38 PERCENT believe that Sisolak is doing a good job, too...
All of this just goes to show what we've known all along:
Folks are tired of the Big Government control, the crime spikes, and the economic hardships. [It's time for proven leaders, not failed politicians!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00134NViS4eD_l84GbmNzip4naQFcwvFWSldh2oF13oeYVLaBoOeN8v45vsB7uLGDv4SCYdZzG9IzeLIPVd4tCEsjaiwsUoqLgdZ4W8bx0eixVVKo5ltEF9w13xKqIuVLNNuMZKAc0Wxy3H0-6ss-rpzzuXdFDVO-fo573up4Oq-uChGevTWdDVKEbRwceIQaLonqAOamiDpel-fH7MNJbtZtSiYMJ4m5HJpPHQQX225bI=&c=JtCtbtoVrBf0xNEfbZIJ8SoC0bIia-OtCBl1dVDAv_T12tDtHl0umw==&ch=PliScmaGeZOMKtEtSonlgj113j0d9T5oQdLezLVSMXieWNLsyVX4Ww==)
