name: Giffords.org
subject: Please sign Gabby’s pledge
disclaimer_text: paid for by the gun lobby
body:
If you follow the news in Washington, D.C., it doesn’t seem like there’s a lot of legislative attention being paid to gun violence prevention these days.
#

Friends,
If you follow the news coming out of Washington, D.C., it doesn’t seem like there’s a lot of legislative attention being paid to gun violence prevention these days.
While the House passed a universal background checks bill, our progress is being blocked in the 50/50 Senate by politicians who are bought and paid for by the gun lobby.
And that is a tragedy, because gun deaths in this country are on the rise. Mass shootings—whether ones that generate headlines or ones that happen in homes, often linked to domestic violence—are still happening.
So from time-to-time, it’s important that we send a message loud and clear to Washington politicians that we want action, and if we don’t get it, then we will act.
That’s what Gabby’s Pledge is all about. We’re looking for 15,000 people to add their name to the pledge THIS WEEK. So we’re asking:
[**Sign Gabby’s Pledge: If Congress does not take meaningful action to make our communities safer from gun violence, then we will do everything in our power to elect a Congress that will in November.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/gabby_pledge_pet?source=em220202-1-30&t=1&akid=1520%2E3935704%2Ex7VseV)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/gabby_pledge_pet?source=em220202-1-30&t=2&akid=1520%2E3935704%2Ex7VseV)**
It is the sad reality that gun lobby politicians are often motivated by fear. You see that in many of the debates today. This one is no different.
For a long time, it was fear of the gun lobby that drove either inaction, or negative action.
Now we must send a message that members of Congress have something else to fear if they don’t take action on gun violence:
Us.
With courage,
Team Giffords
**[SIGN GABBY’S PLEDGE](https://go.giffords.org/signup/gabby_pledge_pet?source=em220202-1-30&t=3&akid=1520%2E3935704%2Ex7VseV)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1520%2E3935704%2Ex7VseV) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
I’m excited to hear from you! |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41366800/328490376/2058529741?refcode=AU_DVA_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGM4ZDVkYS03Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WSpZE1GMgELROWfSIoE2Usbpcvp8ET9lKrIz_Avk3yE=&emci=c8bcc047-7884-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=1dc8d5da-7b84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=5086640)

Peter, it’s officially February, and I wanted to take a minute to express how much I appreciate your support. Thanks to grassroots supporters from all across Pennsylvania and the country, chipping into emails like this one, we met our January grassroots donation goal. **Now that we have the first big deadline of the year behind us, I want to know: What priorities are most important to you?** I asked my team to create a short priorities survey — and I’d love to get your feedback. [**Can you take a moment now to complete our February Issues Survey?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41366801/328490377/667659483?refcode=AU_DVA_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGM4ZDVkYS03Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WSpZE1GMgELROWfSIoE2Usbpcvp8ET9lKrIz_Avk3yE=&emci=c8bcc047-7884-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=1dc8d5da-7b84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=5086640) | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41366802/328490378/667659483?refcode=AU_DVA_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGM4ZDVkYS03Yjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WSpZE1GMgELROWfSIoE2Usbpcvp8ET9lKrIz_Avk3yE=&emci=c8bcc047-7884-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=1dc8d5da-7b84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=5086640)
---
I won’t sugarcoat it: We’re going to need to put in work to win this election. Our Republican opponents like Dr. Oz are already up on the airwaves – and they show no sign of slowing down.
But I know that if we work together, we _will_ flip this seat in 2022.

clean_body: I’m excited to hear from you! | Peter, it’s officially February, and I wanted to take a minute to express how much I appreciate your support. Thanks to grassroots supporters from all across Pennsylvania and the country, chipping into emails like this one, we met our January grassroots donation goal. Now that we have the first big deadline of the year behind us, I want to know: What priorities are most important to you? I asked my team to create a short priorities survey — and I’d love to get your feedback. | I won’t sugarcoat it: We’re going to need to put in work to win this election. Our Republican opponents like Dr. Oz are already up on the airwaves – and they show no sign of slowing down. But I know that if we work together, we will flip this seat in 2022. With gratitude, Val = Val Arkoosh for U.S. Senate P.O. | | Derek — **Chalk up another win for the Brick Wall Caucus.** The Brick Wall Caucus has been working hard to defend our progress and protect Virginians from Glenn Youngkin and his far-right administration’s radical and harmful agenda, but the Virginia GOP are doing their best to try and tear us down. The Senate Committee in charge of approving Glenn Youngkin’s cabinet nominees just struck down his pick for Secretary of Natural and Historic Resources, Andrew Wheeler, the Trump EPA Chief sued more than six times for damages his policies caused to the Chesapeake Bay. **Now, Republican members of the General Assembly are threatening to hold up two Supreme Court nominees unless Andrew Wheeler is confirmed as the next Secretary of Natural and Historic Resources.** The full Senate votes on Andrew Wheeler’s nomination later this week and it’s going to be close. With a 21-19 split, **we need to show the Brick Wall Caucus that we’ve got their back and the rest of the Senate that Virginians will not compromise on protecting our environment and combating climate change.** **[Chip in to help Virginia Democrats send a message to our representatives in Richmond. clean_body: ...protecting our environment | | | Derek — Chalk up another win for the Brick Wall Caucus. The Brick Wall Caucus has been working hard to defend our progress and protect Virginians from Glenn Youngkin and his far-right administration’s radical and harmful agenda, but the Virginia GOP are doing their best to try and tear us down. The Senate Committee in charge of approving Glenn Youngkin’s cabinet nominees just struck down his pick for Secretary of Natural and Historic Resources, Andrew Wheeler, the Trump EPA Chief sued more than six times for damages his policies caused to the Chesapeake Bay. Now, Republican members of the General Assembly are threatening to hold up two Supreme Court nominees unless Andrew Wheeler is confirmed as the next Secretary of Natural and Historic Resources. The full Senate votes on Andrew Wheeler’s nomination later this week and it’s going to be close. With a 21-19 split, we need to show the Brick Wall Caucus that we’ve got their back and the rest of the Senate that Virginians will not compromise on protecting our environment and combating climate change. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********=****** ******=****** ******=****** ******=****** Onward, DPVA HQ **********=********** **********=************ | | Click here to . | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. name: Team WisGOP
subject: ICYMI: Fort McCoy exposes Joe Biden’s foreign policy failures
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
As Afghan refugees leave Fort McCoy, Joe Biden's failure is on full display.

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_fort_mccoy_icymi&n=1)
---
Friend -- In case you missed it, as Afghan refugees leave Fort McCoy to resettle across the country, the aftermath has put Joe Biden’s foreign policy failures on full display. This weekend, the Washington Examiner reported on the footprint left behind – trash, food shortages, and few spare beds in local hospitals. [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=GjwzQmjoNJNKZ7-eUAZR_CG3wJbQir4aa4SlMdbQUN3AbMGwuTO0s0ZldOvChNlaWNubjv3HMRBwyv6HNMWi-rLWCePWlEf5uxQ4exiYoCwGS4hxWI_9OXZbD5LnDExaYpr5-0f7iSVhqDU7MOMYJkI-yP8X3nDlsfxAZPRGCn8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_fort_mccoy_icymi&n=2) According to the [Washington Examiner](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=GjwzQmjoNJNKZ7-eUAZR_CG3wJbQir4aa4SlMdbQUN3AbMGwuTO0s0ZldOvChNlaWNubjv3HMRBwyv6HNMWi-rLWCePWlEf5uxQ4exiYoCwGS4hxWI_9OXZbD5LnDExaYpr5-0f7iSVhqDU7MOMYJkI-yP8X3nDlsfxAZPRGCn8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_fort_mccoy_icymi&n=3):
> _Is the federal government comparable to a tenant trashing a bed-and-breakfast on the way out?_ _After five months, the final Afghan refugees at Fort McCoy, an Army base in Monroe County, Wisconsin, are leaving to start new lives throughout the United States. Residents seek a return to normal after the Biden administration housed 12,600 refugees at the base and brought in 1,500 government workers to care for them — almost one-quarter of the entire county's population._ _This resulted in large amounts of trash, empty store shelves, restaurants without food, and few spare beds in hospitals and hotels. The costs borne by the county equal at least $1 million, officials said._ _“We are more than ready — ready to have our motel rooms back, our hospitals back, and our doctors and dentists,” said Wally Habhegger, vice chairman of the Monroe County Board of Supervisors. “Literally what they did is drop an entire city on us. And they expected us to absorb the infrastructure.”_ _Monroe County supports the base and its service members. What residents didn’t like is the way the government dropped the refugees there without discussing the plan with local officials or even the local congressman, Rep. Tom Tiffany, a Republican._ _“We heard just like the rest of the world heard — on the news,” Habhegger said. "So the county sheriff talked to a military police official and was told, 'They will have zero impact on you. You won’t even know they are there.'”_ _Yet some 78 pregnant Afghan women gave birth at the installation, and the military's normal supplier ran short of needed supplies. Workers from the base picked local grocery stores and Walmarts clean of baby food and diapers, forcing residents to drive 30 miles to make purchases, said Monroe County Administrator Tina Osterberg._
While Democrats like Tony Evers and Tammy Baldwin dismissed concerns at Fort McCoy as [“dog whistle crap”](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=zveC7zroragI2qrXZZ9Nap4F-CQ2uyO0E-jba7-X_0LC7HJdA6zgaTzzmMa9jFqNhkfcpvMjD1MIpsWVA5xpK3ieDx3qIymUWnxrgzUm9oNaQqUZVas0W6qHzjiSbg5v&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_fort_mccoy_icymi&n=4) and “false,” Republicans like Senator Johnson [raised alarm](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=ez1BnRg01gPGR4qyG5PO2LV_3pMbUHIlFBrsZcCPouOIQe3KIfIZVRfAg1dkzqQ8eJx5JyNz4CyQhxK0UNM0C1R38pT7IWXfJLrSYayBame7B1mVUFeDPZjmNq6w4qb73AdhC2GaAFJNhqLEkCQXVY8O2a1sL_qWZVezK8jfsd8myqXY_DR1rwAAgNvY_Gkp&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_fort_mccoy_icymi&n=5) from the beginning over a vetting process with a large potential for shortfalls – and ultimately, two refugees were arrested for violent crimes.__ This is just the latest example of Joe Biden’s failed foreign policy that gifted the Taliban with U.S. military equipment, emboldened Putin, kowtowed to China, and ultimately made Wisconsinites less safe. What community will be impacted next? Read more from Washington Examiner [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=GjwzQmjoNJNKZ7-eUAZR_CG3wJbQir4aa4SlMdbQUN3AbMGwuTO0s0ZldOvChNlaWNubjv3HMRBwyv6HNMWi-rLWCePWlEf5uxQ4exiYoCwGS4hxWI_9OXZbD5LnDExaYpr5-0f7iSVhqDU7MOMYJkI-yP8X3nDlsfxAZPRGCn8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_fort_mccoy_icymi&n=6). \- Team WisGOP

clean_body: As Afghan refugees leave Fort McCoy, Joe Biden's failure is on full display. | Friend -- In case you missed it, as Afghan refugees leave Fort McCoy to resettle across the country, the aftermath has put Joe Biden’s foreign policy failures on full display. This weekend, the Washington Examiner reported on the footprint left behind – trash, food shortages, and few spare beds in local hospitals. According to the : Is the federal government comparable to a tenant trashing a bed-and-breakfast on the way out? After five months, the final Afghan refugees at Fort McCoy, an Army base in Monroe County, Wisconsin, are leaving to start new lives throughout the United States. Residents seek a return to normal after the Biden administration housed 12,600 refugees at the base and brought in 1,500 government workers to care for them — almost one-quarter of the entire county's population. This resulted in large amounts of trash, empty store shelves, restaurants without food, and few spare beds in hospitals and hotels. The costs borne by the county equal at least $1 million, officials said. “We are more than ready — ready to have our motel rooms back, our hospitals back, and our doctors and dentists,” said Wally Habhegger, vice chairman of the Monroe County Board of Supervisors. “Literally what they did is drop an entire city on us. And they expected us to absorb the infrastructure.” Monroe County supports the base and its service members. What residents didn’t like is the way the government dropped the refugees there without discussing the plan with local officials or even the local congressman, Rep. Tom Tiffany, a Republican. “We heard just like the rest of the world heard — on the news,” Habhegger said. "So the county sheriff talked to a military police official and was told, 'They will have zero impact on you. You won’t even know they are there.'” Yet some 78 pregnant Afghan women gave birth at the installation, and the military's normal supplier ran short of needed supplies. Workers from the base picked local grocery stores and Walmarts clean of baby food and diapers, forcing residents to drive 30 miles to make purchases, said Monroe County Administrator Tina Osterberg. While Democrats like Tony Evers and Tammy Baldwin dismissed concerns at Fort McCoy as and “false,” Republicans like Senator Johnson from the beginning over a vetting process with a large potential for shortfalls – and ultimately, two refugees were arrested for violent crimes. This is just the latest example of Joe Biden’s failed foreign policy that gifted the Taliban with U.S. military equipment, emboldened Putin, kowtowed to China, and ultimately made Wisconsinites less safe. What community will be impacted next? Read more from Washington Examiner . \- Team WisGOP Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin. Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee. 148 E Johnson St, Madison, WI 53703 | (608) 257 - 4765

| | Peter,

When I was stationed overseas with the Army and the CIA, I saw firsthand just how fragile democracy can be.

While it may not seem apparent, a Russian invasion of Ukraine would have a negative impact on us right here at home. The economic disruption would send our energy prices soaring, worsen inflation, and damage our economy.

Russia has worked to subvert American democracy — undermining faith in our voting systems and spreading mass disinformation campaigns. **A looming invasion of Ukraine threatens our national security and economic stability.**

Many in the Republican party have come to admire Putin — a symbol of authoritarianism and the hard right.

Instead, America’s strength flows from its values — its respect for the individual and its commitment to work toward a common good. We depend on a clear-eyed view of threats, and a common effort to face them head-on.

That’s why the American people need leaders who understand the threats we face — both domestic and international — and will stand united with our allies.

If we work together, I’m confident we can win this critical seat and steer our democracy safely through this storm. [**But I need your support to bring my leadership, experience, and discipline to Congress. name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Thank you! We have fantastic news to share:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
We learned that our campaign not only outraised every Republican in this race last quarter, but we raised more Ted Budd and Pat McCrory combined.
#

Friends -
I wanted to reach out to say thank you and share some fantastic news!
First off, we hit our January fundraising goal. That was great news, and we could not have done it without the outpouring of grassroots support from people across the country. But that’s not even the best news!
We also learned that our campaign not only outraised every Republican in this race last quarter, but we raised more than our top two opponents, Ted Budd and Pat McCrory, _combined._
It is abundantly clear that North Carolinians are tired of status quo politicians and are backing our campaign and the change we can deliver together.
This is just the start. There’s a lot more work ahead of us. But in a year that pundits want to say will be hard for Democrats, we are proving that the momentum and enthusiasm are behind us. Our unity and ability to lay the groundwork for victory in North Carolina are a huge advantage while Republicans attack each other and race to the bottom.
Together, we can flip this seat in November and deliver meaningful progress for our families.
\- Cheri Beasley
It’s critical we keep up our momentum and start this month strong. There are a number of right-wing super PACs and special interests who want to stop Cheri Beasley from winning and shaking up the status quo in Washington.
**[If you can, please make a contribution today. This campaign is powered by people like you — not a dime of corporate PAC money.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220202-2-ma&refcode2=346.357359.Mz0y0K&t=2&akid=346%2E357359%2EMz0y0K)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220202-2-ma&refcode2=346.357359.Mz0y0K&t=3&akid=346%2E357359%2EMz0y0K)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=346%2E357359%2EMz0y0K). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=346%2E357359%2EMz0y0K). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=346_357359_Mz0y0K&akid=346%2E357359%2EMz0y0K) today to help us make history.

name: Erica Smith
subject: I’m SO SO SO grateful 😭❤️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Hey it’s Erica. I wanted to
reach out on behalf of myself and the whole campaign team to personally
give you a warm thank you!!

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/37934?t=1001&akid=842%2E3698%2EGRajm8 ][IMG]

Our campaign could not have gotten this far without YOU. Not a single part of this campaign
would’ve been possible without the incredibly generous grassroots support
of hundreds of folks across the country who chipped in to our campaign
this January.

Building momentum for any campaign is important — but what I'm most proud
of is that we're running this thing the right way.

We’re not accepting a dime of super PAC, corporate, or fossil fuel money
to make this campaign happen. And that means we really do mean it when we
say that this campaign is powered by all of YOU.

We ended January strong, but I can’t emphasize this enough: We have to
continue to scale our campaign as we get closer to our primary date in
May. We don’t have any time to waste so I have to ask:

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/37934?t=1002&akid=842%2E3698%2EGRajm8 ]If you’re able to spare anything, can you make a contribution today to
help ensure we have the resources we need to build the strongest campaign
possible? I would be deeply grateful for any support you can give today.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/37940?refcode=em20220202-842&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=842%2E3698%2EGRajm8 ]Donate $5

We’re just getting started!

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,

Erica Smith ❤️

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220202-842-footer&t=1022&refcode2=842_3698_GRajm8&akid=842%2E3698%2EGRajm8

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=842%2E3698%2EGRajm8

name: Rebecca Kleefisch
subject: I just commissioned a new poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Rebecca

Fellow American,

I have been blessed with many amazing opportunities, but I can say without a doubt that running for the Senate in Georgia is one of the greatest honors of my life.

That's why we're giving this race 110% Every. Single. Day.

Having said that, we're running against the top Senate fundraiser in the country. In the last three months, he raised more than $9.8 million!

Since he began raising money for his re-election campaign last winter, **he's brought in more than $53.5 MILLION.**

While this is a tremendous amount of money, we've never been known to back down from a good challenge.

**[Team Herschel needs 340 conservatives to make a donation of at least $3 before midnight tonight.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7b5c6a8bb7a2439dab257ba531341843&_e=JO3FTLos9Dx-wRVG27I7J1xMzNeUBXEfs8NDIO7KyTm_zN7MzLWdiK09UuejBXtT2cQQH2mmub8d6Mar4GNx3rfrhX9g_3ZcwGRfooIPwaXEEcLOb2JnKvf1O8Uy8ev1iVD3mTo8gkyz-tbLKIyWRfA03a8xj-FqJQrJjxp9w4aWd5kfReQK2jchV6xDSt8-P47KO-Wi4DsDlwFRqeWCOLsht2zcdz78KIdmnXC9Iw9PyRF9wJVZ--9C_i9cNbOoDGnb5hG9tMZCHnrcopjSRenYFMx1gmQxIkACFFlz_Lc9NYTmTF5BnAAxYSP3-jac44JDB1f6WzhH1gyf4vVtKZDdIWDi4qujkohGT-v0yo5p8N-cHnecOYPorOp_r4hygAraheNMp1q8cbeRXNV4NmtjrCN-icXs86RVVg66aWzLBZXKVwvGweP637eRqX7yy5qyMsYRlzaqAdmDDIZB5e_Ay9wISmB64p0b4igERAsoUe06XvrtxTuvG0KpRqS1)**

While our opponent may have a fundraising lead - for now, we've got the support of the voters. But we need to narrow the fundraising gap.

Would you please help us knock this out one donation at a time? _Starting with your contribution of $3 before midnight?_

clean_body: My Democrat opponent has brought in more than $53.5 MILLION. My Democrat opponent has brought in more than $53.5 MILLION. | Fellow American, I have been blessed with many amazing opportunities, but I can say without a doubt that running for the Senate in Georgia is one of the greatest honors of my life. That's why we're giving this race 110% Every. Single. Day. Having said that, we're running against the top Senate fundraiser in the country. In the last three months, he raised more than $9.8 million! Since he began raising money for his re-election campaign last winter, he's brought in more than $53.5 MILLION. While this is a tremendous amount of money, we've never been known to back down from a good challenge. While our opponent may have a fundraising lead - for now, we've got the support of the voters. But we need to narrow the fundraising gap. Would you please help us knock this out one donation at a time? Starting with your contribution of $3 before midnight? Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: John Lira
subject: Powered by YOU
body:
Peter, I want to take the time to personally thank you for your support.
As you know, this campaign is running on grassroots support and donations — because I’m here to represent YOU, not corporate interests — and you stepped up in a big way for our end of month goals.
I especially want to thank everyone who donated to help us reach our goals and finish January out strong. Your donations are helping us ramp up our organizing efforts as we prepare for primary voting to begin.
With early voting getting closer every day — less than 12 days from now — your support is more important now than ever.
If you weren’t able to donate over the weekend, there’s still time to support the movement. If you have already donated, you know how important this moment is to our campaign and you can double your impact. Can you chip in right now to support the campaign in the weeks leading up to the primary election? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220202?refcode=em20220202]
Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220202?refcode=em20220202]Winning this seat for TX-23 comes down to what we will be able to do in the next few weeks and your support is what powers our team to do everything it takes to win.
Your support means the world to me, Peter, and I am ready to fight for the legislation that will support you and your family. Legislation that will protect access to healthcare, help small businesses, and build an economy that works for everyone.
If you haven’t had a chance to donate to support this campaign yet, chip in whatever you can now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220202?refcode=em20220202]
If you have already donated, thank you so much again! However, there’s still plenty of work to be done. Make another contribution and double your impact to power our campaign through the primaries. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220202?refcode=em20220202]
Let’s get to work,
John Lira
Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220202?refcode=em20220202]https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

John Lira for Congress
1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120

San Antonio, TX 78220

name: Troy Newman, Operation Rescue
subject: Sign the National Petition to Defund Planned Parenthood
body:
Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I help
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zvkt0ehs9n28icl760ln55j5a28gtlo9u2nh1nag_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboj8sj7chhrecbnm9ij1o5kejj71p1hchrj9dr76kon0spjc2p70tj0eup78d70cv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6dj3cpplm9jr4sj662ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5j61ob1cdh68oh5u)
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zmia6o1f3vnksv5u1ipt3tkevk8scjaunuror05o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3gm2or2chh2bs) Fellow Pro-Life American, Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I helped uncover their cash-for-baby-body parts scheme five years ago. But just because the radical left is suppressing content online and refuses to tell the truth about the radical abortion lobby ... that doesn’t mean they’ve cleaned up their act. **Far from it! ** While I was exposing Planned Parenthood’s crimes, and was found liable in a San Francisco court for $17 million in damages in a historic pro-life case, the federal government — with partial funding of Anthony Fauci’s National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases — **_was supporting research to graft the scalps of unborn babies who were just 17 to 20 weeks old onto lab rats and mice to see if they’d keep growing._** [**We MUST demand that Congress act NOW to Defund Planned Parenthood and end the senseless murder of unborn children and STOP using these innocent lives in the name of "research." Please sign the petition right away!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z2367mierg1qv7b7s8es50alndv11kmobb5qmqa8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3gm2or2chh2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zmh1i8t72bbft0jpoe3vinu47uqpbag28bb5l6m0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3gm2or2chh2bs) Right now, the radical abortionists are coming after life in new and horrific ways. They’re passing legislation aimed at expanding access to late-term abortion and infanticide, and they’re ramping up the number of pill mills across the nation. On top of it all, they’re working to **DESTROY** threats to their business — like me. Not long ago, they won a hard-fought battle against me in court, which cost Operation Rescue hundreds of thousands of dollars and hundreds of hours of our time. My team and I are on the ground every day exposing the radical abortion lobby and **SHUTTING THEM DOWN** , but now that Planned Parenthood has picked up their pace — and is now focused on opening pill mills over surgical facilities — we must ensure that Congress does their part by taking away all federal funding from these monsters. [**To help save innocent lives and ensure our tax dollars don’t fund Planned Parenthood in ANY manner, I need you to sign this national petition today.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z0ffukq89tgo9894or66lurdir2p4qilo960sd68_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3gm2or2chh2bs) Over the last ten years, the number of surgical abortion clinics **decreased by 35 percent**. While this is fantastic — and in part thanks to the work we do at Operation Rescue to expose the abortion industry, shut down dangerous facilities, and put abortionists out of work — what’s very troubling is that Planned Parenthood has recently _shifted strategy._ [**_Medication abortion facilities —_** **_which are dispensaries for abortion-inducing drugs — have become the reliable “cash cow” for the abortion industry. And they’re popping up at an alarming rate!_**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z16gmljdhvbi570jcin46iovdr6aguv7ta0j8sr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3gm2or2chh2bs) That is why we must **INCREASE** our efforts this year to ensure that we can keep up with the pace of murder-pill mills AND pressure Congress to take every taxpayer dollar away from Planned Parenthood. [**Please help today by signing this national petition. It will only take a moment of your time and the impact will be huge.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z3q07v2srqajunqlpidjlt2ojs8ljioefjumf9sg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3gm2or2chh2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z3brv14qh9osfomqkpsn6b12v1hh0qghtc7af1ug_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3gm2or2chh2bs) Thank you for your support, God bless you, Troy Newman President P.O. Box 782888 • Wichita, KS 67278 ****

name: Susan Wild
subject: as we begin Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
As an elected official, and as a concerned citizen, I am committed to supporting our Black communities and finding solutions.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41368224/328495835/-1220490354?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220202-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDlmZWViOC04MTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ym-bGEs4uWa-3w_LZUHlj337qdy4Wkvtlobf77KNaHk=)
---
| Peter,

This month is Black History Month, an opportunity to celebrate the many contributions and achievements of Black Americans throughout our nation’s history, history that is being made every day. Just last night, one of the biggest cities in my district added its first Black city council member!

As we uplift the Black community, we must also grapple with the inequity and racism that persists in our country to this very day.

This past year has seen the United States and especially white Americans have frank conversations about racism in an unprecedented and much-needed way, as members of the Black community face daily systemic barriers. I recognize as well that issues such as climate justice, education inequity, and soaring health care costs disproportionately affect Black communities on a daily basis.

**As an elected official, and as a concerned citizen, I am committed to supporting our Black communities and finding solutions. If you, like me, want to take action to be a part of the solution,[_I encourage you to consider making a donation to the NAACP to support their fight for civil rights._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41368225/328495836/-1890789315?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDlmZWViOC04MTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ym-bGEs4uWa-3w_LZUHlj337qdy4Wkvtlobf77KNaHk=&emci=422b44c5-4984-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=dd9feeb8-8184-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=5543981)**

We cannot turn a blind eye to these issues. I will not rest until we see liberation for our Black communities. I hope you will join me in this effort.

In solidarity,
Susan
---

Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. She believes we can grow overall economic prosperity while still caring for the vulnerable members of our community. clean_body: As an elected official, and as a concerned citizen, I am committed to supporting our Black communities and finding solutions. | = | Peter, This month is Black History Month, an opportunity to celebrate the many contributions and achievements of Black Americans throughout our nation’s history, history that is being made every day. Just last night, one of the biggest cities in my district added its first Black city council member! As we uplift the Black community, we must also grapple with the inequity and racism that persists in our country to this very day. This past year has seen the United States and especially white Americans have frank conversations about racism in an unprecedented and much-needed way, as members of the Black community face daily systemic barriers. I recognize as well that issues such as climate justice, education inequity, and soaring health care costs disproportionately affect Black communities on a daily basis. As an elected official, and as a concerned citizen, I am committed to supporting our Black communities and finding solutions. If you, like me, want to take action to be a part of the solution, We cannot turn a blind eye to these issues. I will not rest until we see liberation for our Black communities. I hope you will join me in this effort. In solidarity, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. name: Alex Lasry
subject: Today, I released a pro-union policy paper to raise wages
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
My plan calls for changes to corporate tax incentives, promoting organized labor, making education more affordable, and the passage of Senator Tammy Baldwin’s Made in America Act. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41368367/328496560/-1436015341?refcode=EM_C_220202wages_N_AL_90DA_7_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWQ1YTQ2Yi04Mjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0hx8R8yVLa_0BLXPz2KIcwMICBRlx-rsjyZD0I4MDoE=)
---
Peter,

Today, I released my new plan to help raise wages and put more money back into the pockets of working Wisconsinites. My plan calls for changes to corporate tax incentives, promoting organized labor, making education more affordable, and the passage of Senator Tammy Baldwin’s Made in America Act.

**You can read more about my plan here:[https://alexlasry.com/raise-wages](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41368368/328496561/1291506931?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWQ1YTQ2Yi04Mjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0hx8R8yVLa_0BLXPz2KIcwMICBRlx-rsjyZD0I4MDoE=&emci=3a65b0a2-8084-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=61d5a46b-8284-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=18659600)**

I want to help bring real change and real results for the people of Wisconsin and that starts with putting more money back in the pockets of hard-working Wisconsinites.

Through the right mix of job training, tax deductions and incentives, investing in and buying American, and strengthening our unions, we can raise wages and bring more jobs and investment to Wisconsin.

I have a proven track record of delivering for Wisconsinites. Whether it’s creating good union jobs, paying a $15-dollar minimum wage, and investing in and helping grow Wisconsin's economy. I don’t just talk about the issues, I have delivered on them.

As Wisconsin’s next U.S. Senator, I will work tirelessly to raise wages for Wisconsinites, because for far too long, we’ve been left behind by politicians like Ron Johnson.

Thank you,

Alex Lasry

**[P.S. To get this done, we need to win this race and bolster our Senate Majority. clean_body: My plan calls for changes to corporate tax incentives, promoting organized labor, making education more affordable, and the passage of Senator Tammy Baldwin’s Made in America Act. | | = Peter, Today, I released my new plan to help raise wages and put more money back into the pockets of working Wisconsinites. My plan calls for changes to corporate tax incentives, promoting organized labor, making education more affordable, and the passage of Senator Tammy Baldwin’s Made in America Act. You can read more about my plan here: I want to help bring real change and real results for the people of Wisconsin and that starts with putting more money back in the pockets of hard-working Wisconsinites. Through the right mix of job training, tax deductions and incentives, investing in and buying American, and strengthening our unions, we can raise wages and bring more jobs and investment to Wisconsin. I have a proven track record of delivering for Wisconsinites. Whether it’s creating good union jobs, paying a $15-dollar minimum wage, and investing in and helping grow Wisconsin's economy. I don’t just talk about the issues, I have delivered on them. As Wisconsin’s next U.S. Senator, I will work tirelessly to raise wages for Wisconsinites, because for far too long, we’ve been left behind by politicians like Ron Johnson. Thank you, Alex Lasry = ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. Will you pitch in any amount to help us keep the Senate Majority and defeat Ron Johnson? = Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin Stay connected with Alex's campaign to defeat Ron Johnson: Lasry for Wisconsin P.O. "Republican Senator Mike Lee isn't popular with Utahns headed into the 2022 election."
-Deseret News 2/02/2022

Friend,

The Deseret News published a new poll today showing Mike Lee's approval rating has dropped yet again, making him vulnerable in this year's election.

Why do Utahns feel he no longer represents us? I have some ideas...

Utah deserves a Senator who listens to those they represent. Who doesn't think and act as if they know better.

Someone who fights for the right things, on our behalf. An effective leader who prioritizes the people of Utah. First. Every day. All the time.

I commit to working tirelessly in support of the good people of this state, to make life better, not to see myself on cable TV.

[Any amount will help me qualify for the June primary ballot so I can take on Mike Lee. Will you donate $20 today?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014Ezo9LxUxDKanTgpAC7GwejbTTSA68BOoZ7iaRLZ7ybyYP5Oi1usXoIu0YbRVOmm-65V7WWQxLfxPvKxNocPx3l9oxil_EhNY_qmgHmgfJtAF6TQCrcQOVKeISnCCHltUtv95Pim4g5rFqV1U4XxAxBkeV4jgtecE6HYj5_sBRlcnamL6YznHw==&c=zhw2MYgou3aGIl5_EaReYehf2ORk0wSE9xaX75iMU3oDipgubi97ZA==&ch=mcQ02C8kLQxssVbV7GzZuygvh7U-endAwLr3OxxHLPgo8L2VjBjVXw==)

I've walked in more than 70 cities across Utah and feel more passionate than ever that our hard-working, innovative, resilient people need and deserve a Senator we're proud of, who understands Utah's values and will live up to those, even - and especially - in DC.

Will you step up with a donation to my campaign today?

name: Mark Takano (personal)
subject: following up about last month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
There is a lot to be worried about right now

| Peter — Thank you!!

I'll be honest, we came up a little short of our end-of-month fundraising goal. But even though we missed our goal, I’m still so grateful for all your support -- whether you donated, signed petitions, read my emails or have supported me in any other way -- I truly appreciate it.

name: Team Benson Action Center
subject: “Show up armed.” - MI GOP candidate
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
This is what we’re up against, friend. A GOP candidate for the state legislature is openly calling for people to “show up armed” to monitor our elections.

Jocelyn responded this morning and when asked directly, she labeled the type of behavior he is suggesting a “crime.”
Watch it here>> https://twitter.com/brikeilarcnn/status/1488507398709035014

Statements like these underscore the extent to which conspiracies and violence are now plaguing our elections. Before 2020, this type of behavior existed on the fringes of our politics. Now, candidates are using violent rhetoric to energize their supporters and push their extremist views into the mainstream .

Jocelyn is calling them out and fighting to put a stop to it. Let’s show her we have her back.

Donate >> secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=020222

Team Benson
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Neil=20Kumar=20for=20Congress?=
subject: No more pointless wars.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
These RINOs are trying to start WW3 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066129?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=aa61fa58c3&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

Are you ready for World War III?

I’m not. **And I know you’re not either.**

But my warmonger opponent, along with most of the corrupt Republican and Democrat Uniparty Establishment, is cheerleading for a war with Russia over the Ukraine.

Some of these America Last Neocons have even talked about a nuclear strike! Pure insanity.

_These same RINOs are willing to send your children—and your hard-earned money—to die for Ukraine’s borders,_while they totally ignore the invasion at our own Southern Border!__

For 20 years, our Middle Eastern wars bled our nation dry, killed tens of thousands of our best and brightest young Americans, and enriched nobody but the bankers and defense contractors who bribe our politicians.

These very same defense contractors—evil corporate special interests like Raytheon, fueled by American misery—are the ones bankrolling my opponent’s $2 million war chest.

The military-industrial complex, which serves every interest in the world except our own, makes up a large portion of my opponent’s donors.

This blood money keeps our fat cat politicians rich, and keeps those politicians sending our boys to die in wars that don’t serve American interests one bit.

They’ve never met a war they didn’t love. But I don’t see them volunteering themselves or their loved ones to go to the front lines.

**If elected, I vow that I will NEVER send one penny of American treasure or spill one drop of American blood on ANY foreign wars—unless they are in _direct defense _of our homeland.**

_No more wars._ The American people are tired of fighting pointless, endless wars.

Putting America First and supporting our troops means only deploying our military when _absolutely necessary_.

With his unhinged rhetoric trying to start a pointless war with Russia, my opponent is putting Arkansas Last—and putting his defense industry donors first.

**[_RINO warmongers are a clear and present danger to everyone in this country. Every single one of them must be removed from office. Start by electing me._

_Send a Defense Industry shill packing and elect a real Fighter who will NEVER support another pointless foreign war_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=423b352133&e=eda539b26b). **

[**_Help me tell the Establishment that the people are tired of endless wars_ _ \-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=ea3bc22503&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, not the D.C Fat Cats._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=eb49c05185&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=5b433f2b03&e=eda539b26b)** _._**
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 NeilforArkansas.com, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
NeilforArkansas.comPO Box 652Bentonville, AR 72712-0652
[Add us to your address book](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/vcard?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1a15bf667f)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1a15bf667f&e=eda539b26b&c=42de97476b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1a15bf667f&e=eda539b26b&c=42de97476b).

name: Brit Bender
subject: fwd: Bill Lee, Deceiver in Chief
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Hey — I wanted to make sure you saw this message from Chair Remus about our newest attack ad against Bill Lee. We are ramping up our messaging about Lee's deception and spinelessness, but we need to make sure our message reaches the right ears and not just our loyal Democratic supporters.

That's why we set a goal of raising $25,000 to get this ad on TV and run a targeted digital ad campaign so that it reaches the people we need to persuade. Can you chip in $25 now to help us reach our goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

We can't thank you enough — check out Chair Remus' message and the ad below 👇

— Brit

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Hendrell Remus < hendrell@tndp.org >
Date: Fri, Feb 1, 2022 at 7:45 AM
Subject: NEW AD 👀 Bill Lee, Deceiver in Chief
To: Brit Bender < brit@tndp.org >

Hey Peter,

Last night, we heard more deception from Governor Bill Lee during his State of the State address. His ego got the better of him, and he tried to pass off his efforts as proof that Tennesseans are thriving which couldn't be further from the truth.

What he didn't tell you is that we are #1 in medical bankruptcies. We're #1 in rural hospital closures. Our state is at the bottom in poverty. We consistently receive an "F" in education funding. And devastatingly, we are at the bottom in infant mortality.

These are not signs of a thriving state. Bill Lee's rich friends are doing great, but the rest of us are suffering under his corporate-driven agenda that leaves nothing for working-class Tennesseans.
So we are firing back. We've commissioned our first ad of 2022, calling out his deception and using his own words against him. Check it out 👇

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=txN7RVHlmFE [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=txN7RVHlmFE]

We need to run this ad everywhere we can, including putting it on TV to reach as many Tennesseans as possible. But in order to do this, we need to raise $25,000 to fund an effective TV ad campaign.

Can you chip in to help us raise the $25,000 we need to blast this video to the screens of every Tennessean? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
DONATE OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

We are ramping up our efforts to combat Bill Lee and the Republicans' dangerous narrative, but going up against their media machine is a huge challenge. We've got the talent, we just need the funds to make our vision a reality.

After 2022 we'll have a new Governor, and it will be because Tennesseans will have heard a different narrative than the Republican propaganda they've been fed for decades. Countering Republican disinformation is going to take everything we've got — this ad is just the beginning.

Yours in the fight,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

clean_body: [] Hey — I wanted to make sure you saw this message from Chair Remus about our newest attack ad against Bill Lee. We are ramping up our messaging about Lee's deception and spinelessness, but we need to make sure our message reaches the right ears and not just our loyal Democratic supporters. That's why we set a goal of raising $25,000 to get this ad on TV and run a targeted digital ad campaign so that it reaches the people we need to persuade. Can you chip in $25 now to help us reach our goal? [] We can't thank you enough — check out Chair Remus' message and the ad below 👇 — Brit ---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Hendrell Remus < hendrell@tndp.org > Date: Fri, Feb 1, 2022 at 7:45 AM Subject: NEW AD 👀 Bill Lee, Deceiver in Chief To: Brit Bender < brit@tndp.org > Hey Peter, Last night, we heard more deception from Governor Bill Lee during his State of the State address. His ego got the better of him, and he tried to pass off his efforts as proof that Tennesseans are thriving which couldn't be further from the truth. What he didn't tell you is that we are #1 in medical bankruptcies. We're #1 in rural hospital closures. Our state is at the bottom in poverty. We consistently receive an "F" in education funding. And devastatingly, we are at the bottom in infant mortality. These are not signs of a thriving state. Bill Lee's rich friends are doing great, but the rest of us are suffering under his corporate-driven agenda that leaves nothing for working-class Tennesseans. So we are firing back. We've commissioned our first ad of 2022, calling out his deception and using his own words against him. Check it out 👇 [] We need to run this ad everywhere we can, including putting it on TV to reach as many Tennesseans as possible. But in order to do this, we need to raise $25,000 to fund an effective TV ad campaign. Can you chip in to help us raise the $25,000 we need to blast this video to the screens of every Tennessean? [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] DONATE OTHER AMOUNT [] We are ramping up our efforts to combat Bill Lee and the Republicans' dangerous narrative, but going up against their media machine is a huge challenge. We've got the talent, we just need the funds to make our vision a reality. After 2022 we'll have a new Governor, and it will be because Tennesseans will have heard a different narrative than the Republican propaganda they've been fed for decades. Countering Republican disinformation is going to take everything we've got — this ad is just the beginning. Yours in the fight, Hendrell Remus he/him Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party DONATE [] [] [] [] CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE. Tennessee Democratic Party 319 Plus Park Blvd Nashville, TN 37217 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: I'm running to flip Iowa's seat blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter, it's Abby. First, I want to thank you for being one of my strongest supporters. Having you on my team really does mean the world to me. **So today, I wanted to take a bit of time to tell you more about who I am and why I'm running to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) for Iowa's Senate seat.**
I come from a working-class family with a proud tradition of service – my mother worked in the public school system and my father is a retired union pipefitter welder. My family couldn’t give me a trust fund or debt-free college, but they gave me something much better: They taught me that when there is work to be done or a problem to solve, you always raise your hand and say _“yes.”_**[If you're with me, then chip in a grassroots contribution now and say YES to defeating Sen. Grassley and expanding our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41368906/328501142/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk641-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTJjNjBlZi04NDg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdfj8v5tNLXaXthGgl9XfTLtv7_tWg5-m4IUIl3IveQ=)**
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41368907/328501144/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk641-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTJjNjBlZi04NDg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdfj8v5tNLXaXthGgl9XfTLtv7_tWg5-m4IUIl3IveQ=)
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41368908/328501145/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk641-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTJjNjBlZi04NDg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdfj8v5tNLXaXthGgl9XfTLtv7_tWg5-m4IUIl3IveQ=)
---
Seeing work to be done and _doing it_ is a lesson that's stuck with me my entire life. It's why when I saw that no one was fighting for my community in the Iowa State House, even though I was only 25 years old, I raised my hand and said _"yes,"_ serving my community for four years.
But when my far-right representative voted to repeal the Affordable Health Care Act TEN times _,_ I knew there was more work to be done. Plenty of people told me not to challenge him – he was twice my age and a seasoned Washington politician, while I was a young woman from a working family. But I knew that we needed someone to step up and fight for our communities. **So once again, I said _"yes,"_ and once again, I won – becoming the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue.**
While in Congress, there was endless work to do, and endless problems to be solved. **So, I kept on saying _"yes"_ – yes to fighting for small businesses, yes to expanding access to affordable health care, yes to protecting our unions, yes to fighting for working families like the one I came from.**
That brings me to why I'm running for Senate today. You see, when there's a problem facing Iowans, Sen. Grassley says _"no." _**When we ask for real help with skyrocketing health care costs, he says _"no."_ When hardworking union members ask for basic protections and a good quality of life, he says _"no."_**
Enough is enough. Sen. Grassley has turned his back on Iowa's working families, which is why nobody will work harder than me to defeat him and lift up the voices of families like mine in the Senate. But with the campaign arm of Senate Republicans sitting on more than $32 million to defend vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley, I simply cannot win without major grassroots support.
**[So please, tonight, can you say "yes" to](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41368909/328501146/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk641-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTJjNjBlZi04NDg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdfj8v5tNLXaXthGgl9XfTLtv7_tWg5-m4IUIl3IveQ=)**[** defeating Sen. Grassley, protecting our Senate majority and fighting for working families by**** making a $5 donation right here and now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41368910/328501147/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk641-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTJjNjBlZi04NDg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdfj8v5tNLXaXthGgl9XfTLtv7_tWg5-m4IUIl3IveQ=)
Thank you for believing in this campaign and saying "yes" to standing up for the values that we both believe in.

With gratitude,

– Abby
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41368911/328501148/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk641-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTJjNjBlZi04NDg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdfj8v5tNLXaXthGgl9XfTLtv7_tWg5-m4IUIl3IveQ=)

Peter,
Did you know Kelly Tshibaka is endorsed by President Trump?
And later this month she will be traveling to his Mar-a-Lago Club in Palm Beach, Florida to be at a special campaign event.

But we have a better idea...we think President Trump should come to America’s largest state, ALASKA!

This year he has already held rallies in Texas and Arizona, but we know we can do it bigger and better here!

Don’t you agree, Peter,?

That is why Team Tshibaka has started the Trump-Tshibaka Rally Fund. We know if we just get 5% of our supporters, like YOU, to make a donation of ANY AMOUNT, we can make it happen.

name: Team Lizzie
subject: #TeamLizzie Weekly Update
body:
Friend,
We are one month out from the March 1 Primary Election and are focused on talking to new voters in TX-07 to make sure they have the information they need to cast their ballots in March--and again in November.

It's time for a #TeamLizzie Day of Action! Lace up your walking shoes and help us get the word out ahead of Primary Election Day to our #TX07 neighbors.

Join us on Saturday, Feb. 12 or Saturday, Feb. 26 [https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/event/437315/] . Or both!

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Day%20of%20Action-Block%20Walk.png]Want to talk to more voters? Sign up for our weekly phonebanks
[https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/event/437298/] !

Our team holds phone banks on Thursdays from 4-6 PM.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/TX-07%20Phonebank.png]Unable to volunteer your time? You can still help out by donating at the link below!

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe-dec2021?refcode=120721]

We hope you’ll join in supporting our efforts.

Thank you for being a part of this team,

Team Lizzie

Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States

body:
New poll just dropped

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41368968/328502372/-1468176026?refcode=suffolk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTI1MzdhMC04NTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dzuA9DXq2oMQCMW4S0p4-npJEdFzO145VYnpYdiK8do=) Peter — This week, USA Today came out with a new Florida poll, and the media has already started spinning it as doomsday for Florida Democrats. But I’m here to tell you what this poll really means for our fight to bring something new to Florida (hint: it’s not bad). Here are some of the major findings:
* **Voters find Nikki favorable by an 8.2 point margin**
* 42% of voters remain undecided in the race between Nikki and Ron DeSantis

And here’s what that means:
* Nikki is the most popular Democrat in this race, with numbers that rival DeSantis
* A ton of voters are undecided, and we have _plenty_ of room to grow
* **_Voters who know Nikki will vote for her_**

**So, this is what we’ve got to do, Peter: We need to push harder than ever to get Nikki’s name out there and spread the word about our campaign. Because we know that, when voters get to know Nikki like we do, they’re going to see that she’s exactly the leader we need. body:
I had to reach out tonight, friend, because **I'm meeting with Marco first thing tomorrow morning and I cannot tell him we failed to hit our critical fundraising goal _again._**
---
This isn't the kind of campaign extremists like Donald Trump or Kari Lake would run, where we just sit around and wait for shady megadonors to throw money at us. We're creating a movement of people who want to work together to invest in Arizona's future – people like you, whose grassroots support has gotten us this far.
**That's why your support is so important right now. We're only $521 away from our goal and the extended deadline is at midnight tonight – so we CAN do this, but it depends on you stepping up.**
**[Please – will you donate $5 or more right now, before our extension expires at midnight, to help Marco close this fundraising gap, flip Arizona blue and defeat GOP extremism?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41368861/328500797/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk437-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTJjNjBlZi04NDg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YlYbThJY7q_P25PIHot32CTJkJ-gGo41ITm7HGQ6UFg=)**

Phil Team Lopez

Hey, friend – I won't sugarcoat this news: **We didn't hit our end-of-month goal in time, which means we're starting our election year already behind the curve.**
This was the worst outcome we could have for our first huge deadline of the year. Experts are calling our race the MOST competitive open-seat race in the country, and Donald Trump's megadonors are spending BIG to help my extremist opponent, Kari Lake (R), defeat me. We needed to show serious strength and crush this goal.
**But I refuse to stop fighting before this battle is won. I know we can win this – and election experts from The Cook Political Report to Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight agree. We're creating a movement of people who want to work together to invest in Arizona's future – people like you, whose grassroots support has gotten us this far. That's why your support is so important right now. name: Beto HQ
subject: Caught on camera (re: Greg Abbott’s lie)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

This is what Greg Abbott promised us in November:

[1]Abbott: I can guarantee the lights will stay on.

But this is what Greg Abbott said yesterday during a meeting about the
approaching winter storm:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52206?refcode=ema20220202-174418&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=174418%2E444211%2EPKfHqs ]Headline: Texas Gov. Greg Abbott says no one can guarantee there won't
be planned power outages...

Greg Abbott lied to us. He lied because after last year’s crisis killed
700 loved ones and left millions out in the cold, he let corporate
interests buy him off so he wouldn’t do anything to prevent the power grid
from failing again. And he thinks he can get away with it. We can’t let
him.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52206?refcode=ema20220202-174418&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=174418%2E444211%2EPKfHqs ]Will
you give $3 or more to Beto right now to send Greg Abbott a
message after he publicly admitted to lying about the power grid? Donate
to show Abbott: We need a Governor who tells the truth and keeps the
lights on.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52206?refcode=ema20220202-174418&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=174418%2E444211%2EPKfHqs ]Contribute $3

During last year’s power grid failure, gas companies raked in $11 billion
by robbing Texans while families froze.

Then, Abbott got $4.6 million in campaign donations from top executives at
those very companies. So instead of passing laws to fix the grid, Abbott
focused on protecting those corporate profits by passing the price tag of
the grid failure on to working Texans. It’s called the Abbott Tax, and it
means higher monthly utility bills.

Now, the coldest weather of the year is approaching. And even though
Texans are paying as much as $50 more per month on their utility bill, our
power isn’t guaranteed to stay on.

It’s corruption, plain and simple. Greg Abbott is failing the people of
Texas. We need to fire him and elect a governor who will keep the lights
on.

Our
campaign is putting in the work every day to defeat Abbott in November.
Beto is about to launch a 2,100 mile statewide drive to commemorate the
anniversary of the power grid failure and hold Abbott accountable for his
corruption. But everything we plan to do — travel, knocking doors, hiring
staff — is 100% funded by supporters like you.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52206?refcode=ema20220202-174418&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=174418%2E444211%2EPKfHqs ]If you can, donate now to help fire Greg Abbott. Every dollar counts.

Let’s unite around a brighter future for Texas where we finally fix the
grid, bring utility costs down, and keep the lights on so this deadly
crisis never happens again.

In solidarity,

Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=174418%2E444211%2EPKfHqs

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Nan Whaley
subject: What Cheryl and I just did:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
It’s official: I’m running for governor, and I need you with me.

Big news: **I just officially filed to run for governor of Ohio.**
Everything we’ve done so far – from building a grassroots movement for change in Ohio, to joining forces with Cheryl Stephens running for Lieutenant Governor, to breaking fundraising records – has led up to today.
**This isn’t the end – it’s just the beginning.** We’re up against Mike DeWine and his deep-pocketed special-interest friends, and this isn’t going to be an easy fight.
But we also know that we have the best supporters out there, and that’s how we’ll fight for change and put an end to the corruption in Columbus.
**[To make that happen, we need a surge of grassroots support right now – can you rush $5 right now to become an Official Filing Donor?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41369337/328510766/407763255?refcode=nw_em_220202_2_t2_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWYxYzM0OC04OTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8njtpTtdxcHfaep9vzpDuSsTeccNaIRnZMIHP2WKeo0=)**
I got in this race for a simple reason: I believe Ohio deserves better. As mayor of Dayton, I brought people together to tackle our toughest challenges, from the opioid crisis to a broken education system.
Here in Ohio, we’re at a crossroads right now. On top of rampant corruption in Columbus, we’re facing an economy that doesn’t always work for everyone – not to mention an ongoing pandemic.
**[The time for action is now, and together, I know we can create the change we need – and with today’s filing, I’m officially in to make it happen. I hope you’ll join me by chipping in $5 to become an Official Filing Donor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41369338/328510767/407763255?refcode=nw_em_220202_2_t2_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWYxYzM0OC04OTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8njtpTtdxcHfaep9vzpDuSsTeccNaIRnZMIHP2WKeo0=)**
Onward,
Nan Whaley

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41369339/328510768/407763255?refcode=nw_em_220202_2_t2_b&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWYxYzM0OC04OTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8njtpTtdxcHfaep9vzpDuSsTeccNaIRnZMIHP2WKeo0=)****

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: We Won
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Sanity Prevails](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzior7qCaTjvuGRIM_Ka-ismUbK-VbobBCScz59ELGLMzcGQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb2_final&n=1) Something extraordinary happened on Monday. At the very last possible moment the Single Payer Healthcare bill was withdrawn because it "didn't have the votes." For one day sanity prevailed. We were all sitting at our desks on the Assembly Floor around 5 PM, waiting for the debate to begin. Then, suddenly, the session was adjourned – the vote cancelled. January 31 was the deadline to pass bills left over from 2021, so we’ve killed it for the year. For posterity, and to show just how bad AB 1400 was, I've [written out](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqeF4S63jWs3cr12IHKL9uZZm6vINeDyPO7_csOFSvoikWBKQ85Mg4DHTmiFfUQoog&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb2_final&n=2) the opposition speech I was about to give. Meanwhile, Newsom addressed his latest scandal. He explained he wore his mask "judiciously" at the football game, only removing it at the very moments he happened to be caught on camera. The rest of the world is emerging from the madness of mandates. But California continues to deny reality. This is the time to ask your legislator to co-author ACR 46, my resolution to end the emergency. Finally, thank you for the very kind birthday wishes. There's a lot of ugliness in politics, but I’m truly blessed to have the support of so many wonderful friends and patriots. [Help me take our fight to Washington](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb2_final&n=3) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb2_final&n=4).

subject: I am proud to stand with these teachers who oppose these government mandates!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for by Lawson for Congress")
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=fc83fb200d&u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=820191f489)
---
| |
---
|
---
| Friends,

Yesterday, I sent a letter to Superintendent McDade and the Prince William County School Board. I stand with the teachers and officers of Prince William County Schools (PWCS) in opposing outrageous mandates that keep teachers & support staff away from the classroom and away from their jobs.

We must support getting our kids back in school, without distractions, and with proper in-person instruction.
---
|
---
| [Join the fight! Join Team Lawson Today.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=75551abbfe&e=fc83fb200d "Join the fight! Join Team Lawson Today.")
---
| If you agree, join the fight. Join my team to bring common sense leadership back to Virginia's 10th Congressional District.

Best,
****

Jeanine Lawson
Conservative Congressional Candidate, VA10

| Peter,
Governor DeSantis set the tone and laid the blueprint for defending individual liberty and freedom in Florida despite the pressure of lockdown politicians and the hysterical media. And NOW people around the world are following his lead. Truckers in North America are standing united to protest heavy-handed mandates from liberal politicians with a "Freedom Convoy." We were outraised the last two quarters, but we still have time to close the fundraising gap.

Over 90% of the money came from outside Georgia! We were outraised the last two quarters, but we still have time to close the fundraising gap. Our opponent is the top fundraiser in the entire U.S. Senate, so any gift you make will help us chip away at his financial advantage and grow our media fund. Control of the Senate majority will likely hinge on our Georgia race, which is a dead heat according to recent polling. I'm not a politician, and I've never run for office before. While I know money certainly isn't everything in campaigns, it's still important for candidates who are running in statewide races like we are. This race is a TOSS-UP. Because of the cash advantage our opponent holds over us, he will be able to start reaching out to voters sooner than we can via TV ads, radio ads, social media ads, direct mail and billboards. We can't let our opponent get too much of a head start in advertising, so we've got to close the fundraising gap. Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Hello,
After he was stricken with COVID-19, Chuck Grassley’s 27-year streak of 8,927 consecutive votes came to an end. But when you look at what many of those 8,927 votes were... it kinda makes you wish he would have been absent more often.
For over 40 years in the Senate, Chuck Grassley has voted against expanding access to health care, against combatting the world’s climate crisis, against getting money out of politics, and against even the most common sense firearm responsibility issues supported by our police and members of his own party.
Grassley has taken millions from corporate PACs and special interests, including Wall Street, Big Pharma and insurance companies, and the NRA. It should be no surprise that he remains deaf to Iowa but a good listener of billionaires and their lobbyists.
**I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because after a lifetime in elected office, it’s time Iowans had someone actually representing them. You won’t find me taking money from corporate PACs.**
Control of the Senate is on the line here in Iowa, so you know Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to come after me with millions of dollars of false TV ads. If we’re going to take on Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate, I need grassroots donors like you to chip in now and become a Founding Donor to my campaign. Give me the tools so I can fight back.
