If we’re going to take on Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate, I need grassroots donors like you to chip in now and become a Founding Donor to my campaign. Give me the tools so I can fight back. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We’re running our campaign the right way, but I’m counting on the support of people like you if we’re going to come out victorious. Thank you for your support, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM BARRETT FOR CONGRESS | [ ](https://mgcp02
body:
Barrett opposes corporate welfare | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61fae2d45cd280629472b7a2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D61f99ab3fee49214bb22f6be%26ss_email_id%3D61fae2d45cd280629472b7a2%26ss_campaign_name%3DWeekly%2BUpdate%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-02-02T20%253A02%253A54Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=7qplX9B-G9vUyg1eOf1Ow_VUl7Y%3D)
---
|
#### **Barrett Says ‘No’ to Corporate Welfare**
Since first elected, I have opposed corporate handouts. I don’t believe that taxpayers should foot the bill to bribe economic investment from large corporations.
New reports are pulling back the curtain on the latest incentive package doled out to General Motors. According to Crains Detroit, Michigan taxpayers paid $825 million - $166,000 for EACH - of the 4,000 jobs that will still pay workers 37% below the median in Eaton County. I voted no because corporate welfare is not the strategy for Michigan, meaningful investments in our infrastructure and workforce are.See more [here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61fae2d45cd280629472b7a2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F380078933926519&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=5YM7MxK4IcKD6wYaG86x9V1xdHQ%3D).
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61fae2d45cd280629472b7a2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F380078933926519&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=5YM7MxK4IcKD6wYaG86x9V1xdHQ%3D)
---
|
---
#### **Barrett Interview with Newsmax**
I joined Tom Basile on Newsmax over the weekend to give an update on the state of our race. Watch out the interview [here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61fae2d45cd280629472b7a2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DBCs9xfaKgGw&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=M1Rl00WSWQSvqPPzpPY2B0J0tbk%3D).

| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61fae2d45cd280629472b7a2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DBCs9xfaKgGw&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=M1Rl00WSWQSvqPPzpPY2B0J0tbk%3D)
---
|
---
#### **Help Get Tom on the Ballot!**
Michigan requires congressional candidates get 1,000 petition signatures from registered voters in the new 7th District in order to get on the ballot.**We need your help!** Our boots on the ground operation to gather signatures is up and running and we want you to join our team! Email [alec@tombarrettforcongress.com](mailto:alec@tombarrettforcongress.com) if you are interested in helping the Barrett Brigade.

* One teacher in Boston said: **“it is fair to draw parallels between what happened on January 6 and the rise of fascism.”**

Instead of teaching the **HISTORY** of America... our **greatness** , our **values** , our **Founders** ... they are more focused on the turning the events of January 6th, 2021 into propaganda for kids.

BLEXIT believes STRONGLY in school choice... because we believe that PARENTS, not Far-Left propagandists, should be the ones deciding our kids’ education.

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: UPDATE: Join Speaker Pelosi for a Grassroots Volunteer Call Celebrating Black History Month Tomorrow at 5 PM PT / 8 PM ET
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,
UPDATE: We are thrilled that so many of you are already registered to join us for our Team Pelosi Weekly Grassroots Volunteer Update tomorrow evening as we celebrate Black History Month!
It is a great pleasure to share that Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester, who represents Delaware’s at-large district, is also joining our conversation tomorrow evening as a Special Guest along with earlier-announced Special Guest Congresswoman Lauren Underwood (IL-14.) We are kicking off our Black History Month tribute with you, our VIPs – our Volunteers In Politics, and talking about the issues impacting our constituents and families like yours across the country.
Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a key co-author of the Competes Act that is aimed at addressing and resolving supply chain issues that families across America are dealing with right now with historic investments in research and in providing America’s workers with 21st Century skills to bring technology manufacturing back home – creating good-paying union jobs in the process.
Zoom: Celebrating Black History Month with Congresswoman Lauren Underwood (IL-14)
Date: Thursday, Feb 3rd at 5 pm PT / 8 pm ET
Register: https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/1016437740912/WN_5TVbg_VSSSKjchZ7wWOtCQ [https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/1016437740912/WN_5TVbg_VSSSKjchZ7wWOtCQ]
Join us! Thank you for everything you do!
https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/1016437740912/WN_5TVbg_VSSSKjchZ7wWOtCQ [https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/1016437740912/WN_5TVbg_VSSSKjchZ7wWOtCQ]
Warmest regards,
NANCY
Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.
As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25] SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f2be5118-8d84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/fe1dbc17-8e84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTFkYmMxNy04ZTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_fQg_OrpqoYGmO-3KYpYMuHlb1zTD-Q8WdLQWN4tlZs=&id=117907000 .

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Detmer is on the wrong side of history.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresshttps://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220202 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220202]
Team,
Did you see the video of a Michigan State Senate candidate calling on a crowd to “show up armed” to ensure the accuracy of vote counts? If you’re been following my campaign for a while, he might look familiar:
The clip is of Mike Detmer, who ran for my seat 2020. I currently represent him in Congress (much to his chagrin). He has made a name for himself by threatening violence for those who don’t support his far-right views. In the clip, he suggests supporters should resort to intimidating poll workers, at one point even saying the phrase: “lock and load.”
He’s part of a trend that has become unfortunately far too common in Michigan, where we’ve seen extremism brewing for years.
And to make matters worse, since these initial comments he’s been doubling down in interviews and on social media, blaming the media for misinterpreting these blatant and disgusting remarks. He even used the phrase “lock and load” again in a Facebook post earlier today. You can see the clip itself (and his justification), here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220202]
Detmer is on the wrong side of history. I said it during my last election, and I’m saying it again. Will you stand with me today to show Mike – and anyone else that might seek to use violence to achieve their political ends – that we wholeheartedly reject their assault on our democracy? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220202&amount=28]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220202]
Elissa

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

name: Jacky
subject: counting on your input by midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Your name is on that list, friend.
| | |
---
Friend,

Because of top supporters like you who stepped up to win back the House, Senate and White House for Democrats, we’ve been able to make real change for working families across the country.
But there’s still a lot of progress to deliver for the American people – on everything from voting rights to reproductive freedom – and it all comes down to defending our razor-thin Senate majority.
As I fight to make sure Democrats don’t lose a single seat during this pivotal election year, I need _your_ help. **My team pulled together a list of our top supporters – those who we believe can share the invaluable insights we need to win this November – and your name is on that list, friend.**
**[So I’m personally asking: Will you take our Election Year Strategy Survey now to help Democrats defend and expand our 50-50 Senate majority and deliver bold progress for the American people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41369928/328524814/975827424?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1619-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDEzYTE2OS04Zjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oUR2hSDRShAVWziZ1qeCKQm7Lc0zM-cKiEm3pbEDIVA=&emci=2f916d00-6184-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=f413a169-8f84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=3800590)**
| | [Begin the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41369929/328524815/975827424?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1619-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDEzYTE2OS04Zjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oUR2hSDRShAVWziZ1qeCKQm7Lc0zM-cKiEm3pbEDIVA=&emci=2f916d00-6184-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=f413a169-8f84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=3800590)
---
I mean it when I say the stakes could not be higher. Top political experts from Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight to CNN are reporting that Republicans are favored to take back the Senate, which would spell the end of our entire agenda.
We need all hands on deck to protect key battleground seats – including Catherine Cortez Masto’s seat right here in Nevada – and compete for pickup opportunities everywhere we can. **But the only way we can do that is with the critical input of top grassroots supporters like you.**
**[Please friend, you were specifically chosen to take our Election Year Strategy Survey and help shape our strategy to defend our Democratic Senate majority. Can I count on you to take just a moment before our midnight deadline to submit your response?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41369930/328524816/975827424?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1619-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDEzYTE2OS04Zjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oUR2hSDRShAVWziZ1qeCKQm7Lc0zM-cKiEm3pbEDIVA=&emci=2f916d00-6184-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=f413a169-8f84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=3800590)**
Thank you for taking the time. I look forward to going over your insights.

Jacky Rosen
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/2f916d00-6184-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/f413a169-8f84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDEzYTE2OS04Zjg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oUR2hSDRShAVWziZ1qeCKQm7Lc0zM-cKiEm3pbEDIVA=&id=105090150) | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: Rep. Jayapal broke news at our event last week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Our most recent Policy + Pints inspired hope and made headlines.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4272?t=2&akid=12940%2E53494%2EEZIp7Z) Friend, Last Thursday, Rev. Yearwood and Rep. Jayapal joined me for our January edition of Policy + Pints (if you haven't joined us before, the name of the event says it all)—and Friend, it was special. [**_It's not too late to experience it yourself! You can still pour yourself a pint of your favorite beverage and watch the full virtual event here._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4271?t=3&akid=12940%2E53494%2EEZIp7Z) [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4271?t=4&akid=12940%2E53494%2EEZIp7Z) First, Rev. Yearwood brought down the house with one of the most inspiring climate speeches I've heard. [**_(If you need to get re-motivated and re-energized, take a minute and watch it here!)_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4281?t=5&akid=12940%2E53494%2EEZIp7Z) **Then, Rep. Jayapal broke news when she urged Congress to pass the climate investments and more from the Build Back Better Act by March 1st.** As Chairwoman of the Progressive House Caucus, her support is huge. She's not giving up on _any_ of the urgent and necessary components of the Build Back Better Act. But she's committed to passing everything that has full Senate support ASAP, and that's the transformative climate investments, as well major investments in health care and the care economy. After last Thursday, we're even more fired up to pass this broadly supported and crucially necessary climate legislation. By coming together like this, we're creating a community of activists and policymakers inspired to create the livable future we need—and reminding each other what that future will look like. So now, I'm asking you to chip in to help us put on more events like this one. With your support, we can make sure Policy + Pints continues to inspire hope and make headlines. [**_Will you make a donation to invest in our community today?_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4272?t=6&akid=12940%2E53494%2EEZIp7Z) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4273?t=7&akid=12940%2E53494%2EEZIp7Z)

---

---
Together,
Jamal Raad
Executive Director, Evergreen Action

**What is more important than the sanctity of life?**

Nothing.

---
Peter,
---
A country is in risk of peril if it must rely on foreign entities to feed its people.

The radical Left and establishment RINOs are content about American land being sold to foreign investors while American farmers struggle to provide food for the people of our nation. _**Common sense agricultural policies need to be in place for our producers so that we never have to resort to outsourcing our farming.**_

Without the ability to produce our own food, we cannot remain a sovereign nation. Supporting the tireless dedication of our farmers is a matter of national defense.

See my thoughts on the issue of agriculture in our country:

We just wrapped up our tour of 7 farms in 7 days in Georgia’s 10th district, and I am in awe of the tenacious and committed families who make sure we have abundant and healthy choices for putting food on our tables.

As your next Congressman, I will always support the hard working agriculture producers in Georgia. We must produce sound agricultural policies so that the heritage of farming continues to thrive and the American people are nurtured by our own patriotic farmers.

_We can never abandon those that nourish the lifeblood of our nation: American farmers!
_

clean_body: | | | | Supporting our farmers is a matter of national defense Peter, A country is in risk of peril if it must rely on foreign entities to feed its people. The radical Left and establishment RINOs are content about American land being sold to foreign investors while American farmers struggle to provide food for the people of our nation. Common sense agricultural policies need to be in place for our producers so that we never have to resort to outsourcing our farming. Without the ability to produce our own food, we cannot remain a sovereign nation. Supporting the tireless dedication of our farmers is a matter of national defense. See my thoughts on the issue of agriculture in our country: We just wrapped up our tour of 7 farms in 7 days in Georgia’s 10th district, and I am in awe of the tenacious and committed families who make sure we have abundant and healthy choices for putting food on our tables. As your next Congressman, I will always support the hard working agriculture producers in Georgia. We must produce sound agricultural policies so that the heritage of farming continues to thrive and the American people are nurtured by our own patriotic farmers. We can never abandon those that nourish the lifeblood of our nation: American farmers! Fellow American,

I have been blessed with many amazing opportunities, but I can say without a doubt that running for the Senate in Georgia is one of the greatest honors of my life.

That's why we're giving this race 110% Every. Single. Day.

Having said that, we're running against the top Senate fundraiser in the country. In the last three months, he raised more than $9.8 million!

Since he began raising money for his re-election campaign last winter, **he's brought in more than $53.5 MILLION.**

While this is a tremendous amount of money, we've never been known to back down from a good challenge.

**[Team Herschel needs 340 conservatives to make a donation of at least $3 before midnight tonight.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e9f3aa0f185a4f7bbafa03a8bee19125&_e=6nwZPfkPrcx8sdFt_AN8JWKD242-t4CinoO1n7DvovNdf6Npx6vRxbKyiSKg8x3eZRTwxdKTXGp6JSD3XDtkrB9untvhdi_dJ7Yv0LV7FbLJP03uxLjagawF06pT-p6aIlV9R6bRra3B5wwoYzCi9pZA8RtqvL240X3eYxXD7qOi5nUt52P747tK2cOrnhT85jaepDOYTa3TlJq6H2aL9FE7ogR6vg7wCKsCSn5ehfBWzS7fQJ_CRBs1DMfdd4abi7-7bZv73lKUQKaYFe28xS-UKxXzKvBfA725XUeyij3uIrjV60DTEaBNtGv_F7W15Eq6nvVwhHYHT8Sg8UjNit6P6CQGCRR0RbG-rYg_0OENzcTP75sDi9G5cOFvVWRIweERXzLKNYq-oxe-aLmvT_0Ms4tbX46RRvn6TMS2APoFOcI2_VnT9I_jWlygcuSHMRuEWZNxnTo3QTaNBh0N_NevxPHduDEm-anhxc7tHg9nDwbBrCfulkXudFZ1yAg6)**

we’re SPEECHLESS!!!

Together, we can defeat our anti-choice, far-right and corporate backed opponents and elect a leader who is committed to fighting to protect reproductive freedoms to the U.S. Senate.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/24622?t=3&akid=605%2E90090%2EkzCoLC)_**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/24623?refcode=em20220202-605&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=605%2E90090%2EkzCoLC)**
* * *
We’re so excited to share this news with you today — **Morgan Harper is #VOTEPROCHOICE’s newest endorsement!**
#VOTEPROCHOICE aims to connect the nation’s pro-choice majority voters with pro-choice champion candidates in every election.****
**77% of voters** want abortion to be safe, legal, accessible, affordable, and respectful. **1 in 4 women** will have an abortion before the age of 45. It is long past time that we codify and protect _Roe v. Wade_ so every person across the country can get access to the reproductive health they deserve.
Morgan has been fighting back against far-right Republicans and moderate Democrats right here in Ohio who are working to erode reproductive rights in the state. _And that passion has earned Morgan an endorsement from #VOTEPROCHOICE._
[**_But we can’t do this alone_****. Now is the best time to contribute to our campaign so we can capitalize off the momentum of Morgan’s newest endorsement. Can we count on your $5 donation today?**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/24622?t=5&akid=605%2E90090%2EkzCoLC)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/24623?refcode=em20220202-605&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=605%2E90090%2EkzCoLC)**
Onwards,
Team Morganize

Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate

_**2022 is our chance to reclaim the Senate and ensure that when President Trump takes back the White House in 2024, he has an America First majority waiting for him.** _

But first, I need to know if conservatives across the country have confidence that we can get the job done this election year.

clean_body: I need the input of America First patriots like you. | Peter, – with the first month of 2022 now officially in the books, I’m turning my focus to ensuring we have the most up-to-date polling data. While recent polls show we have a 12-POINT LEAD to win this OPEN seat, I still need to know where the American people stand on our chances of flipping the 50-50 Senate. 2022 is our chance to reclaim the Senate and ensure that when President Trump takes back the White House in 2024, he has an America First majority waiting for him. But first, I need to know if conservatives across the country have confidence that we can get the job done this election year. Participant: Peter Willis Status: [Response Pending] Deadline: Tonight @ 10:45 P.M. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

subject: 🚨 2022 COC Update: Overnight Accommodations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
The room block at French Lick Resort is sold out, but there are other options available. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indgop/2022-coc-luncheon-panel-on-election-integrity-471178?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| _**Room Block at French Lick Resort SOLD OUT,
Other ****Accommodation**** Information**_
---
| Hoosier Republican,

We just wanted to send a quick update regarding overnight accommodations for the **2022 Congress of Counties**.
* Our special rate room block at _French Lick Resort_ is **sold out**.
* There is **no vacancy** at either _French Lick Resort_ or _West Baden Hotel_.
* We now have a **room block** at _Best Western Plus_ in French Lick, Ind. Please call 812-936-0520 to book your reservation and inform the booking agent that you are with the Indiana Republican Party Congress of Counties. The hotel is located at 613 S Arnold F Habig Blvd., French Lick, IN.
* _Comfort Suites_ is also available. You can call 812-788-7018 to book your reservation. The hotel is located at 9530 W State Rd. 56, French Lick, IN.

Hoosier Republican—we're looking forward to seeing you **Feb. 25 - 26**!

---
|
---
| _**Join Us for the 2022 Congress of Counties **_
---
| **> > The last day to register is
Monday, February 21 at the close of business <<**
---
|
---

name: Tim
subject: this one stings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2226%2E3611125%2E1rGL8e ][IMG]

Team,

First and foremost, I want to thank you for being a part of this
campaign—I mean it when I say that we can’t win this thing without you.

But, folks, I’m coming to you with a bit of bad news: we came up short on
January’s fundraising goal.

I’m not going to lie, this one stings. Missing our first critical goal of
2022 really puts us in a vulnerable position heading into this
all-important election year.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7054?t=1007&akid=2226%2E3611125%2E1rGL8e ]If we’re going to overcome the GOP’s millions and stop Mitch McConnell,
we cannot afford to fall behind again. Can you help me out by chipping in
$25 before midnight to help us make up for this temporary lapse?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7055?t=1014&amount=25&akid=2226%2E3611125%2E1rGL8e ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7055?t=1015&amount=50&akid=2226%2E3611125%2E1rGL8e ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7055?t=1016&amount=100&akid=2226%2E3611125%2E1rGL8e ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7055?t=1017&amount=200&akid=2226%2E3611125%2E1rGL8e ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7055?t=1018&amount=250&akid=2226%2E3611125%2E1rGL8e ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7055?t=1019&amount=25&akid=2226%2E3611125%2E1rGL8e ]Other Amount

Republicans are pouring tens of millions of dollars into Ohio, trying to
buy this Senate seat so that they can keep lining their pockets. They
don’t give a damn about working families.

This race can go one of two ways: either we lose and hand over the Senate
majority to McConnell, or we flip this seat, expand our majority, and
finally pass some legislation.

That all depends on you, Team.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7054?t=1008&akid=2226%2E3611125%2E1rGL8e ]If we can make up the difference in the next 24 hours, we can erase our
deficit and get back on track. Can I count on you to step up and chip in
$25 now? I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7055?t=1020&amount=25&akid=2226%2E3611125%2E1rGL8e ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7055?t=1021&amount=50&akid=2226%2E3611125%2E1rGL8e ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7055?t=1010&amount=100&akid=2226%2E3611125%2E1rGL8e ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7055?t=1011&amount=200&akid=2226%2E3611125%2E1rGL8e ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7055?t=1012&amount=250&akid=2226%2E3611125%2E1rGL8e ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7055?t=1013&amount=25&akid=2226%2E3611125%2E1rGL8e ]Other Amount

Thanks,

Tim

name: Val Demings
subject: Celebrating Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I am reflecting on the generations of leaders who carried the torch
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41370165/328527640/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1509-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTkzZTRiMi05NTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=moVJAAhUMqi2nFAQDyGfaH5jNiHzVa8fSiocggVWSAI=)
---
Friend –
As we celebrate Black History Month, I am reflecting on the generations of leaders who carried the torch forward and uplifted me to become the person I am today: Carol Moseley Braun, Martin Luther King Jr., John Lewis, my mother and father, and so many others. I am the descendant of enslaved people, the granddaughter of a generation that lived under Jim Crow, and the daughter of parents who were barred for years from exercising their right to vote. I stand on the shoulders of the giants who have fought for equality and justice.
I’ve been blessed to serve for nearly 30 years in law enforcement and for five years in the U.S. House of Representatives. I've enforced the law, and now, I help write the law.
But despite my personal story of opportunity, I know that for far too many Black Americans that same story is simply out of reach. From pay equity to quality healthcare to justice under the law, I am still fighting today for my children and grandchildren to live in a better world.
The path toward equality is still being paved, and I'll do everything in my power to bend the arc of history toward justice. I know that if you join me, there are even brighter days ahead of us.
Wishing you a celebratory and uplifting Black History Month.

Congresswoman Val Demings

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Re: The Former President
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
Derek —

I needed to take some time to process the former president’s statements
from over the weekend. There is no sugarcoating it: his words show just
how much our democracy remains at risk. And how big of a fight we have
ahead of us.

First, Donald Trump spread his usual conspiracy theories, disinformation,
and pure bile at a political rally. Attacking me personally, again, but
that was the least of it. Here’s what really mattered — he, blatantly,
dangled pardons for those who attacked the Capitol.

Then, later in the weekend, he issued a statement that he had expected
Mike Pence to overturn the 2020 election. “Unfortunately, he didn’t
exercise that power, he could have overturned the election!” Trump made it
clear again that he knew he lost and was intent on overturning the
results. His only regret about the violent attack on the Capitol appears
to be that it did not succeed.

And it’s never been more apparent: We’re not out of the woods yet. Not by
a long shot.

It can be said that Trump is saying the quiet part out loud. And that’s
true. But he’s never hidden his intentions. Not during the 2016 election.
Not during his impeachments. And certainly not now. We ignore him at our
peril.

Donald Trump is likely to run for election in 2024, and I fear that our
democracy could not take a second Trump presidency. Especially when it
barely survived the first. And since then, those who follow him have
become even less tethered to reality.

They believe our democracy is a sham. They think our elections are rigged
– but only if their side loses. And they believe every word Trump utters.
It’s dangerous.

This is the nightmare that will become reality if the GOP wins this
November. Because Trump will take that as a green light to run again. We
must do everything possible to ensure the GOP does not overtake our
razor-thin Blue Majority. If they do, we could see Trump’s goal of
overturning an election become reality.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220202_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1004&refcode2=15_5257348_M1E0xl&akid=15%2E5257348%2EM1E0xl ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220202_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=50&t=1006&refcode2=15_5257348_M1E0xl&akid=15%2E5257348%2EM1E0xl ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220202_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=100&t=1007&refcode2=15_5257348_M1E0xl&akid=15%2E5257348%2EM1E0xl ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220202_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=250&t=1008&refcode2=15_5257348_M1E0xl&akid=15%2E5257348%2EM1E0xl ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220202_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&refcode2=15_5257348_M1E0xl&akid=15%2E5257348%2EM1E0xl ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I don’t say this lightly, but our democracy hinges on the results of the
election this November as much as it will in November of 2024.

Anything you can contribute — anything meaningful to you — can make a big
difference. Thanks for being a part of our fight.

— Adam

| | Peter, Happy February! I wanted to take some time and thank you from the bottom of my heart for supporting my campaign. No matter how you showed up for this campaign, whether you chipped in a couple bucks or shared our campaign with your family, friends, or neighbors, it all gets us that much closer to winning Michigan’s new Eleventh District in November. It takes a grassroots movement like ours to make effective, progressive change. The amazing work we accomplished in January shows folks watching that we can win this thing if we work together. I’m a people person. I know how important it is to build connections within my community, and meet constituents to share our progressive vision along the campaign trail. This month, I was incredibly humbled to earn endorsements from national labor unions, including SEIU and UNITE HERE, along with organizations like the Planned Parenthood Action Fund. Partnerships with colleagues in Congress are also extremely valuable to me, and I was so thrilled when Senator Elizabeth Warren endorsed our campaign. We have worked together on various progressive policies that help working families across the country, so having her support means more than words can say. None of this work could have been possible without support from people like you, Peter. Together, we’ll work for workers’ rights, reproductive freedoms, climate action, and the progressive vision we share. I’m honored to be fighting alongside you, Peter. Here’s to continuing our efforts and building our progressive future together. Let’s go!

---

name: Deidre DeJear
subject: introducing myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Friend, I need you on my team
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5536?t=6&akid=1213%2E878179%2Ej2pQ6N) Friend, my name is Deidre DeJear and I am running to unseat Iowa’s Republican Governor, Kim Reynolds.

My race has completely shifted – my primary opponent has suspended his campaign, and I am now the front-running Democrat in the race to unseat Reynolds. [**Our campaign is ready to defeat Republican Kim Reynolds & bring new ideas to move Iowa forward. It’s going to be a long, uphill battle, and I need every resource available to win. So I have to ask: Will you make a donation tonight to my campaign for Iowa Governor?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5536?t=7&akid=1213%2E878179%2Ej2pQ6N) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5537?t=8&akid=1213%2E878179%2Ej2pQ6N)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5538?t=9&akid=1213%2E878179%2Ej2pQ6N)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5539?t=10&akid=1213%2E878179%2Ej2pQ6N)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5540?t=11&akid=1213%2E878179%2Ej2pQ6N)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5541?t=12&akid=1213%2E878179%2Ej2pQ6N)
**Republican Kim Reynolds continues to play national politics and cozy up to Trump and his MAGA Republicans. In doing that, she’s failed to put Iowans first.**

She has proven time and time again that she is in office for her own personal gain.

I can not stand by and let Governors like her continue this MAGA Republican agenda across the country – _that’s why I’m running to flip Iowa blue._

Governors are the first line of defense against the far-right Republican agenda, so it’s _critical_ that we defeat Republican Governors like Reynolds who enable attacks on voting rights, women’s choice, education, and affordable healthcare.

But not only am I running to unseat Reynolds, I’m also running to become the first Black woman Governor in the nation. Never before in our country's history has a Black woman taken the role of Governor. **_I’m ready to change that._**

_But we can’t make history alone._ It takes teams of leaders, volunteers, hard workers, and grassroots supporters like YOU to break tough glass ceilings like these. I know we can get this done. I know our country is ready for Democratic leadership. **_I know Iowa is ready for Black women leadership._**
[**I need you with me – I know we can stop the Republicans agenda & make history together. Would you consider chipping in $5 to my campaign and Voter Protection Project so we can start this crucial election year off strong?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5536?t=13&akid=1213%2E878179%2Ej2pQ6N)
**Goal: 300 Grassroots Donations || Deadline: 02.03**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Friend, I need you on my team | Friend, my name is Deidre DeJear and I am running to unseat Iowa’s Republican Governor, Kim Reynolds. My race has completely shifted – my primary opponent has suspended his campaign, and I am now the front-running Democrat in the race to unseat Reynolds. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | Republican Kim Reynolds continues to play national politics and cozy up to Trump and his MAGA Republicans. In doing that, she’s failed to put Iowans first. She has proven time and time again that she is in office for her own personal gain. I can not stand by and let Governors like her continue this MAGA Republican agenda across the country – that’s why I’m running to flip Iowa blue. Governors are the first line of defense against the far-right Republican agenda, so it’s critical that we defeat Republican Governors like Reynolds who enable attacks on voting rights, women’s choice, education, and affordable healthcare. But not only am I running to unseat Reynolds, I’m also running to become the first Black woman Governor in the nation. Never before in our country's history has a Black woman taken the role of Governor. I’m ready to change that. But we can’t make history alone. It takes teams of leaders, volunteers, hard workers, and grassroots supporters like YOU to break tough glass ceilings like these. I know we can get this done. I know our country is ready for Democratic leadership. I know Iowa is ready for Black women leadership. name: Rebecca Parson
subject: My report from a picket line
body:
Hi there, [_I support workers, not corporations, so I don’t take any corporate PAC money. Can you donate now to help me win?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41370285/328528151/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTNhNWYyMi05ZDg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ltsjXNGWYiJXF5nv99Vky-Fg4dY5ufnh4Nw48gTUuhg=) Today I went to picket in support of Teamsters Local 174, concrete workers who are on Day 61 of their strike over low wages and unfair labor practices. They’re calling it a general strike as it spreads to other industries and brings construction sites across the county to a standstill. This was my second time on the picket line with them, yet my opponent Derek Kilmer is nowhere to be seen. Few local politicians are openly supporting them and the media is barely covering the strike. [**I’m an unabashed supporter of labor and will fight for the PRO Act and other pro-worker legislation in Congress. Send a worker to Congress. Donate here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41370286/328528152/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTNhNWYyMi05ZDg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ltsjXNGWYiJXF5nv99Vky-Fg4dY5ufnh4Nw48gTUuhg=) I know what it’s like to worry about your bank balance, to get priced out of your own neighborhood, and to get gouged by medical bills — so many people like you and me do. As one striking worker told me today, it’s time for workers to band together and realize that it’s the corporations and the 1% who are dividing us. It’s us versus them, and the corporations have gotten way too much power over the past several decades. It’s time to take our power back, and that starts with strikes, direct action, and worker representation in Congress. We don’t need more of the 1% representing us in Congress. [**If you want a pro-labor worker in Congress, please donate to my campaign now. I don’t take any money from corporate PACs, so I need your help. A small $7 donation right now will go a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41370287/328528153/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTNhNWYyMi05ZDg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ltsjXNGWYiJXF5nv99Vky-Fg4dY5ufnh4Nw48gTUuhg=) clean_body: Hi there, = Today I went to picket in support of Teamsters Local 174, concrete workers who are on Day 61 of their strike over low wages and unfair labor practices. They’re calling it a general strike as it spreads to other industries and brings construction sites across the county to a standstill. This was my second time on the picket line with them, yet my opponent Derek Kilmer is nowhere to be seen. Few local politicians are openly supporting them and the media is barely covering the strike. = I know what it’s like to worry about your bank balance, to get priced out of your own neighborhood, and to get gouged by medical bills — so many people like you and me do. As one striking worker told me today, it’s time for workers to band together and realize that it’s the corporations and the 1% who are dividing us. It’s us versus them, and the corporations have gotten way too much power over the past several decades. It’s time to take our power back, and that starts with strikes, direct action, and worker representation in Congress. We don’t need more of the 1% representing us in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = Thank you, -Rebecca Parson Candidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to: Rebecca for Washington PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States Paid for by Rebecca for Washington If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Friend, A few weeks ago, the Democrats hand-picked, out-of-touch, far-left candidate announced his campaign for Ohio’s First Congressional District. Since then, we’ve learned more about his record and his priorities as a member of the Cincinnati City Council.
One of his top policies? He wrote a proposal to **defund the police** DURING a homicide spike in Cincinnati. He penned a motion to pull $200,000 from the city’s police budget during a time when Cincinnati experienced an unprecedented number of homicides. Even today he still stands behind his actions. _Undercutting law enforcement even as families and small businesses face rising crime._ **Friend, we must protect our men and women in law enforcement. body:
I know I’ve written to you about the border crisis before – In fact, I’ve written about it several times. Unfortunately, I don’t have a positive...... Peter, I know I’ve written to you about the border crisis before – In fact, I’ve written about it several times. Unfortunately, I don’t have a positive update. Since I wrote to you last, and since I last visited the border to see the chaos and devastation for myself, the surge has gotten even worse. The Democrats’ reckless open-border policies have caused brand new waves of illegal immigrants to arrive at the southern border in masses. Even worse? We’re now seeing record-breaking numbers of attempts to smuggle fentanyl and other dangerous, illegal drugs across our southern border... yet the Democrats STILL refuse to do a thing to help. [**Will you chip in now to help elect a House majority that will actually secure our southern border and protect our national security?**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=030b840e53ec49eb8ca59354803f5c6f&_e=12qJnLXaJENqiMEwlCeXQb95YKIEVryPjfXzCKd4wTMD21aIYT_jPFZNuwsWz9eI9BdI18thKO9U5y4I6cMiiKu_D8z7GGCVIF4Ka3DP2CgEgK2iYQiVLZuYVP8Q07DyHSa_h9W81do4_2XuUk1h82jL4TI0_8BRTpT2BVb-j8XJO12BLnpj_vV6g2xmPd6GCljPQZCTpDQg35txEzdh8Zv2PtNpVT3AZc0-PRKk7lnk1-5ixErYI771gQ8KSO091yFIERG7-S1IulTTn7V4fP8FcrupqmIfVihUXTXp-hEVB0WCSpCAG8hdrK1RDtsmlar9U_j2LYRkF-QR2rE2KQmJ20ztC3oaBlMvIc89M-_C-HK_3HstuPdEGeo7iUCacSKymKHhn5jpjajFubdRtr7mGPHER0KShG4IWvaxlAIuONfe68QlddzRKntdmnF2rEkOOJyOYbe_r41cR5zVfP0AYfdEx6Yrj45ZZKZ7z3zit2LymUls9pXA25-xwYj-) [**CHIP IN NOW**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=030b840e53ec49eb8ca59354803f5c6f&_e=12qJnLXaJENqiMEwlCeXQb95YKIEVryPjfXzCKd4wTMD21aIYT_jPFZNuwsWz9eI9BdI18thKO9U5y4I6cMiiKu_D8z7GGCVIF4Ka3DP2CgEgK2iYQiVLZuYVP8Q07DyHSa_h9W81do4_2XuUk1h82jL4TI0_8BRTpT2BVb-j8XJO12BLnpj_vV6g2xmPd6GCljPQZCTpDQg35txEzdh8Zv2PtNpVT3AZc0-PRKk7lnk1-5ixErYI771gQ8KSO091yFIERG7-S1IulTTn7V4fP8FcrupqmIfVihUXTXp-hGjXB3ano0QXh9VYFgOdxVQ5V4Pb5gzKNz2zVDQIshT9n6UhbFHbaXYNRgQLl8ZYIlnVSuIa-3Nb-XjLO8BFOM3u0MgO_fkiBfsGWknSPckMYwlE4xQBKx1YyGQSA08Vyqu-GGi0RVKSGW5CoZDjMxbjxiHnRbHiGS0Wk-SwnXJCojj3df8Xgg92MpJs-El-1SoTh4leUGMe-PcNMnsRYpN) This is really serious, Peter. The mess at our southern border just keeps spiralling more and more out of control, and the Democrats’ radical policies and open-border rhetoric are only making things worse. **After a whole year of doing absolutely nothing to solve the problem that their policies created, it’s clear that it’s time for new leadership in Congress.**[**Chip in now if you agree.**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=030b840e53ec49eb8ca59354803f5c6f&_e=12qJnLXaJENqiMEwlCeXQb95YKIEVryPjfXzCKd4wTMD21aIYT_jPFZNuwsWz9eI9BdI18thKO9U5y4I6cMiiKu_D8z7GGCVIF4Ka3DP2CgEgK2iYQiVLZuYVP8Q07DyHSa_h9W81do4_2XuUk1h82jL4TI0_8BRTpT2BVb-j8XJO12BLnpj_vV6g2xmPd6GCljPQZCTpDQg35txEzdh8Zv2PtNpVT3AZc0-PRKk7lnk1-5ixErYI771gQ8KSO091yFIERG7-S1IulTTn7V4fP8FcrupqmIfVihUXTXp-hGF44efyR5Z_iqBw4l7QwQ_k26-rAkO-53ikjpWLXZuL7fN44Vpw8MmsKz41TnEJiMl2eurLysSeqpBkhqUK4p7LY0LOT6dhCDEa-J7hrLjK0wX1FHHjC91sxUYbJ4duEoFGhu9KrmC0dFEIzeN32whGs9EhdZMrlN8wCKv8_vqCpfVmGPeqyI9iEuttRj2dBpi6VOzboZgcyznuMvL83bS) Liberals like Susan Wild are never going to step up and hold Joe Biden accountable for his disastrous policies, so we need to do everything we can to replace them with common sense conservative leaders who will actually do what it takes to secure our border. [**CHIP IN NOW TO SUPPORT BORDER SECURITY**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=030b840e53ec49eb8ca59354803f5c6f&_e=12qJnLXaJENqiMEwlCeXQb95YKIEVryPjfXzCKd4wTMD21aIYT_jPFZNuwsWz9eI9BdI18thKO9U5y4I6cMiiKu_D8z7GGCVIF4Ka3DP2CgEgK2iYQiVLZuYVP8Q07DyHSa_h9W81do4_2XuUk1h82jL4TI0_8BRTpT2BVb-j8XJO12BLnpj_vV6g2xmPd6GCljPQZCTpDQg35txEzdh8Zv2PtNpVT3AZc0-PRKk7lnk1-5ixErYI771gQ8KSO091yFIERG7-S1IulTTn7V4fP8FcrupqmIfVihUXTXp-hHdfN1dARC3Qij6brknOwrurW3FZt451zVDaHMl2d3grkg1MqzEvG32zh3JzFlNoapZE5KqgYtdw1gCMnOSijHBWs3ZufRv5inMx1yKnvElqvXSNlLOHEUG-_W1Hxw3ifjUtlJP78IIYq7XNQoH1PrR0URtpHr--Q2GB-jDeHv3Gs935xwEwIeWFpf_qZsN96XF7diCZvQin52pEQrvWlMX) In the past year under total Democrat control in Washington, this has gone from a border security catastrophe to a total national security disaster! Our brave border patrol agents are overwhelmed and the safety of our communities is in jeopardy. That’s why we have to act RIGHT NOW and double down on our efforts to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi and her Far Left allies. clean_body: I know I’ve written to you about the border crisis before – In fact, I’ve written about it several times. Unfortunately, I don’t have a positive...... Peter, I know I’ve written to you about the border crisis before – In fact, I’ve written about it several times. Unfortunately, I don’t have a positive update. Since I wrote to you last, and since I last visited the border to see the chaos and devastation for myself, the surge has gotten even worse. The Democrats’ reckless open-border policies have caused brand new waves of illegal immigrants to arrive at the southern border in masses. Even worse? We’re now seeing record-breaking numbers of attempts to smuggle fentanyl and other dangerous, illegal drugs across our southern border... yet the Democrats STILL refuse to do a thing to help. - This is really serious, Peter. The mess at our southern border just keeps spiralling more and more out of control, and the Democrats’ radical policies and open-border rhetoric are only making things worse. After a whole year of doing absolutely nothing to solve the problem that their policies created, it’s clear that it’s time for new leadership in Congress. Liberals like Susan Wild are never going to step up and hold Joe Biden accountable for his disastrous policies, so we need to do everything we can to replace them with common sense conservative leaders who will actually do what it takes to secure our border. In the past year under total Democrat control in Washington, this has gone from a border security catastrophe to a total national security disaster! Our brave border patrol agents are overwhelmed and the safety of our communities is in jeopardy. That’s why we have to act RIGHT NOW and double down on our efforts to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi and her Far Left allies. I really appreciate anything you can contribute, Peter. Taking back the House and securing our southern border has never been more important, and we can’t do it without your support. Thanks, Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Two New Op-Eds
body:
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=3b8b11f2a5c04e6885becdf3d881eb5e&_e=JP-ZML29VlOoR-IEwcyE0si-Fgn7PZIj6j1xr4pbDHfh3G77kxiFjZFhNaMbMCfXUwypD41Yg0x2NtEwGJD7l8-8mAuiN5MAchYECpsApksZyRPPqzyVdawix9Y-3VAROB8p6QXgeIlCHQnILxcVzjP-EQn2crZtKywBj6zbwMXjKTNnw7Up57KP8i7UKUG_p2ksQVR8zYOdxeKP-mMx-iRz-ZYmdYJQq7992xfeyoVY2Qkrr6GuTCJjbklUJL6Wij8BoLnORrf6TO4-fftPpg%3D%3D) **The Federalist** : Thank You, Sean Payton, For Helping Bring Back New Orleans With Football By Bobby Jindal | |
---
In 1966, the American Football League and National Football League wanted an anti-trust exemption from Congress allowing them to merge. Sen. Russell Long, chairman of the Finance Committee, and Rep. Hale Boggs, House majority whip, wanted a professional football team for Louisiana. The leagues got their exemption, and NFL Commissioner Pete Rozelle announced New Orleans’ team on All Saints Day, 1966.

The owners wanted to call the team the Saints, but did not want to offend the local Catholic community. New Orleans Archbishop Philip Hannan, nicknamed the “Jumping Padre,” had served as chaplain for the 82th Airborne Division during World War II. He gave his blessing, but warned most of the church’s saints were martyrs.

The late Hannan’s warning proved prophetic, as the Saints went 20 years without a winning record, with only two teams reaching .500. One of the team’s few highlights came in 1970, when Tom Dempsey kicked an NFL record 63-yard field goal...
_Finish __Reading _[HERE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=3b8b11f2a5c04e6885becdf3d881eb5e&_e=JP-ZML29VlOoR-IEwcyE0s_E7_Iu7Sa3wnxnKe3WnCKheBrG4AFXyt_Kgomcrvv9er0Di1LPBT2bdkFWTjUQ_n51xWtWIpyyT7nv_-XtzVVijlLBvmo3dgr1l_m3SPrvtPp2Z0Vq489BdovPB4KC1iU8I33X3UtokaFfS5aAoF0AncIqrpHiULwaVMpnul4OUDP7w6_wGjAsbDJL5g_YL8M0uv-s5tTnZOImkqBdW4imePqunHAGu9nLVeYMPLD6a82BEbDU914UuaznCfoiIW1UyG8fVdMx5129bLkBzHdXzagFkON8miJrUuw1IlK4R5evd4b7GUru1IPiMqhl9AIXh1KLKXcsvtYi4lzHNmSHFXn5hU7w8x0CvkqDQOuQ).

**Newsweek** : President Biden Has Governed from the Radical Left
By Bobby Jindal
President Joe Biden immodestly claims he has accomplished more in his first year than his predecessors. He does admit his failures, namely his inability to cause Republicans to have an "epiphany" and endorse his expansive climate, spending and immigration proposals. He sounds more like a college applicant who claims his greatest shortcoming is that he works too hard than the leader of the free world. He claims Republican opposition is worse than what former president Barack Obama faced. Democrats used to portray conservative opposition to Mr. Obama's agenda as racist, but it's unlikely they'll view opposition to policies from the old, straight, white man currently in the White House as progress towards a colorblind society.

After campaigning as a moderate and promising to bring normalcy and bipartisanship back to Washington, Mr. Biden has governed from the far left. He now blames Republicans for not endorsing Bernie Sanders-style policies simply because Mr. Biden is the one offering them. When 10 moderate Republican senators offered to approve over $600 billion in additional COVID assistance, including funding for vaccines, direct payments and enhanced unemployment benefits, Mr. Biden refused to engage with them and chose instead to use a partisan reconciliation process to push through a $1.9 trillion bill. Sen. Chuck Schumer said Democrats had learned their lesson from the Obama years, apparently thinking the former president's mistake was that he borrowed and spent too little, too slowly...
_Finish Reading_**[HERE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=3b8b11f2a5c04e6885becdf3d881eb5e&_e=JP-ZML29VlOoR-IEwcyE0p-JoS9PBBVj1lSdLqdvHDInYkmqDVPPJkNw-TUaFN3O2bUWp6zqPv_VM32wV-t7fKcIoLeLrgJxNC1Jrl5eOXhBj5lHTkRrTI9Mk4OaUuwTAT_RvvpVCCh2H578EmBsSe7hfHBeZjueoHuPYD2fnqm5IQilhFjWjNgUDdPB6giuh_GoqOqYEWB7kjcHlJ1lvn0jqY1RXrK3V9jqlfgI2uHAkjShX3cqfuRus0Odvz1nJ8TTpJgjkjvI0wxjO1x190eFijwfUXvt8RT90pRb-KMYJJXTwr6uzHa_VFQOWC-ASiHk7HbubduGfJDFTUWNjA%3D%3D)**.

body:

Peter,

The fake news media is targeting me right now for saying what a LOT of Nevadans have been thinking for the past year:

[](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=369957f05ba64e49b7c8fdb1522e4066&_e=t6hjaMt0P0inB1SRreb2rjOSqJFuKE-N2RAcsbGoOazBxXdBfD-kTHiB7TSmBZ0XE6s-9N21lSdEnLhzhoycVNKLBFIQczhyzrjc_6koxmDKMUZrER_RMi5znIXGAVfKUEUXDjeOTII1DVmn6qLUemy5p9OTHUzELM_BL6GYMR1KCtGC19QgBYt66NKuE8D2dNGKSVM_O1ksGwB7-R6ttPPV3QJS8dINRLMpL1E8go0UW05j9rMQVpmN0WGUa_PG2J0I5shGst2NDphBwMHW6dbe_l5iTpAqadfJQ_JvWlrzrG2v00xZrGxX3YyHrNouj4VfbnyL9A0FdfvRq-MDZk1pG_tBBLXj9Qjr3rsb67u3rchqhjFWLlxNLMfe9h-IjRG9qBEmpWK-KK6VKos1SrpyvvAR7_o5-EnGQYKV43NEJHjJ2KsZRnvpGIhzcqQUvNfOiXhuHeUdFe6Aj3-q9Qz6_kM1fac93edH8nE2RLwQhpqQwX-CDns-8EphGu_u)

Nevada’s broken elections became a national spectacle in 2020 –– _and now Republicans like you and me are being attacked non-stop for trying to FIX those problems._

The mainstream media and the far-Left couldn’t care any less about restoring integrity to our elections. They just want us to move on because unregulated mail-in voting and ballot harvesting only benefits THEM.

_But here’s the catch:_

**When Joe Biden and Democrats are already calling an election that**** _hasn’t even happened yet_****“illegitimate,” the same people attacking us don’t even bat an eye.**

Their hypocrisy is on full display –– and it’s just another reminder of why we must win this fight to**[ secure our elections](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=369957f05ba64e49b7c8fdb1522e4066&_e=t6hjaMt0P0inB1SRreb2rjOSqJFuKE-N2RAcsbGoOazBxXdBfD-kTHiB7TSmBZ0XE6s-9N21lSdEnLhzhoycVNKLBFIQczhyzrjc_6koxmDKMUZrER_RMi5znIXGAVfKUEUXDjeOTII1DVmn6qLUemy5p9OTHUzELM_BL6GYMR1KCtGC19QgBYt66NKuE8D2dNGKSVM_O1ksGwB7-R6ttPPV3QJS8dINRLMpL1E8go0UW05j9rMQVpmN0WGUa_PG2J0I5shGst2NDphBwMHW6dbe_l5iTpAqadfJQ_JvWlrnmYTZA2UfmWk4ra8v9WxC9HYpymNu90an2QSvV9XkIjZRpbw00O8FsbZYEwbtiakpGLpDanNhveIUCB6HErXW0N1Ij8AZDkK22-du7D_k38xvenzsrrmcgrWvuPxGG-DN46qBisCAP70taiclYMVUpg6LcRtNjY1u1mmHd9eOvselNiCFbWVxHd3mhLL0CL1p7Vwix4Vcg5pRHuCOxHI4) **right now.
[**FUEL THE FIGHT FOR ELECTION SECURITY**](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=369957f05ba64e49b7c8fdb1522e4066&_e=t6hjaMt0P0inB1SRreb2rjOSqJFuKE-N2RAcsbGoOazBxXdBfD-kTHiB7TSmBZ0XE6s-9N21lSdEnLhzhoycVNKLBFIQczhyzrjc_6koxmDKMUZrER_RMi5znIXGAVfKUEUXDjeOTII1DVmn6qLUemy5p9OTHUzELM_BL6GYMR1KCtGC19QgBYt66NKuE8D2dNGKSVM_O1ksGwB7-R6ttPPV3QJS8dINRLMpL1E8go0UW05j9rMQVpmN0WGUa_PG2J0I5shGst2NDphBwMHW6dbe_l5iTpAqadfJQ_JvWlrtVmUs1kaSyjvIdSvB3CvZILc7tJfRpDiAk60w4y_1zqYSzEEvyGb9I-8HOQLQ-t6VPUiRzf4-92WVLCnpSwobhWXm1PQXYX-Xm6LWR9y6-HQ-nPpfHmZTxFCBz2CNb7H0taSEVGvc-XfM9neP6tW62Z-tdLk4EYrD6PY-ZOzygoNR_HbgIS6YrkAfk6Gz3JNHtnJdCCPfjyx6pzkOk_Po)
Peter, I’ll require voter ID and end universal mail-in voting as governor. The far-Left hates me for this and they’re taking desperate measures to stop our campaign.

**We can’t afford a repeat of 2020 in 2024.[ Donate here to help me win this race so we can clean up Nevada’s broken elections >>>](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=369957f05ba64e49b7c8fdb1522e4066&_e=t6hjaMt0P0inB1SRreb2rjOSqJFuKE-N2RAcsbGoOazBxXdBfD-kTHiB7TSmBZ0XE6s-9N21lSdEnLhzhoycVNKLBFIQczhyzrjc_6koxmDKMUZrER_RMi5znIXGAVfKUEUXDjeOTII1DVmn6qLUemy5p9OTHUzELM_BL6GYMR1KCtGC19QgBYt66NKuE8D2dNGKSVM_O1ksGwB7-R6ttPPV3QJS8dINRLMpL1E8go0UW05j9rMQVpmN0WGUa_PG2J0I5shGst2NDphBwMHW6dbe_l5iTpAqadfJQ_JvWloTJGINxqQJbnrteR39tNVFbt14J7t6pt54N3Z1cWvq2SPAOTWXxfwx6sItXcrlEeV8H65ePtQ0BBV-c99GEjM6cbTwlhRTTcVjKz-1Q21VqXPnESoQyabOwYHwOYVhSLBC6xDBmC3LN7NFJ1mLwSM00Cfz5jGuDhWYg8pXEzro-Sc8j-_WIma6DGyr6cieenwx40uUPEBIOeM67X_hUHX7)**

body:
When I was fighting on the ground in Afghanistan, I put my life on the line everyday to defend America from our enemies. Peter, When I was fighting on the ground in Afghanistan, I put my life on the line everyday to defend America from our enemies.

_But now, we’re watching Joe Biden turn a blind eye to terrorists and dictators while they walk all over us._

_**As a Green Beret, I will ALWAYS put America FIRST, and Joe Biden’s weakness is a slap in the face to the men and women who risk it all to fight for our country.**_

I want to know if grassroots patriots will join me in standing up to the Biden Administration, so I put together a survey asking if YOU think Joe Biden is making America weaker.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: We did it AGAIN!
body:
The fundraising reports from the FEC were released on Monday, and we remain the undefeated champions of outraising PAC-backed RINO and Democrat incumbents!
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/PAk24sd9FFTuMrCGazSaNg/PcE3hqlf763ItAT6RBCZL9bw)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/PAk24sd9FFTuMrCGazSaNg/PcE3hqlf763ItAT6RBCZL9bw) The fundraising reports from the FEC were released on Monday, and we remain the undefeated champions of outraising PAC-backed RINO and Democrat incumbents!

My opponent, RINO incumbent, Do-Nothing Daniel Webster outperformed his last quarter, raising $92,000.

**But thanks to you and thousands of others patriots around the country, the Laura Loomer for Congress Campaign raised $120k!!**

But here's what's so amazing about that . . .

Do-Nothing Dan was fired by his fundraising agency during the last quarter because he wasn't able to raise any money, so he called his buddies in the GOP Establishment Swamp and increased his PAC donations by 350%! **Of the $92k he raised, $32k came from PACs!**

While the typical corporate players like Raytheon, General Motors, and the National Realtor's Association chipped in, most of Webster's support came from fellow RINO's in DC.

And guess who Webster's biggest donor was?

Drumroll please . . .

Do-Nothing Dan's biggest donation came from Kevin "I don't get involved in primaries" McCarthy!

**McCarthy 's political action committee, clownishly known as the McPAC, dropped a whopping TEN GRAND to stop me!**

[**Help me reverse McCarthy 's support for my opponent by chipping in so I can raise $10k by Friday.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/PAk24sd9FFTuMrCGazSaNg/PcE3hqlf763ItAT6RBCZL9bw)

That officially makes Daniel Webster a "McPolitician"!

You see, **McPoliticians** are worse than RINO's.

They're the corrupt, establishment-backed lackeys that stay in office by saying "yes, sir" to Kevin **Mc** Carthy, Ronna **Mc** Daniel, Mitch **Mc** Connell and their cronies.

McPoliticians spend more time looking at the menu at the drive through, than they spend reading legislation.

As long as they play nice and do what they're told, they'll collect their fat, greasy PAC donations from McCarthy and his pals so they can continue grasping for straws where they remain fat and lazy in Congress on the taxpayer's dime.

** All of the McPoliticians need to go! We can make that happen with one big McPrimary in the 2022 Midterm Elections.**

[**Help me kick off 2022 strong by backing my campaign to unseat Daniel Webster and let 's show Kevin McCarthy who is in charge!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/PAk24sd9FFTuMrCGazSaNg/PcE3hqlf763ItAT6RBCZL9bw)

It's officially on!

In order for me to take on the Communists in Congress, I need to fight my way through the GOP Establishment Swamp!

And with you by my side, we'll do it! [**Please back my campaign today and send a message to Kevin McCarthy and his fellow McPoliticians. Let 's show them who we are!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/PAk24sd9FFTuMrCGazSaNg/PcE3hqlf763ItAT6RBCZL9bw)

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/PcE3hqlf763ItAT6RBCZL9bw)
[Web Version](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/w/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/PcE3hqlf763ItAT6RBCZL9bw)

subject: Trusting our future elections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
In Minnesota, nobody is above the law, including the DFL Party. | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=e6343977e1&e=9d6926af69)
---
| | | **Minnesotans tell me every day they’ve lost trust in the integrity of our elections.**
[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=dbe4c619c4&e=9d6926af69)
And It makes sense - because Democrats, at every turn, are removing common sense protections - even allowing non-citizens to illegally vote on their caucus process for endorsement, which is clearly against the law.

If Governor Tim Walz and the DFL Party are going to encourage and allow non-citizens to illegally participate in the caucus and convention process, then they clearly expect non-citizens to break the law and vote for their candidates in November.

**In Minnesota, nobody is above the law, including the DFL Party. **

The future of our country depends on elections we can trust.

As a Certified Public Accountant and auditor, I have the proven experience to be able to restore confidence in our election system.

When elected Governor, I will quickly work to repair our election process and establish requirements to ensure transparency and accountability.

_The Benson Election Protection Plan includes _
* Requiring **photo identification to vote**
* **Prohibiting outside funding of elections by special interest groups (and put an end to Mark Zuckerburg and Facebook’s influence)**
* Require **every ballot be verified** as a legal vote (provisional ballots), and prohibit compensation for collecting absentee ballots,

This plan will create a **robust, accountable election system** to rebuild trust in our elections.

Do you support this plan? **[Click here to let me know.](mailto:Team@michelleforminnesota.com?subject=Elections%20Plan)**

Sincerely,
[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=1214835bb4&e=9d6926af69)
Michelle Benson
---

clean_body: Take a look at the latest slate of endorsers! | | | Peter, We’re excited to announce the latest slate of endorsements for Jessica! Take a look at the latest slate of endorsers to join Team Cisneros! Powerhouse representatives Katie Porter and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and local Texas organizations endorsed Jessica for Congress. This is huge! These endorsements couldn’t have come at a better time. They, and so many others, know Jessica is the best choice for South Texas. And with less than 12 days to go until early voting starts, this gives our campaign just the momentum we need to take us all the way through the primary election. 👇 Thank you for your support, Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Achievable and necessary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We must deliver for the people. That’s why voters sent us to Congress.
#
The needs of the people have only grown more urgent, Peter.
The expanded Child Tax credit expired, modest health care reforms are set to expire next year if we don’t take action, and the climate crisis is only getting worse.
We should be making bold progress for the people, not allowing things to get worse. That’s why Pramila is calling for Senate Democrats and President Biden to pass and sign Build Back Better before March 1.
[**Peter, this could be our last chance to address the climate crisis, invest in the care economy, and reduce the burdensome costs of health care in America. Can you chip in $3 to fuel Pramila’s fight for Build Back Better?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9914?refcode=em20220202-1003&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1003%2E420207%2EtDMf-v)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9914?refcode=em20220202-1003&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1003%2E420207%2EtDMf-v)**
We can do this. And we need to do this.
Democrats control Congress. Voters delivered us the White House and majorities in the House and Senate to solve the biggest problems facing the country. We MUST deliver for the voters who put us in this position, and for all the working people, families, and communities in America.
This has been a long fight. Corporations and their unlimited resources have delayed progress. Corporate lobbyists have had their voice heard, but we must ensure that the voice of the people prevails. And Pramila believes that the power of our grassroots movement can succeed if we continue organizing.
[**Can you contribute $3 today to help Pramila lead the fight for Build Back Better? The people cannot wait any longer.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9914?refcode=em20220202-1003&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1003%2E420207%2EtDMf-v)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220202-1003-footer&t=22&refcode2=1003_420207_tDMf-v&akid=1003%2E420207%2EtDMf-v)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Team Booker
subject: Bourbon > Vodka
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Just about anyone who knows Kentucky knows that we’re a bourbon state.

Which is why this finding from the latest FEC reports from last quarter is
interesting, to say the least:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16195?refcode=em20220202-1533&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1533%2E346206%2E79SSme ][IMG]

To be fair, some may prefer vodka to authentic Kentucky bourbon. But we
can almost guarantee that those folks don’t live in Kentucky.

In fact, Maurice Kanbar himself lives in San Francisco — and it’s telling
that Rand Paul’s PAC accepted $1 million from him in an effort to squash
our progressive movement to bring bold change to Kentucky.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16195?refcode=em20220202-1533&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1533%2E346206%2E79SSme ]Peter, if
we want to take on Rand Paul and his millions in vodka money, we need to
do this right and respond the only way we know how: with a wave of
grassroots support. Please, chip in $5 or whatever you can
to our campaign, and help us grow our movement:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16195?refcode=em20220202-1533&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1533%2E346206%2E79SSme ]Contribute $5 →

Rand Paul’s FEC filings make it clear where his priorities lie — with
exorbitantly wealthy donors and other dark money sources.

On the other hand, if you take a look at our numbers from last quarter,
you’ll see that our campaign is one of the strongest campaigns when it
comes to small-dollar averages. Our average donation last quarter was
$27.90, to be precise.

It’s a true sign of our grassroots power, and we couldn’t be prouder to be
in this work with you all.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16195?refcode=em20220202-1533&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1533%2E346206%2E79SSme ]And if this latest FEC report tells us anything,
Peter, it’s that we have an
election to win this year — and we can’t do it without you. Please chip
in $5 or whatever you can to our campaign right now, and
help us grow our grassroots movement so we can take on Rand Paul and end
this chapter of failed leadership in our Commonwealth.

More soon,

Team Booker

P.S. Want an authentic bourbon glass to drink your bourbon (or another
beverage) from? [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16203?t=1024&akid=1533%2E346206%2E79SSme ]You can buy your very own, union-made Charles Booker
for Senate bourbon rocks glass on our merchandise store.

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220202-1533-footer&t=1025&refcode2=1533_346206_79SSme&akid=1533%2E346206%2E79SSme

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1533%2E346206%2E79SSme

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Team Kaptur
subject: Thank the US Postal Service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
Trump tried to destroy USPS... |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnTd1PuNp4lpsS3xfGoIbNTtGhJjeWtNC4nUrkYPojLY7jiCsF4N2LIyH45umRI87YbRk3wTIiAB9a1euzJ4gGgEeZNq6CmS9oBB2QhpBkW8p2PLS6zcl215k6h2EvfZR6c46SPY8fShbNdbV_WPPndF8RfydcK4Y9ZSsr4iwsizUmjeiwCMTBRspxF2SpYsswtBz-DOv6hnW2lLa3onsrrjwFe5qnROMKIcERQ7sLBjlcscRq0K32T7HyeFbE7nLHM9fSWozsKuFBFOz683eVvkH4OlB5Zlpm3FaJen9P6IQ/3j8/jYnKPtG3RTOXOaz0LPKq3g/h0/V8L3gH41Yp3GC1999-6LjzNBLTHWmwyYox3grHyNKTo)

| | Team,

We wanted to drop you a quick line to make sure you heard that **free COVID-19 tests are now being sent to Americans via the US Postal Service.**

Trump and his crony Postmaster General Louis DeJoy did everything they could to try and destroy the USPS. Despite being overworked and underfunded, our **postal workers still deliver for us – literally.** Now they’ve undertaken a potentially lifesaving project to distribute COVID-19 tests to every American household.

**[In order to thank our union postal workers , we created this online card. Will you sign it today to help us thank USPS for all they have done?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnTd1PuNp4lpsS3xfGoIbNTtGhJjeWtNC4nUrkYPojLY7jiCsF4N2LIyH45umRI87Y37ztE2q-Obed2tpFJkKdV6fIvd5JWaSLNP87_rozlFDDa8WfywQZL5-XgYheIkzCblihl2zjlfJTgYm2rQRvOkd91sHdiASCPHkA-um949whf_85VeSNIvDiHt8Qm9IUBYXCQjrX7Ks_6UVCRvJzx2Y-LZl-7zrA41ftsA_BF0N3u7sEhLLAByc_GZh5cG32cWkQs8HIQ3Jg2LlPj0Q0GzJnqT1bh0IY5DJL7eQo_aA/3j8/jYnKPtG3RTOXOaz0LPKq3g/h1/Z8DWGhtyZrp8XCNGlr7uupB_JnTpwNGgH-2wRepSti4)**

| [**ADD YOUR NAME »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnTd1PuNp4lpsS3xfGoIbNTtGhJjeWtNC4nUrkYPojLY7jiCsF4N2LIyH45umRI87YOs_IrUkj243yphNnx2Nb-N9WAmaOrHgPb_nd74E_40-hATz9_rabbEz6XGnvf-x5M4HWbOKl4hr562TO5DuqIqimqarvJPeX8pl6P2fAJWxKLGhE-Gk5mVOdGHtWbx8fLWYhAwXajvVouAZiPvlYbGZJvMIlJ4eKz71U3nWiwppxzChkUQbM-pblfWoWRZQvZ3pqb0V5Z9-W45T0wd181ZthOd2tmWXbZbssuKy-uag/3j8/jYnKPtG3RTOXOaz0LPKq3g/h2/NDGLMslIEU446yY_vTVsYlxkGvYpimkNki7lD0stXLI)
---

Without our Post Office, we would be truly **isolated.** Postal workers are the arteries that connect Americans to each other, _and the world_.

Knowing the Postal Service’s importance, our nation’s founders made sure it was included in the Constitution.

**[The pandemic has proven how relevant and critical our USPS is – and now they’re fighting it head-on. Will you join Team Kaptur in thanking USPS for delivering for America by signing our card right now?

](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnTd1PuNp4lpsS3xfGoIbNTtGhJjeWtNC4nUrkYPojLY7jiCsF4N2LIyH45umRI87ZOHdInMqkH_iNILM9uL9X4TkZaM8DwZseGrLNwK1xt4YtBpW26ICt6rk3b0NUizXX2txeea6sv_f5GyJBicyWfwqHiVBxDALRzg0puZpTm2-aP0uGTzq_vVB--qqIvprzhVuFpksLD3MXNAiwj2bRTTzKGZCKqNpgNooWvq7f_xeNNN5is3I2a42VpRwjChZAizEGlHAWWj3TaBRHUKHc8ZcE_RW5si3Mt2hceqgHBMw/3j8/jYnKPtG3RTOXOaz0LPKq3g/h3/qokEO4pOEhUiBaNsqh8Bc6mZTglAe86ORNvWa9vH7qM)** [**SIGN THE CARD »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnTd1PuNp4lpsS3xfGoIbNTtGhJjeWtNC4nUrkYPojLY7jiCsF4N2LIyH45umRI87Z1LuW58kYbdeHkeraW8l_V_JAP1Y_b2dbNbmUpkKSkvgOcwZCoKrUUUG_RM-YnXkHd8H73-itOAfJ844SZara_F1MprsUVl94Crmbogt_zqoG_fs8d-2TbTgIPO1CW1Ze8l525Djik5fSoH7aKYTKQ3TRcHyv9byWo3fNcvyLgZmuk3a4pa1suk66VovgNV4eaQs1QPs6Y9Y2HgpsKKCC-K4S9hSpa-3FXYMR5f1RLmw/3j8/jYnKPtG3RTOXOaz0LPKq3g/h4/p6zi9FCKA_LxOEfHe_c99MWKXAKETpZtnuX-TSCYpzU)

Thank you for all you do,

\-- Team Kaptur

name: Team Morganize
subject: Could we have your thoughts on this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Your direct feedback is extremely valuable to us.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220202-604-footer-ak&t=2&akid=604%2E90090%2Et5IZRO)
Hey, it’s Team Morganize.
We’re nearly three months away from our primary election for U.S. Senate in Ohio — we can hardly believe it. We’re so grateful for all the support we’ve seen so far.
You’re an important part of this team, and we know how valuable your direct feedback is. That’s why, today, we’re announcing a new opportunity for you to have an input on our campaign strategy. **Today, we’re proud to launch our first Official 2022 Campaign Priorities Survey!**
[**Will you answer a few quick questions as part of our Official 2022 Campaign Priorities Survey? We’re looking for as many data points as possible as we map out our strategy for the months ahead. It will only take a few minutes (promise).**](https://act.morganharper.org/survey/2022-priorities-survey?refcode=em20220202-2&t=3&akid=604%2E90090%2Et5IZRO)
[What are your top three issues that the Morgan Harper team should focus on in 2022?](https://act.morganharper.org/survey/2022-priorities-survey?source=em20220202-604&t=4&akid=604%2E90090%2Et5IZRO) **[Take the Survey »](https://act.morganharper.org/survey/2022-priorities-survey?source=em20220202-604&t=5&akid=604%2E90090%2Et5IZRO)**
---
We want to know: _What should our campaign priorities be as we head into the primary? How should we invest our resources?_

I’ll make sure that’s no longer the case. I grew up in Southern Arizona, and I’ve dedicated my career to fighting on behalf of my community and giving them a voice. Now, I’m ready to take that fight to Congress. Because currently, our state isn’t being heard or represented by Nancy Pelosi and her “woke” socialist agenda. With the Democrats holding power in the House by just a 5-seat margin, all we need to do is win a handful of key races – including this one – to take back control and restore the people’s voice. I won’t lie to you, Peter. There aren’t any quick fixes to the problems we face, and change won’t happen overnight. But together, we can put America back on the right track with strong conservative leadership that represents the people instead of the extremist liberal donors that back Biden and Pelosi. We need to start by finishing the wall and fully secure our southern border. We also MUST make sure our elections are secure and free from fraud. And we have to end the Left’s out-of-control spending, tax hikes, and radical socialist policies. Big government is never the solution. Listening to the American people is. Let’s make Washington D.C. work for YOU once again. Thank you, Juan Ciscomani Republican Candidate for Congress PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740
