[](https://a.crowdskout.com/v1-1/email-click/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9mcmllbmRzLW9mLWNocmlzdGlhbi1uYXNjaW1lbnRvL21tX3BldGl0aW9uX2hmX2VuZG9yc2VtZW50XzAyMDEyMg?b=eyJjc0lkIjo5OTI3OTc0MDcsImNsaWVudElkIjozNDA2LCJvcmdhbml6YXRpb25JZCI6IjIxODU1NTMiLCJzb3VyY2VJZCI6IjI5NDQyIiwiZW1haWxpbmdJZCI6bnVsbCwidjJFbWFpbGluZ0lkIjoxMjEzNSwiZnJvbSI6IjhiMGU3NWM2LWE5ODAtNDJmNy1hNjZiLWEwOTg1M2E0YjY2OSJ9) _Peter, it’s no secret._ **The Congressional Majority**** _WILL_****be decided here in Pennsylvania** – _and whether Nancy Pelosi’s career is ended, comes down to our race in Pennsylvania's 4th Congressional district._ [**RETAKE THE HOUSE | SEND PELOSI PACKING**](https://a.crowdskout.com/v1-1/email-click/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9mcmllbmRzLW9mLWNocmlzdGlhbi1uYXNjaW1lbnRvL21tX3BldGl0aW9uX2hmX2VuZG9yc2VtZW50XzAyMDEyMg?b=eyJjc0lkIjo5OTI3OTc0MDcsImNsaWVudElkIjozNDA2LCJvcmdhbml6YXRpb25JZCI6IjIxODU1NTMiLCJzb3VyY2VJZCI6IjI5NDQyIiwiZW1haWxpbmdJZCI6bnVsbCwidjJFbWFpbGluZ0lkIjoxMjEzNSwiZnJvbSI6IjhiMGU3NWM2LWE5ODAtNDJmNy1hNjZiLWEwOTg1M2E0YjY2OSJ9) In case you don’t know me.**_I’m Christian Nascimento, a businessman and proud son of immigrants running for Congress to restore Pennsylvania’s hometown-grown conservative values to Washington D.C._** –a place absent of those values for far too long.
**_Nancy Pelosi and Madeleine Dean_** _have for too long supported the policies putting our families out of work–keeping our kids out of school–and making even groceries unaffordable_ –[**I think it’s about time to say ‘**** _ENOUGH_****.’**](https://a.crowdskout.com/v1-1/email-click/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9mcmllbmRzLW9mLWNocmlzdGlhbi1uYXNjaW1lbnRvL21tX3BldGl0aW9uX2hmX2VuZG9yc2VtZW50XzAyMDEyMg?b=eyJjc0lkIjo5OTI3OTc0MDcsImNsaWVudElkIjozNDA2LCJvcmdhbml6YXRpb25JZCI6IjIxODU1NTMiLCJzb3VyY2VJZCI6IjI5NDQyIiwiZW1haWxpbmdJZCI6bnVsbCwidjJFbWFpbGluZ0lkIjoxMjEzNSwiZnJvbSI6IjhiMGU3NWM2LWE5ODAtNDJmNy1hNjZiLWEwOTg1M2E0YjY2OSJ9) [**RETAKE THE HOUSE | DEFEAT DEMOCRATS**](https://a.crowdskout.com/v1-1/email-click/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9mcmllbmRzLW9mLWNocmlzdGlhbi1uYXNjaW1lbnRvL21tX3BldGl0aW9uX2hmX2VuZG9yc2VtZW50XzAyMDEyMg?b=eyJjc0lkIjo5OTI3OTc0MDcsImNsaWVudElkIjozNDA2LCJvcmdhbml6YXRpb25JZCI6IjIxODU1NTMiLCJzb3VyY2VJZCI6IjI5NDQyIiwiZW1haWxpbmdJZCI6bnVsbCwidjJFbWFpbGluZ0lkIjoxMjEzNSwiZnJvbSI6IjhiMGU3NWM2LWE5ODAtNDJmNy1hNjZiLWEwOTg1M2E0YjY2OSJ9) **Pennsylvania deserves better– _I’m proud to be the ONLY Republican stepping up to fight back._** **_I’m proud to be joined by NUMEROUS community leaders who agree and have endorsed our historic campaign._** Community leaders like...
* **State Senator, Bob Mensch**
* **Upper Frederick Supervisor, Sean Frisco**

WORST IDEA OF 2021 GOES TO JOE BIDEN FOR HIS BUILD BACK BETTER BROKE AGENDA Peter, Welcome to the closing ceremonies of the Blundie’s , the music is about to start playing and the curtains are ready to close. Despite some stiff competition, this year’s winner truly rose above the rest with an unprecedented $3.5 TRILLION price tag: Peter, we’re one year into complete one-party rule in Washington, DC, and we literally can’t afford another year of close calls, botched executions, and terrible policy. We’re running to take back the House and inject some common sense back into government. If you’ve had enough of it too, Thank you, Jesse Jensen Jesse Jensen is an Army Ranger, small-businessman, father, and husband. In the Army, he led troops in combat and took out high-value targets. | | | Hi There Folks,

Ever since Scott Fitzgerald got into office, this community has had to deal with attacks on American democracy, lack of action in the face of the COVID-19 crisis, partisan politics, and a refusal to even show up and talk to his constituents here at home. **The 5th Congressional District deserves better. We need someone who will demand more of our government and make it work for all of us.**

Mike Van Someren has been listening to our neighbors about how to best move Wisconsin forward. He is ready to advocate for the best interests of this district, the country, and the people & families who live here.

name: Mandela Barnes for Senate
subject: Looking for 5,000 signatures today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela Barnes for Wisconsin
body:
It's important that we show the strength of this grassroots team.
#
_You are receiving this email because of your support for Democratic campaigns in the past. Mandela Barnes is running for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin and is one of Democrats’ best chances to flip a seat in 2022. He’ll only email when it’s important, but if you do not want to receive future emails,[you can unsubscribe at this link.](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em220202-1-tns&t=1&akid=1312%2E196590%2EHr9A13)_
Friends -
Last summer when Mandela decided to run for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin, there was one thing we knew right off the bat.
_There is no way that Mandela can defeat Ron Johnson and flip this Senate seat alone._ That's something we must do together.
So with the future of the Democratic Senate majority hanging in the balance, today we're asking you to do something important to show you're a part of this team:
[**Can you please add your name to say you personally endorse Mandela's campaign for U.S. Senate? We're looking for 5,000 signatures before midnight to show the strength of this grassroots team.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em220202_personal_endorse_md/?source=em220202-1-tns&refcode2=1312.196590.Hr9A13&t=2&akid=1312%2E196590%2EHr9A13)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em220202_personal_endorse_md/?source=em220202-1-tns&refcode2=1312.196590.Hr9A13&t=3&akid=1312%2E196590%2EHr9A13)
Perhaps you've been part of this campaign from the beginning, or maybe you recently joined the team. But the one thing that matters most is that we're in this together, because Mandela is counting on you to have an active role in this campaign.
Each and every one of us has the potential to shape the outcome of this race – but only if we work together.
Now that Ron Johnson has formally announced that he's running for re-election, our campaign needs a large number of people to show they stand with Mandela. Because at the end of the day, that's the only way we're going to win this race.
Will you be one of the 5,000 people to personally endorse Mandela today?
[**Add your name to say you personally endorse Mandela Barnes for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin. It's so important that we're in this together.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em220202_personal_endorse_md/?source=em220202-1-tns&refcode2=1312.196590.Hr9A13&t=4&akid=1312%2E196590%2EHr9A13)
As long as an unprecedented number of people come together to be a part of this campaign, we are going to send Mandela Barnes to the U.S. Senate in November. And it all starts with showing that you're in today.
Thank you in advance for adding your name to say you personally endorse Mandela.
All our best,
Team Mandela
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em220202_personal_endorse_md/?source=em220202-1-tns&refcode2=1312.196590.Hr9A13&t=5&akid=1312%2E196590%2EHr9A13)

Paid for by Mandela Barnes for Wisconsin
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=1312%2E196590%2EHr9A13). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=1312%2E196590%2EHr9A13)
Mandela is counting on people like you to fund this campaign. [**Make a contribution to stand with Mandela today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mandela-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=1312_196590_Hr9A13&akid=1312%2E196590%2EHr9A13)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=9&akid=1312%2E196590%2EHr9A13)

body:
There cannot be different rules for the powerful and the powerless.
| End Citizens United is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ultimately ending _Citizens United_. If you really want to receive only our most urgent emails or unsubscribe, [**click here.**](https://action.endcitizensunited.org/signup/urgents?&t=1&akid=64042%2E6744870%2Edp-EX4) [ **_The Guardian:_ "‘The walls are closing in’: Trump reels from week of political setbacks" ** ](https://action.endcitizensunited.org/survey/PET_stand-with-garland_2021-11-06/?source=MS_EM_PET_2022.02.02_B4_stand-with-garland_X__F1_S1_C1__all-urg-1-2-T2&t=2&akid=64042%2E6744870%2Edp-EX4) | | [](https://action.endcitizensunited.org/survey/PET_stand-with-garland_2021-11-06/?source=MS_EM_PET_2022.02.02_B4_stand-with-garland_X__F1_S1_C1__all-urg-1-2-T2&t=3&akid=64042%2E6744870%2Edp-EX4)
---
[ _**DONALD TRUMP IS TREMBLING!** Attorney General Merrick Garland is INCHES from exposing him for his January 6th CRIMES. _](https://action.endcitizensunited.org/survey/PET_stand-with-garland_2021-11-06/?source=MS_EM_PET_2022.02.02_B4_stand-with-garland_X__F1_S1_C1__all-urg-1-2-T2&t=4&akid=64042%2E6744870%2Edp-EX4)

But Trump is working with his MAGA loyalists to hit back hard against the Department Of Justice.

[ **_AG Garland needs our help. We need 10,000 Signatures by 11:59 PM to STAND with him in his pursuit of Trump & the Truth. Can you sign NOW? >>_** ](https://action.endcitizensunited.org/survey/PET_stand-with-garland_2021-11-06/?source=MS_EM_PET_2022.02.02_B4_stand-with-garland_X__F1_S1_C1__all-urg-1-2-T2&t=5&akid=64042%2E6744870%2Edp-EX4) | [STAND WITH MERRICK GARLAND >>](https://action.endcitizensunited.org/survey/PET_stand-with-garland_2021-11-06/?source=MS_EM_PET_2022.02.02_B4_stand-with-garland_X__F1_S1_C1__all-urg-1-2-T2&t=6&akid=64042%2E6744870%2Edp-EX4)
---
Peter –

Donald Trump is a TRAITOR. He incited a deadly, anti-democracy insurrection against the United States, [_WHILE he was President!_](https://action.endcitizensunited.org/survey/PET_stand-with-garland_2021-11-06/?source=MS_EM_PET_2022.02.02_B4_stand-with-garland_X__F1_S1_C1__all-urg-1-2-T2&t=7&akid=64042%2E6744870%2Edp-EX4)

Now he must pay the consequences for his betrayal to the Constitution.

That’s why:

Rep. Liz Cheney...
Rep. Adam Schiff...
Speaker Nancy Pelosi...
Rep. Bennie Thompson...
Attorney General Merrick Garland...

[**EVERYONE**](https://action.endcitizensunited.org/survey/PET_stand-with-garland_2021-11-06/?source=MS_EM_PET_2022.02.02_B4_stand-with-garland_X__F1_S1_C1__all-urg-1-2-T2&t=8&akid=64042%2E6744870%2Edp-EX4) is coming together to get to the bottom of Trump’s potential crimes:
[](https://action.endcitizensunited.org/survey/PET_stand-with-garland_2021-11-06/?source=MS_EM_PET_2022.02.02_B4_stand-with-garland_X__F1_S1_C1__all-urg-1-2-T2&t=9&akid=64042%2E6744870%2Edp-EX4)
[ **_But Trump and his allies are working to undermine and subvert these investigations._**](https://action.endcitizensunited.org/survey/PET_stand-with-garland_2021-11-06/?source=MS_EM_PET_2022.02.02_B4_stand-with-garland_X__F1_S1_C1__all-urg-1-2-T2&t=10&akid=64042%2E6744870%2Edp-EX4)

[That’s why we need your support IMMEDIATELY! Trump cannot be let off the hook. **Will you sign RIGHT NOW to stand with AG Garland in support of investigating Donald Trump?? >>**](https://action.endcitizensunited.org/survey/PET_stand-with-garland_2021-11-06/?source=MS_EM_PET_2022.02.02_B4_stand-with-garland_X__F1_S1_C1__all-urg-1-2-T2&t=11&akid=64042%2E6744870%2Edp-EX4)
[STAND WITH MERRICK GARLAND >>](https://action.endcitizensunited.org/survey/PET_stand-with-garland_2021-11-06/?source=MS_EM_PET_2022.02.02_B4_stand-with-garland_X__F1_S1_C1__all-urg-1-2-T2&t=12&akid=64042%2E6744870%2Edp-EX4)

Please do this for our country,

_-EndCitizensUnited.org_

**With the 2020 Election behind us, now the real work begins: we need a two-thirds vote in both the House and Senate to pass the Constitutional Amendment to overturn _Citizens United_.**
We know we send a lot of emails. And you might be wondering why: We aren’t a SuperPAC. We’re not funded by corporate PACs. We spend EVERY DIME so efficiently by running proven effective ads to win the most competitive races, push to pass SWEEPING Campaign Finance Reform, and build our movement.
**Peter, when we pass the Constitutional Amendment to overturn _Citizens United_ , you'll be able to say you helped make that happen.**
